body:
| | | **BREAKING:** The conservative Supreme Court just OFFICIALLY heard arguments in a case that could **_overturn Roe v. Wade._**

**Justices Sotomayor, Kagan, and Breyer are ALL sounding the alarm about the Court’s recent moves -- and if we don’t add our voices to theirs, reproductive rights in America could be COMPLETELY stripped away:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&akid=2128%2E9716520%2EYZ97Vs)
**[Don’t wait another minute: Sign our Democratic petition calling on the Supreme Court to DEFEND reproductive rights!](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&akid=2128%2E9716520%2EYZ97Vs)

****_Please help us reach 100,000 signatures by midnight!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&akid=2128%2E9716520%2EYZ97Vs)
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&akid=2128%2E9716520%2EYZ97Vs)

This could be it: The moment we’ve feared since 1973.

Just yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case seeking **_explicitly_** to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and give right-wing politicians free rein to criminalize an entire generation of women and their doctors.

We know exactly where this ends if Brett Kavanaugh and the conservatives get their way -- but we still have time to stand up to them!

**We’ve just DOUBLED our signature goal to 100,000 by midnight tonight. And with _Roe v. Wade_ and the rights of MILLIONS of Americans hanging in the balance, we need YOU to take a stand!**

**[Add your name TODAY to stand with Justices Sotomayor, Kagan, and Breyer and DEMAND that the Supreme Court uphold _Roe v. Wade_ >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211202-SupremeCourtUpdate-RoeArguments-Pros-sl1&akid=2128%2E9716520%2EYZ97Vs)

We know exactly where this ends if Brett Kavanaugh and the conservatives get their way -- but we still have time to stand up to them! We’ve just DOUBLED our signature goal to 100,000 by midnight tonight. And with Roe v. Wade and the rights of MILLIONS of Americans hanging in the balance, we need YOU to take a stand! Thanks for speaking out, Team DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. subject: I checked the list twice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WE WANT TRUMP
body:

---

**Fellow American- Democrats deserve coal for Christmas, and I’m going to give it to them.** _**Let me be clear, this is not a joke.**_ I’m very serious about sending coal to the very Democrats who openly discuss barring us from our loved ones during the most important holiday in our nation.

They want to take away jobs if you refuse to get the vaccine, to destroy businesses if they don’t enforce vaccine mandates, and they want to continue dictating every aspect of our lives.

They want us to be afraid and to fight each other. _**No more.**_ These Democrats have done nothing good for our nation except waste our tax dollars, censor our speech, and threaten American’s for not obeying their mandates.

**Democrats don’t understand anything except action, and that’s why with your help, I’m going to give them coal from the American people so they can see what we really think of them.**

[](https://secure.wewanttrump2024.com/list/aft//coal/?InitiativeKey=SLU4D2TOVUGJ&sid=ITE&mid=3311551&utm_source=rev&utm_campaign=coal1&utm_medium=email)

_**United we stand.**_ That’s what a mountain of coal in front of their offices from the American people stands for, and I’m asking you to join me to be the voice for the American people who are sick of being treated like second class citizens.

Democrats give more priority to illegal immigrants, filthy rich celebrities, and liberals who bash you for not wearing a mask one minute, then take theirs off when the cameras aren’t rolling.

America is done with these radical liberals who hate the police, hate your desire for freedom, and treat our traditional values like a joke. If you’re sick and tired of it, then show them we’re not going away. [**Pitch in $9 and help me send coal to them for Christmas, because that’s all they deserve for what they’ve done for our country.**](https://secure.wewanttrump2024.com/list/aft//coal/?InitiativeKey=SLU4D2TOVUGJ&sid=ITE&mid=3311551&utm_source=rev&utm_campaign=coal1&utm_medium=email)

Actions speak louder than words, and Coal is going to get that message across.

Thank you,

[](https://secure.wewanttrump2024.com/list/aft//coal/?InitiativeKey=SLU4D2TOVUGJ&sid=ITE&mid=3311551&utm_source=rev&utm_campaign=coal1&utm_medium=email)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: 3 More Reasons
body:
| Peter -- There are three more reasons why you should scoop up some of the remaining tickets for the Action 4 Liberty End-of-Year Christmas Event.
## Reason 1
Thanks to the overwhelming response to our event, we are now giving away a total of 4 guns. You don't need to buy a raffle, just purchasing a ticket for the event automatically registers you for a chance to win! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=1)
## Reason 2
I decided to auction off one of the remaining two infamous King Walz signs. Want a piece of authoritarian state fair history? You can bid on the coveted, banned King Walz sign that the state fair stole from us to silence our voice. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_goes_back_up_on_state_fair_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=2)
## Reason 3
Come meet the one state legislator who is so feared and hated in the Swamp that he already has two Democrat opponents and one Establishment Republican running against him. Rep Erik Mortensen is going to tell you what is behind the smoke screen at the Capitol! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=3) **Tickets are $50 and includes dinner and a chance to win a bunch of guns, including the Non-Biden Approved AR-15. Want to make a bigger impact, reserve a table for $1,000 and invite 7 friends to hear our important message.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=4 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=4)
---
I look forward to seeing you in person on December 8th and am very excited to discuss what we have planned for 2022.
## **WHEN: Wednesday, Dec 8th (Doors open at 5:00pm)**
## **WHERE: The Mermaid, Mounds View**
## **[YES, I WANT TO REGISTER FOR THIS AWESOME EVENT AND ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN AN AR-15](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=5)**
[No, the Omicron variant scares me](https://www.action4liberty.com/vaccinated_man_brings_omicron_variant_to_minnesota?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=6)
See you on Dec 8th!

Jake Duesenberg
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=7)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=8)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=9)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=10)[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=11)
-=-=- Freedom Email · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=12).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=13). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_4_0&n=14), software for leaders.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Biden’s War on Parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "Headline") Peter, Parents in America have the right to raise their children as they see fit. They have a right to know who is teaching their child, and they have a right to know what that person is teaching their child. Even I cannot believe how threatening this idea is to liberals. **Joe Biden was so offended by parents who dared to question their kid's education that he used federal law enforcement officers to try and intimidate them.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "Parents' Bill of Rights")Parents were branded as Domestic terrorists and had their names dragged through the mud. It is something straight out of a George Orwell book, or even worse, the Chinese Communist playbook, _and I will not allow it to continue._ It's why I have introduced the Parents Bill of Rights to end this war on American parents, and **[I am asking for your help.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "I am asking for your help.")** Biden and the rest of the liberal intelligentsia vastly underestimate how hard parents fight when someone threatens their kids. **_I will never stop fighting for my kids or yours._** **[I need every parent in America standing beside me, starting with you. Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $50 can make a big difference in the fight for American Parents.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914367:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "I need every parent in America
standing beside me, starting with you. Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $50 can make a big difference in the fight for American
Parents.")** **Joe Biden is trying to force our nation into a true cradle to grave government _with him at the top._** Your ability to raise your children _is a threat to their power, and they cannot allow it to continue, which is why they started their War on Parents._ [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "STAND WITH
JOSH")**[If you believe we need to defeat Joe Biden's war on parents, I need to know you are fighting with me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "If you believe we need to defeat Joe Biden’s war on
parents, I need to know you are fighting with me.")** Biden's War on Parents is not just a means to deconstruct America but a means to destroy America. **_Biden wants to raise a generation of children that the government can control through programs and handouts and their friends in Big Tech._** The left may celebrate the decline of the American family, but I refuse to let them succeed. **[Join me as I fight the left's war on Parents and fight to protect our children from government tyranny.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "Join me as I fight the left’s war on Parents and fight to
protect our children from government tyranny.")** For America's future,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58914366:JaJvsNEN8:m:1:3103520637:3DD0FA5B10882BE59F7B961B1106F4AF:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r)
Peter,

The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push their radical agenda.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to MRC, roughly 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.

You and I are winning the war against Fake News media outlets such as MSNBC, NBC, CNN, and more. You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r).

Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture.

Here are the TOP 5 biggest media lies of 2021:

1. **Staging a fake racist stunt against a GOP gubernatorial candidate:** Members of the "Lincoln Project" staged a photo op in front of Glenn Youngkin's campaign bus, holding tiki torches and pretending to be racist supporters of the GOP candidate. The story was PROVEN fake and CNN continued to support the stunt in any way.

Disgusting. [**Help the Media Research Center fight Fake News like CNN by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r)

2. **Attempting to put Kyle Rittenhouse behind bars:** It's no secret the Leftwing media was trying to influence the jury to convict Kyle Rittenhouse and destroy this young man's life. The judge even barred MSNBC from the courtroom when they followed the jury's bus back to their hotel...

[**Help the Media Research Center expose MSNBC and Fake News Journalists by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r)

3. **Covering up a rape in order to protect Woke educators:** A father attended a school board meeting in Loudoun county Virginia, demanding answers and accountability for his daughter being raped by a "non-binary" boy wearing a skirt. Instead of answers, this man was arrested and now the FBI is monitoring parents who are involved in their child's education.

The media decided to side with the Loudoun county school officials and helped cover up the rape story.

This is a disgusting new low for the Fake News media. [**Help the Media Research Center spread the TRUTH about stories like this by donating $10, $50, $100, $250, or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r)

4. **Defending Anthony Fauci 's lies to Congress: **Fauci lied to Congress and MSNBC, CNN, NBC, the New York Times, and more all continued to defend him. This man needs to be fired for his lies to the American people.

[**Help the Media Research Center hold LIARS like Anthony Fauci by sharing the truth! Donate $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r)

5. **Protecting Joe Biden 's failing Presidency:** Biased news anchors and reporters are doing everything possible to keep Biden in power. They are covering up his failures in Afghanistan, inflation, huge deficits, and more.

Why am I sharing these with you? Because they are only the tip of the iceberg.

The Fake News media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, to our constitution, to our culture, and to the principles of liberty.

MRC has SHATTERED trust in the Fake News media... but they have become aggressive and distribute lies through new mediums such as social media.

I am asking you to invest in the Media Research Center and help us combat Fake News media.

Here is how MRC is FIGHTING BACK!

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

My goal is to raise $5,000 from online supporters in the next 48 hours. Please support the Media Research Center's critical mission by making a donation using one of the links below:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58925290:JiwIkNEmN:m:1:3253819041:DA9798698CE3767DC6DBDCF8D39FA4A6:r)

Your support empowers MRC to expose bias in the media, hold the media accountable, and spread the truth. The United States will never remain a free country without holding the Leftwing media accountable.

I am counting on your support.

Thank you for everything, Peter.

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

body:
It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zth98rp6n239fj6k5pbs1fo2qmncd3p162o2lr8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlm9qecp9m6cor4pjlcpr3ccr161pr3clhe5qb4pj6cjinapr6eoqj8d5gc5gn1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75c36e6ob6p77maqmcdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zoepimeec2bsfimdt2g7vn55cgp2j2ko2b4ap480_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)** __ [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvd3avpmmnbcdq9k4k4chnjumj22kqr2qa0l7eoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs) | |
---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj79ohbv1deii5fj72gd7dgad7qg92lan2839148_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home.

**If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5net7edubqnk3079orqe52q4p357jg137ccgc50_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z46a01h5nrte30pgk7qt0oulc2s01lqs1m8cfh2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zta8cbkv6vl2914viaed3jefklu1v4ovb62ofmkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpopn3gqo385v0q7plum9vg93q3mo59dchsssrio_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk3619v77s4ou87tfqaguh4aibbpdl8sj9j4bib8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slh69oj5c3h2bs)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: VOLUNTEER MEETING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Gilbert for Governor [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor
body:
Join us tonight for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# * Volunteers Needed*
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-y/)
## * Registration *
### **VOLUNTEER LINK**
[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-j/)
## * Donation *
### **WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT!**
[DONATE TO HELP US WIN!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-t/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-i/) | [ Tweet ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-d/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-li-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-h/) | [ Forward ](https://gilbertforgovernor.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-iduiyhurdd-E305D3C8-bljxhl-l-k)
---|---|---|---
WWW.GILBERT4GOV.COM Political Adv. Paid for by Committee to Elect Gilbert for Governor [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor.updatemyprofile.com/y-bljxhl-E305D3C8-iduiyhurdd-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-bljxhl-iduiyhurdd-o/)

Republicans. ")**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

body:
Fauci is absolutely out of control. He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about fundin
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7cn0cm5nicolu9n3oqs50tvheq5cjc78l52avg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)** __ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5pokfhdlbo74n445g219jm0tma5v594rkpghm6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs) | |
---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp0e05ooa3thahj0tfe7ee8apqihepsls15hsc8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home.

**If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqvoils94vuk9l3jq4nfegm92bgev2jcnfelm57o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5h512oe90nb7j1o3o0h2k58g5ngcm75uuququ38_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zen1oq3gp0krtgcicprg5a5egcrqe7od2kb018v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrd77krlrbqce2q73h36l70ug3cibk5opfo3avb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu3ig24ce0rt9tpcs46bcdo1sohr6s37fck7eu78_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj64o76cth2bs)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: American Defense News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4vcnousc0sh296c0qk204s2g5talj00ko0lgt88_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj66ob1c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9jemp67djmmlr79ojie6qrccr562pn5cjm6dp6eojnm9ijccphcdim4sjnmcoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjhmapm6pti6hj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7i68rpvd25prlk07mjch3l4qatn5l5m9uqtf6q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj66ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsdd2t0o5al3ug5cj0c41nds2ji897k2c7d9ipj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj66ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znqvei7l6m19a460b3kv3k19egrbffq8udt4nlo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slj66ob1c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013ImD5X6jweeOrGk10oj-3FVtn3ornQZxKpVL0JEtVnttW2oWzMZlY6VlgbWCWSitHZgkLccoyb62gzjZ2eGFiN8fe6Ctv8jWUGmCFZhDeBE1cIVA05vW8PFo3Agrxq9_uFyQVpqt1l2TorRCf5d_9w==&c=QHesf_TpECEAzmw1weylqBaXcvCXY9wYhrJS4gFiFR9bsv421_KxKw==&ch=tm-4TLm_Gm6GQXLPKKSw6XrLTwehn6_eesjihFm-u3A6zNedoZZnGQ==)

| |
---
| Peter,
Election integrity should be one of our TOP PRIORITIES right now, but it seems like the Democrats feel much more comfortable brushing it under the rug.

**Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight calls Ann Selzer “the best pollster in politics.”** Why? She knows Iowa better than anyone, overseeing almost every one of the Des Moines Register’s Iowa polls since 1987 – and she has a track record of nearly always being right.
That’s why this is such incredible news for Democrats: **Ann Selzer just told PBS that “there is something going on” in her latest poll and that she sees “weakness” for Iowa Republican Chuck Grassley in her new numbers!**
Admiral Mike Franken is the Democrat running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue, and if Mike wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold onto (or expand!) our Senate majority next year.
But Mike needs your help. **Right now, we’re still 55 donations short of our daily goal and what we need to help Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to try to defeat Mike and turn the Senate red. But Mike Franken’s not taking money from corporate PACs so if he’s going to win, he needs grassroots donors like you to chip in now:

name: Nikki Haley
subject: If you support Israel, you need to read this immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2zrlz--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Fellow Conservative,

If you don’t know who Huwaida Arraf is, I need you to keep reading this email.

**[If you do know who she is, I need you to donate right away to help us stop her.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zrlz-1nldm-4qqlpo7/ "If you do know who she is, I need you to donate right away to help us stop her.")**

---
| | | [STOP HUWAIDA ARRAF NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zrlz-1nldn-4qqlpo8/)
---

Here are five things you need to know about Huwaida Arraf:
1. She founded an anti-Israel group _**known for provoking violent confrontations**_ with the Israeli military that _**has been investigated by the FBI for possible ties to terrorism.**_
2. She co-authored an op-ed that promoted violence against Israelis and said: “ _**Yes, people will get killed and injured,**_ ” but these deaths are “no less noble than carrying out a suicide operation. And we are certain that if these men were killed during such an action, _**they would be considered shaheed Allah.**_ ”
3. She has _**provided protection for terrorists,**_ even acting as a voluntary human shield for them.
4. She co-organized the “Free Gaza Flotilla” _**which led to violent clashes**_ with the Israeli Navy.
5. Now, _**she’s running for Congress**_ in Michigan’s 10th Congressional District.

Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf.

In order to do that, we must support Rep. Lisa McClain – the pro-Israel Republican who is currently representing the district.

---
| | | [SUPPORT REP. LISA McCLAIN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zrlz-1nldo-4qqlpo9/)
---

**[If you stand with Israel, I am urging you to rush anything you can to help Rep. Lisa McClain defeat Huwaida Arraf.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zrlz-1nldp-4qqlpo0/ "If you stand with Israel, I am urging you to rush anything you can to help Rep. Lisa McClain defeat Huwaida Arraf.")**

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

I’m focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

body:
What’s changed between 2009 and now? Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/45835f741c7bba64/8a02539f547386fcc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, The Biden Administration recently slammed the Congressional Budget Office’s ability to weigh in on the far-left socialist spending scam they’re trying to ram through the Senate and sign into law. Biden White House deputy press secretary Andrew Bates claimed that the CBO doesn’t have the “experience” to weigh in on Build Back Better. Perhaps he should take notes from his boss back in 2009, when then-Vice President Biden praised the CBO’s ability to score legislation in a bipartisan manner. He said it was “the only thing Democrats and Republicans agree on ... even when they don’t agree with what we wanted to do because they are bipartisan.” _The only thing that is different now is that the radical left doesn’t like what the numbers say anymore._ The fact is that this bill is NOT going to pay for itself, and will cost more than DOUBLE the estimated cost. Instead of owning up to it, Joe Biden is doubling down on his failed policies. **Will you chip in for $5 Friday TODAY to help me end Joe Biden’s socialist spending scam?**

name: Team Nikki
subject: BREAKING - DeSantis’ Private Army
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
This is straight out of the authoritarian playbook

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39295382/319220375/380302539?refcode=privatearmy123&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Y4YTk2NS00YTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2dMqssRgFrgeX_D4KG6excgWS0ZnSVWnMj2ame314w=) Peter — We can’t believe it’s come to this. Yesterday, Governor DeSantis announced that he wants to reinstate the Florida State Guard — a paramilitary force of 200 civilians who will answer directly to him, without any oversight from the federal government. **We could’ve guessed that this was DeSantis’ next move, Peter. After all, he’s been taking pages out of the authoritarian playbook for years. ** [**We know that DeSantis is an authoritarian, but this is taking it to a whole new level. And if we don’t put a stop to it now, we may not get another chance. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Taking a moment to say thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Earlier this week, we faced our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Despite all the hecticness of the holidays so many grassroots supporters took the time to pitch in. It’s deeply appreciated. With your help, we crushed our end-of-month fundraising goal! Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.

Earlier this week, we faced our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Despite all the hecticness of the holidays so many grassroots supporters took the time to pitch in. It’s deeply appreciated. With your help, **we crushed our end-of-month fundraising goal!**

Thank you so much for your support, Peter. I'm honored to have you alongside me as we continue to build a better Kentucky.

The road ahead won't be easy, but I know that if we keep working together, we can continue creating real opportunity and progress in every community across the commonwealth.

Thank you for your support,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q4-2021?refcode=em21_211202_eomty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211202_eomty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Don Huffines for Texas
subject: [BREAKING] I’ve filed to be your next Governor 🤠
body:
but I need your help [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-r/) Fellow Patriot, Today, I am proud to announce that I have officially filed to run in the election for Governor of Texas. My family and I are honored by the support we have received from Texans hungry for true Conservative leadership. [_**Will you rush an immediate grassroots contribution of $5, $10, $25, $100, or even $250 so we can save Texas?**_](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-y/)
[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-j/) I look forward to throwing Greg Abbott a retirement party in the upcoming primary election and securing a victory against Beto O'Rourke in the general election . . . _. . . but I need your support to get there._ From the beginning, my campaign has fought tirelessly to defend Conservative values and restore leadership in Texas. [_**So please, CLICK HERE to rush an immediate grassroots contribution of $5, $10, $25, $100, or even $250 so we can save Texas TODAY.**_](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-t/) I look forward to continuing that fight throughout the remainder of our campaign and in the coming years as I serve as your Governor. For Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-i/) Don Huffines for Governor
_An Actual Republican_ [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-d/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-h/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chutkid-yuykitnyh-o/) | _Copyright(C) 2021 Don Huffines Campaign, All rights reserved._You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. **Our Mailing Address:**

name: Matt Castelli HQ
subject: It’s time we raise the minimum wage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| | **Breaking News:_We’re currently in the longest stretch in U.S. history without an increase in the federal minimum wage. Hardworking families can’t afford to wait any longer._**

[**_Add your name today if you agree that we need to raise the federal minimum wage from $7.25 to $15 an hour!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39298693/319232678/1294284639?source=2021MinWage_MC&referrer=group-matt-castelli-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmc-ja-2111%3Frefcode%3Dmc_em_pt_wl_211122_1_1%26amount%3D10&contactdata=GxC8g5ew5%2BHrPxxUkfGP9pneVIVnodz5lmlcL7slXx5EdkeVhgrOlfIw9MvxwEIK&refcode2=964832f4-5054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MC_EM_EN_90DO_211203_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ4MzJmNC01MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eOpKADfhNXg0k5UruJVyl1uQ_UFOe97KHIADLDBFGU=&emci=79b48b89-4e54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=964832f4-5054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15140246)
| [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39298694/319232679/1294284639?source=2021MinWage_MC&referrer=group-matt-castelli-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmc-ja-2111%3Frefcode%3Dmc_em_pt_wl_211122_1_1%26amount%3D10&contactdata=GxC8g5ew5%2BHrPxxUkfGP9pneVIVnodz5lmlcL7slXx5EdkeVhgrOlfIw9MvxwEIK&refcode2=964832f4-5054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MC_EM_EN_90DO_211203_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ4MzJmNC01MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eOpKADfhNXg0k5UruJVyl1uQ_UFOe97KHIADLDBFGU=&emci=79b48b89-4e54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=964832f4-5054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15140246)
---

Each year, CEOs across the country are taking home more and more income instead of ensuring their employees have the income necessary to cover basic living expenses. This is inhumane and our communities deserve better!

**Workers need a minimum of $15 an hour to cover basic needs.**

[**_Please, if you support increasing the minimum wage to $15, click here to add your name right away!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39298695/319232680/1294284639?source=2021MinWage_MC&referrer=group-matt-castelli-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmc-ja-2111%3Frefcode%3Dmc_em_pt_wl_211122_1_1%26amount%3D10&contactdata=GxC8g5ew5%2BHrPxxUkfGP9pneVIVnodz5lmlcL7slXx5EdkeVhgrOlfIw9MvxwEIK&refcode2=964832f4-5054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MC_EM_EN_90DO_211203_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ4MzJmNC01MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eOpKADfhNXg0k5UruJVyl1uQ_UFOe97KHIADLDBFGU=&emci=79b48b89-4e54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=964832f4-5054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15140246)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
First, I want to say 'Thank You.' Thanks to your support, we surpassed our important end-of-month fundraising goal for November and are on target to have the resources we need to defeat Mitch McConnell's handpicked Senate candidate in 2022! For those of you who couldn’t give this time, your support and engagement is also deeply appreciated. We are less than a year away from an election that, once again, will have enormous implications for all of us, the future of our country, and our ability to continue to make progress on the many challenges before us. The Party of Trump continues to spew hate, endanger lives by denying the science of COVID-19, and doubling down on the 'Big Lie' to try to undermine the Biden Presidency and justify draconian new voter suppression laws from coast to coast. And, earlier this week, we saw Mike Pence crowing that he hoped to see the top court of our land "make history" by overturning a woman’s right to reproductive choice — an act that would leave women across this country subject to the legal whims of their state legislatures, many of which have openly stated their intentions to end all access to abortion under almost any circumstance. With attacks coming on all fronts, we need to stick together to get through this. After the GOP win in Virginia last month, Mitch McConnell has used that election as a springboard to target this Senate seat right here in Maryland to help him win back control of the chamber. **In a 50-50 Senate, McConnell needs to flip just ONE seat to win control — and we will not let that seat be Maryland!** Fighting for a better future for every American shouldn't be this difficult — but it is what it is. Despite all the craziness — and thanks to the votes of millions of Americans in 2020 — we have already passed the American Rescue Plan, delivered a historic infrastructure modernization bill, and part 2 of the Build Back Better agenda to cut costs for middle-class Americans and address the climate crisis is on the way! Working together, we defeat this pandemic, expand opportunities for working families, defend our democracy, protect the rule of law, and keep the Senate majority. As always, thank you so much for being a part of this important work! Onwards, Chris
* * *

name: Team Franchot
subject: PHOTOS: Our Action-Packed Month of November
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Hi Peter,
November was another excellent month for Team Franchot, and we’re very excited to share with you our photo recap of everything that Peter Franchot has been up to. To everyone who has joined us, we can’t thank you enough for your support of this campaign. The energy and enthusiasm that you have brought to the campaign trail is a true testament to the growing strength of this inclusive, people-powered movement.
If you’ve joined us in the past few weeks, then make sure to keep reading below -- you just might see yourself in one of our photos! If you haven’t had a chance to join us yet, you’ll have ample opportunity to do so in the weeks and months to come as we continue to take this movement to new heights.
Will you chip in to help Peter Franchot stay ahead in this competitive race? Starting off our December fundraising period with a groundswell of grassroots donations is precisely the boost we need to make sure we can hit our November fundraising goal. We’re looking to get 100 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Thank you,
Team Franchot
Here’s our recap of November:
On November 2, Peter joined fellow elected officials in Baltimore to honor and remember our former Mayor, former Governor, and former Comptroller, William Donald Schaefer on his 100th Birthday. With more than 50 years spent in public office, Schaefer’s tremendous legacy continues to impact the lives of our citizens today, and his “Do-It-Now” governing philosophy remains an enduring model for results-oriented public service.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 3, Peter had an excellent time speaking with voters about his vision for the future of our state at an event in Potomac.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 5, Peter had a great Q&A with the Maryland Student Coalition about the steps he’ll take to combat the student debt crisis. Under his administration, he’ll cancel student debt for those who live, work, and pay taxes in Maryland for 5 years after graduation, so that Maryland becomes a go-to state for young people and all have access to the education they deserve.
Later that evening, he was delighted to speak to El Poder de Ser Mujer in Silver Spring to talk about the steps he’ll take as Governor to empower our minority and women-owned businesses.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 6, Peter had a wonderful time attending the Baltimore Craft Beer Festival. He’s been an unapologetic champion of Maryland’s craft beer industry, and he’ll make sure that these vital small businesses continue to thrive and prosper under his administration.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that evening, he spoke with Prince George’s business leaders about the steps he’ll take to shore up our economy for the 21st century, and create 100,000 new jobs for our working families.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 8, Peter had an excellent time discussing his vision for the future of Maryland at a luncheon in Linthicum Heights. Special thanks to the Maryland Transportation Builders and Materials Association for the invitation!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, he spoke with the Maryland Legislative Latino Caucus to share how he’ll support Maryland’s growing Latino and Hispanic communities as Governor -- including making affordable healthcare more accessible, supporting Latino small business owners and entrepreneurs, and creating a cabinet-level position focused on diversity, equity, and inclusion.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 9, Peter had a great evening with supporters in Olney, where he spoke about the steps I’ll take to make sure that no family is left behind.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 10, Peter joined the The BWI Business Partnership, Inc. for their breakfast in Hanover, and later spoke at the 40th Annual Maryland Tourism and Travel Conference. He spoke about how he’ll leverage BWI airport using successful models from other nation-leading airports to kickstart local economic growth, and facilitate our local business access to outside markets and capital.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 11, Peter joined Fox 45 for a morning interview, where he discussed the transformative steps he’ll take to raise Marylanders’ quality of life.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, he joined DC local legend Coach Butch McAdams to talk on his podcast, In and Out of Sports with Coach Butch Mcadams. Peter was delighted to receive Coach McAdams’ endorsement on his show!
On November 12, our future Lieutenant Governor Monique Anderson Walker attended the groundbreaking celebration for the new Severn Community Center, which will serve as an exciting new location for community events in Anne Arundel County. We were delighted to see friends and endorsers there, like Councilwoman Sarah Lacey and Delegate Heather Bagnall!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, we had an excellent time at the Metro Washington Council AFL-CIO's Evening with Labor in Greenbelt. As Governor, Peter will partner with our union brothers and sisters to build a stronger economy that leaves no one behind. He has a bedrock commitment to family-supporting wages, healthcare, and home ownership for Maryland’s working families, and he’ll deliver by continuing to stand with our unions.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 13, Peter joined the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland, Inc. for their breakfast in Hanover. He was proud to be the first candidate to release a concrete plan outlining his commitment to leveling the social, economic and political playing field for Black Marylanders. As Governor, Peter will partner with the Legislative Black Caucus to lift all of our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, Peter joined his friends, Senator Craig Zucker and Delegate Pam Queen, to knock on doors and speak with voters in Montgomery County. Special thanks to all of the volunteers and supporters who joined us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]On November 15, Peter spoke with Scott E's Blog about his vision to transform Maryland into the leading state in the nation.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/november2021inreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, he headed to Ocean City for the Building Trades Conference, where he spoke about the steps he’ll take to build a stronger economy for our union brothers and sisters.

clean_body: [ Peter, November was another excellent month for Team Franchot, and we’re very excited to share with you our photo recap of everything that Peter Franchot has been up to. To everyone who has joined us, we can’t thank you enough for your support of this campaign. The energy and enthusiasm that you have brought to the campaign trail is a true testament to the growing strength of this inclusive, people-powered movement. If you’ve joined us in the past few weeks, then make sure to keep reading below -- you just might see yourself in one of our photos! If you haven’t had a chance to join us yet, you’ll have ample opportunity to do so in the weeks and months to come as we continue to take this movement to new heights. Will you chip in to help Peter Franchot stay ahead in this competitive race? Starting off our December fundraising period with a groundswell of grassroots donations is precisely the boost we need to make sure we can hit our November fundraising goal. We’re looking to get 100 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight. [] CHIP IN [ you, Team Franchot Here’s our recap of November: On November 2, Peter joined fellow elected officials in Baltimore to honor and remember our former Mayor, former Governor, and former Comptroller, William Donald Schaefer on his 100th Birthday. With more than 50 years spent in public office, Schaefer’s tremendous legacy continues to impact the lives of our citizens today, and his “Do-It-Now” governing philosophy remains an enduring model for results-oriented public service. [ November 3, Peter had an excellent time speaking with voters about his vision for the future of our state at an event in Potomac. [ November 5, Peter had a great Q&A with the Maryland Student Coalition about the steps he’ll take to combat the student debt crisis. Under his administration, he’ll cancel student debt for those who live, work, and pay taxes in Maryland for 5 years after graduation, so that Maryland becomes a go-to state for young people and all have access to the education they deserve. Later that evening, he was delighted to speak to El Poder de Ser Mujer in Silver Spring to talk about the steps he’ll take as Governor to empower our minority and women-owned businesses. [ November 6, Peter had a wonderful time attending the Baltimore Craft Beer Festival. He’s been an unapologetic champion of Maryland’s craft beer industry, and he’ll make sure that these vital small businesses continue to thrive and prosper under his administration. [ that evening, he spoke with Prince George’s business leaders about the steps he’ll take to shore up our economy for the 21st century, and create 100,000 new jobs for our working families. [ November 8, Peter had an excellent time discussing his vision for the future of Maryland at a luncheon in Linthicum Heights. Special thanks to the Maryland Transportation Builders and Materials Association for the invitation! [ that day, he spoke with the Maryland Legislative Latino Caucus to share how he’ll support Maryland’s growing Latino and Hispanic communities as Governor -- including making affordable healthcare more accessible, supporting Latino small business owners and entrepreneurs, and creating a cabinet-level position focused on diversity, equity, and inclusion. [ November 9, Peter had a great evening with supporters in Olney, where he spoke about the steps I’ll take to make sure that no family is left behind. [ November 10, Peter joined the The BWI Business Partnership, Inc. for their breakfast in Hanover, and later spoke at the 40th Annual Maryland Tourism and Travel Conference. He spoke about how he’ll leverage BWI airport using successful models from other nation-leading airports to kickstart local economic growth, and facilitate our local business access to outside markets and capital. [ November 11, Peter joined Fox 45 for a morning interview, where he discussed the transformative steps he’ll take to raise Marylanders’ quality of life. [ that day, he joined DC local legend Coach Butch McAdams to talk on his podcast, In and Out of Sports with Coach Butch Mcadams. Peter was delighted to receive Coach McAdams’ endorsement on his show! On November 12, our future Lieutenant Governor Monique Anderson Walker attended the groundbreaking celebration for the new Severn Community Center, which will serve as an exciting new location for community events in Anne Arundel County. We were delighted to see friends and endorsers there, like Councilwoman Sarah Lacey and Delegate Heather Bagnall! [ that day, we had an excellent time at the Metro Washington Council AFL-CIO's Evening with Labor in Greenbelt. As Governor, Peter will partner with our union brothers and sisters to build a stronger economy that leaves no one behind. He has a bedrock commitment to family-supporting wages, healthcare, and home ownership for Maryland’s working families, and he’ll deliver by continuing to stand with our unions. [ November 13, Peter joined the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland, Inc. for their breakfast in Hanover. He was proud to be the first candidate to release a concrete plan outlining his commitment to leveling the social, economic and political playing field for Black Marylanders. As Governor, Peter will partner with the Legislative Black Caucus to lift all of our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. [ that day, Peter joined his friends, Senator Craig Zucker and Delegate Pam Queen, to knock on doors and speak with voters in Montgomery County. Special thanks to all of the volunteers and supporters who joined us! [ November 15, Peter spoke with Scott E's Blog about his vision to transform Maryland into the leading state in the nation. [ that day, he headed to Ocean City for the Building Trades Conference, where he spoke about the steps he’ll take to build a stronger economy for our union brothers and sisters. [ November 16, Peter and Monique spoke with voters in Chevy Chase about his vision for the future of our state. We had a great turnout at our event, and the enthusiasm we received from the community was truly heartwarming. [ November 20, Peter and Monique joined Delegate Darryl Barnes and Pastor Joseph Gilmore for their Thanksgiving Basket Outreach. They had a truly wonderful time speaking with visitors and handing out turkeys to members of the community. Special thanks to Robert Roberts for the photos. [ November 22, Peter and Monique joined Baltimore Metro Business Leaders for an excellent Meet and Greet, where they spoke about Peter’s plan to kickstart Maryland’s economy and create 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future. [ November 30, Peter rounded out an action-packed month by attending an event with supporters in Glenarden. [] By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer Friends of Peter Franchot P.O. [**_Add your name today if you agree that we need to codify Roe V. | | **THE SUPREME COURT MAY OVERTURN ROE V. WADE**
---
**_The court is contemplating a challenge to a Mississippi law that bans abortions after the 15th week of pregnancy._**

**I'm looking for 273 more fearless fighters to sign this urgent petition before 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to fight back against this unconstitutional attack on reproductive rights.[ Sign my petition now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39299662/319238082/-1386425839?code=jtk243-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ftj4ny-1121-priorities%3Fcode%3Djtk243-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDlmYjZjNi01MjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yh-E3CstB4d4WBIHIejBqtMa0J_CIL0XjbA4KSKcXis=&emci=bac5bf5c-9253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d9fb6c6-5254-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)**

The time to act is now, Peter:

The Supreme Court is dangerously close to upholding a dystopian, backward law that bans abortions after only 15 weeks and overturns Roe v. Wade. And if that happens, they’ll be turning this country back nearly 50 years. They’ll undo so much hard-won progress we've made in the name of reproductive freedom.
We simply cannot sit back and allow this to happen. It is critically urgent that we stand united and speak out firmly against these extremist attacks on bodily autonomy – and you can help by signing my petition. **I'm looking for 273 more signatures by midnight tonight, and it looks like your name is still missing.****[Please, will you sign my petition now to protect Roe v. Wade?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39299664/319238084/-1386425839?code=jtk243-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ftj4ny-1121-priorities%3Fcode%3Djtk243-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDlmYjZjNi01MjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yh-E3CstB4d4WBIHIejBqtMa0J_CIL0XjbA4KSKcXis=&emci=bac5bf5c-9253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d9fb6c6-5254-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)**
I am committed to doing everything in my power to safeguard the health care and reproductive rights of patients across New York and the rest of the nation. I’m standing with the Biden-Harris administration to protect funding for reproductive health care providers across the country, and I’m working to ensure people across the country will have funding to access the reproductive health care they deserve – no matter where they live.

I have always stood up to wealthy and powerful interests who seek to strip power from the vulnerable and the voiceless – and the GOP's blatant attack on reproductive rights is no different. But I know that we're stronger when we fight _together_.
**That's why it's so important you make your voice heard right now, Peter.****[Please, before midnight tonight, add your name to my petition to protect Roe v. Wade and put a stop to this heinous violation of our basic constitutional freedoms. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39299665/319238085/-1386425839?code=jtk243-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ftj4ny-1121-priorities%3Fcode%3Djtk243-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDlmYjZjNi01MjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yh-E3CstB4d4WBIHIejBqtMa0J_CIL0XjbA4KSKcXis=&emci=bac5bf5c-9253-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d9fb6c6-5254-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)**

Thank you for being on this team with me.

Letitia James

Peter: I know that you've heard from me a lot recently about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – but today I have a special story to tell you and I hope you'll take a moment to read it.
If you know anything about Iowa politics, you know that we take our presidential caucuses – and all the festivities leading up to them – very seriously. So, back in 2019, when I had eight Democratic candidates and hundreds of voters attending my Finkenauer Fish Fry event, there was a bit of pressure, to say the least. People were going to be eager to talk politics – and just as eager to eat.
Thankfully, I come from a family that knows the meaning of hard work – and the importance of showing up for each other when we need it.
So when I asked for my mom's help, she was there. **My mom baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes for our guests – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, you name it.** And when she ran out of space to store them in our freezer, she used my dad's pickup truck, the cold weather and some classic Iowan problem-solving to improvise a second freezer to fit them all.
But trust me, 1,000 cupcakes are nothing compared to everything my family has done for me – I wouldn't be where I am today without them. They taught me the value of hard work and the power of a scrappy, passionate team. **That's how I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – and it's how I'm going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley to become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.**
Listen, the numbers are on our side: Nearly two-thirds of voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley. We can win but only with hardworking people like you who care about flipping this seat blue, fighting for working families and protecting our Senate majority. **[That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39303352/319245874/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2ZlYmVmNy01NjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZMCFlCSxMZEedgDnM_Pfxwp12XwePO_mbWXV7J9KXo=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39303353/319245875/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2ZlYmVmNy01NjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZMCFlCSxMZEedgDnM_Pfxwp12XwePO_mbWXV7J9KXo=)

I know that we're going to win this thing – one dollar, or one cupcake, at a time. Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby

name: Eric Gash
subject: This is bigger than just flipping a House seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39306750/319247646/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzRmZTczNi01OTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMz-NIdIjwFS_vTVWHFG3Qsf4XtdAc7bWb3T6D_0Xho=)
Friend,

**In case you haven’t heard, this week we found out we have yet another Republican opponent in NC-14.**

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. body:
Join us tonight for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# * Volunteers Needed*
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-y/)
## * Registration *
### **VOLUNTEER LINK**
[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-j/)
## * Donation *
### **WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT!**
[DONATE TO HELP US WIN!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-t/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-i/) | [ Tweet ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-d/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-li-bljsuy-iduiyhurdd-h/) | [ Forward ](https://gilbertforgovernor.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-iduiyhurdd-E305D3C8-bljsuy-l-k)

# The backlash of failed policy and the Democrat exodus
---
Eighteen (18) Democrats in the House and Senate won't seek re-election, and why would they? Excessive spending, an open southern border, failed foreign policy, and rising crime have stolen the freedom given to us by God. Michael Bennet has done nothing to fight for rights of Coloradans, but has voted 100% of the time with Joe Biden. Perhaps even worse, Bennet votes with socialist Bernie Sanders 97% of the time.
And Coloradans are paying attention. Only 40% of likely voters view Bennet favorably, as reported in the Colorado Sun.
Help me replace Michael Bennet. I will fight for less spending and less taxation so that our economy can recover and thrive once again. Help me stop inflation that is putting a strangle hold on your home budget. Please join our cause and donate today.
Kindly,

Developing countries and those with less funding for public health are pacing behind us in vaccination rates because the information they need to develop and produce effective vaccines is being safeguarded by companies like Pfizer, Moderna, and Johnson & Johnson. **President Biden just called for the waiving of intellectual property rights for COVID-19 vaccines to speed up global vaccination efforts, and I am calling for the same.[Sign on NOW to demand that The World Trade Organization immediately waive patent rights to the COVID vaccine!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39308862/319252865/-1742782886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3N2UwMS01YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJmotFz4WJtpAf61bToLZTawedW6d1CSaaDoKPWB_sA=&emci=e6f20dfd-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea977e01-5b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813)** [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39308867/319252869/-1742782886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3N2UwMS01YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJmotFz4WJtpAf61bToLZTawedW6d1CSaaDoKPWB_sA=&emci=e6f20dfd-9453-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea977e01-5b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) As a physician, I know that you cannot beat a pandemic with an every-man-for-themselves approach. Vaccine inequality has major consequences for all of us. # Defense spending should only go to defense!
---
The U.S. Senate returned to work this week with the job of passing a critical piece of legislation--the annual National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). This typically bi-partisan measure is essential to funding our military and maintaining our national security. It was passed in the House back in September and should have already been voted on by the Senate--but Democrats have focused on out-of-control spending measures instead.
Now that it's in the hands of the Senate, lawmakers have tacked on almost 800 amendments to the bill, most of which are intended to push through other pet projects that have nothing to do with our defense. Additionally, this bill is furthering the radical left agenda by forcing our military to submit to Critical Race Theory training, which threatens the morale of our troops through its divisive nature. AND, a senator from Massachusetts proposes cutting our military budget by $7.6 billion and directing those funds toward climate action.
Our own two Colorado senators have tacked on their own amendment--the marijuana banking bill. None of these amendments have anything to do with our national defense. The NDAA must pass the Senate without pork spending. Our government's responsibility is to protect us from foreign threats, not establish a "woke" military. As the next U.S. Senator from Colorado, I will fight for our nation's best interest and stand against an agenda that's hidden in critical legislation.
Please stand with me be donating today. As little as $25 can make a difference in our cause.
Kindly,

clean_body: CRT should be eliminated from military training | | | | == | | Defense spending should only go to defense! The U.S. Senate returned to work this week with the job of passing a critical piece of legislation--the annual National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). This typically bi-partisan measure is essential to funding our military and maintaining our national security. It was passed in the House back in September and should have already been voted on by the Senate--but Democrats have focused on out-of-control spending measures instead. Now that it's in the hands of the Senate, lawmakers have tacked on almost 800 amendments to the bill, most of which are intended to push through other pet projects that have nothing to do with our defense. Additionally, this bill is furthering the radical left agenda by forcing our military to submit to Critical Race Theory training, which threatens the morale of our troops through its divisive nature. AND, a senator from Massachusetts proposes cutting our military budget by $7.6 billion and directing those funds toward climate action. Our own two Colorado senators have tacked on their own amendment--the marijuana banking bill. None of these amendments have anything to do with our national defense. The NDAA must pass the Senate without pork spending. Our government's responsibility is to protect us from foreign threats, not establish a "woke" military. As the next U.S. Senator from Colorado, I will fight for our nation's best interest and stand against an agenda that's hidden in critical legislation. Please stand with me be donating today. As little as $25 can make a difference in our cause. Kindly, | | | | | == | | | | I need your help. Please donate to our fight so I can stand for you in the U.S. Senate. A quick donation from you goes a long way. Meanwhile, I'll work to make your donation matter. | == | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrage. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive policies of a heartless Biden administration. I need your support today | | | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

| | |
