| Overturning Roe v. Wade would be constitutionally an anomaly. Friend, This week, the Supreme Court heard arguments in one of the most consequential cases about abortion rights in decades, and as it stands, the conservative majority looks poised to side with Mississippi and uphold the state’s 15-week abortion ban. This comes just a few months after we saw the Supreme Court abandon _Roe v. Wade_ 's precedent and vote to allow Texas’ six-week abortion ban. If they once again vote to restrict abortion rights, we’ll likely see a rush of conservative-led states pass similar laws, effectively banning abortion in their states. **This is an all-out attack on _Roe v. Wade_ and we can’t be silent about it.** I deeply believe that reproductive rights are human rights. [_**If you’re with me, then add your name right now to say that Congress and President Biden must act to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39309745/319255344/-1764756217?ms=em_20211203-pet-JD-abortionban-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFmNjY3OS01YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujNfIjxMXv5_AXOEeB4QRGyMWZ4JipWhL7rVzjNusmk=&emci=6a70e962-a953-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0eaf6679-5c54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085) **_[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39309746/319255345/-1764756217?ms=em_20211203-pet-JD-abortionban-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFmNjY3OS01YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujNfIjxMXv5_AXOEeB4QRGyMWZ4JipWhL7rVzjNusmk=&emci=6a70e962-a953-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0eaf6679-5c54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085)_** As a constitutional lawyer, I can say that overturning _Roe v. Wade_ would not only be morally and politically wrong—it would be constitutionally an anomaly. The Supreme Court has rarely, if _ever_ , handed down a ruling that reversed a well-established, existing individual constitutional right, and they shouldn’t start now. Whenever attacks on reproductive rights arise, we see brave women publicly sharing their own deeply personal and sometimes traumatic abortion stories. It shouldn’t take a massive unloading of trauma for politicians to step in and take action. The truth is, it’s on men to speak out, too. And not because we have mothers, or sisters, or daughters, or wives—but because people who can get pregnant are human beings, and **all humans deserve the right to decide when and if they want children.** When I’m elected, I promise to do everything in my power to protect access to abortion, but we need action from our politicians right now. We can’t sit back and allow _Roe v. Wade_ to be overturned. [_**If you agree that Congress and President Biden must act immediately to codify abortion rights into law, then please, add your name right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39309747/319255346/-1764756217?ms=em_20211203-pet-JD-abortionban-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFmNjY3OS01YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujNfIjxMXv5_AXOEeB4QRGyMWZ4JipWhL7rVzjNusmk=&emci=6a70e962-a953-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0eaf6679-5c54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085) Thanks, Jerry **_**_**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39309748/319255347/-2042008336?refcode=em_20211203-pet-JD-abortionban-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFmNjY3OS01YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujNfIjxMXv5_AXOEeB4QRGyMWZ4JipWhL7rVzjNusmk=)**_**_**

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I hate to be the one to tell you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zga77c8ri4o37bpdkk3qb09vaphe130p38hessuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thkmhqj8cjicdobco5j65jbecdichgrfc3hmdg66dbncgrj1or4c9o7ct1mmdjjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjhmiqr1o3ie5j75c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
My team just informed me

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5h8go318t49903mnhk561cvks7p16stcp0mnhkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh2bs)
---

Folks,

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. **[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support my re-election campaign for 2022.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqtf4mb92mupig2ro6vngc2ue4pugdocjva14nog_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh2bs)**
| [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0rlod6kg4l563t6p6rrd475ckiul6m9u8dtoclg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh2bs)
---

**[If you can rush $5, $10, or even $100 so I can fight back, I promise you I won’t forget it.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3cj9nm9i3mbsrse7rdmp1fpaanpkupnti2rtnfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh2bs)**

Your support is the only thing that keeps me in this fight to stop the Socialist Agenda.

Together, we’re going to be able to stop their attacks on our freedom and our Democracy.
[RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu3dmbgeihunt2ti70lcn37jlcuvb3dthd86b54g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh2bs)
---

Thank you for helping me make up ground and fight back against Chuck and the Radical Left.

God Bless,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlkgfpiqr3klttvfknmm452s7l73ha2e9dbg83r8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim8pr4sjh2bs)
Senator John Kennedy

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zan8k52erbqjahrlkg4434kcfq7g1ii66lfje2s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim4oj6cph2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2hh0oudb06lk31793tcs93q3j05dafh67jn35ug_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim4oj6cph2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zisg6iatr6mbk4ls13nf1bb4diklok809o6uerto_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim4oj6cph2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zou81sp3cj371un1f1ci8fk283aijuq5ntifkm9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim4oj6cph2bs)**
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z2qlh29e2g8mt2ccnnr3ckq5gjnifasc2vfqf54g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfbim3tk9iue5os3a7kdfftrmqi2ikr20hrr6ud0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim4oj6cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Roger Marshall
subject: re: the fight against Biden’s vaccine mandates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e3df6832ad85d240/86a5004e670b87dcc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — Yesterday, the U.S. Senate voted on an amendment to defund Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandates. Every single Democrat voted against it. **

---
The amendment failed 48-50, but this fight isn’t over. Next week, we’re going to vote on it again — and as I’ve said before, I will not support ANY effort to fund enforcement of Biden’s mandate. [**Between now and then, we _must_ keep up the pressure. I need as many Kansans and Americans as possible standing with me — will you join me? Chip in now. **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e3df6832ad85d240/ea4fbef7075ce87bc3d6b838967d376c/37973)** ** Together, we can get this done. And together, we will hold any politician who supports Biden’s tyrannical, un-American mandates accountable. This is about protecting our jobs, our economy, and our freedom. That’s a fight worth having. [ **I hope you’ll join me. Please, chip in whatever you can right now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e3df6832ad85d240/2498778eae8846adc3d6b838967d376c/37973)

body:
December 11th and 12th is our team’s official Weekend of Action - we want you to come help us grow the mission with a big weekend of volunteer support!

December 11th and 12th is our team's official Weekend of Action - we want you to come help us grow the mission with a big weekend of volunteer support!
Using the button below, you can sign up to knock on doors and phone bank during a time slot on either day to help us make this weekend of action a huge momentum boost for our grassroots campaign here in Nevada.
If you're able to, sign up to volunteer during a time slot below, and come together with a huge push during a critical time for our mission. If we get enough volunteers during this big weekend, Joe will be well on his way to being the next Governor of Nevada!

Using the button below, you can sign up to knock on doors and phone bank during a time slot on either day to help us make this weekend of action a huge momentum boost for our grassroots campaign here in Nevada. If you're able to, sign up to volunteer during a time slot below, and come together with a huge push during a critical time for our mission. If we get enough volunteers during this big weekend, Joe will be well on his way to being the next Governor of Nevada! | | | == | == | To help get you prepared ahead of time, you can also sign up for an upcoming Volunteer Training. You'll learn everything you need to know about how you can help make history here in Nevada in 2022! body:

Hi Friend, We hope you saw Chelsea’s birthday message from earlier, but we also had more to tell you. To be honest, Chelsea is being too modest about her birthday. Wednesday wasn't just about celebrating another year spent making progress. It was about celebrating how expansive and unique that progress was as a result of Chelsea’s dedication. Public service is not as simple as pressing the right buttons in the right order. It requires patience, foresight, and compassion. Chelsea has all three. We want to tell everyone just how much she has accomplished. Ohio is full of mothers, entrepreneurs, and people with great ideas for our future. That’s why the best possible representative in the Secretary of State’s office is one who is all three. Hi Friend! When the campaign is at full speed, it can be easy to miss that another month has gone by. As we pushed through Election Day and into Thanksgiving, I could barely believe it was already almost December! I’m usually always looking forward to December 1st, when this year, I’m celebrating my birthday. My birthday reminds me of how different this world looks from when I was just another little girl in Ohio, for the good and the bad. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39311275/319258480/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211203birthdaykick_N_CC_OP_4_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkNDUyOS02MTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anyG-1hfJGt4fcyhyRCeV2f11ZqxepFdUJI7bbVg_BE=) On one hand, we’ve made fantastic leaps in science, technology, and human rights. On the other, Republicans continue to push back against our progress and try to limit the potential of Ohio and our people. As a young woman, I knew I wanted to be a part of those positive changes I had witnessed over the years. Now, as a mother and elected official, I can proudly say I am not stepping out of this fight. [**Could we make my birthday about all of us by growing our team’s strength with a donation of $5 or more?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39311276/319258481/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211203birthdaykick_N_CC_OP_4_NG_N_L2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkNDUyOS02MTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anyG-1hfJGt4fcyhyRCeV2f11ZqxepFdUJI7bbVg_BE=) **[CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39311277/319258482/738274465?refcode=EM_FR_211203birthdaykick_N_CC_OP_4_NG_N_B1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkNDUyOS02MTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anyG-1hfJGt4fcyhyRCeV2f11ZqxepFdUJI7bbVg_BE=)** Despite all the jokes around birthdays, I have no worries about getting older. My time and my experience are exactly the reasons I know I should be your next Secretary of State. Today, to me, just marks another successful year of working to make Ohio better. I wanted to end this message with one last request from you. The strength in our movement is our care for one another. **I’ll be using today to spend some extra special time with the people I love - please do the same with yours.** Thank you,

Chelsea Clark | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

body:
Is this one any better?

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58930209:6kKaoNEVN:m:1:3253819041:0CE1D76146C7C22BD618B99C31C8401B:r)

Peter,

I tried my hand at this whole writing thing last week as you may remember. Some of you said it was half-decent, the rest said to keep my day job. But I got a kick out of doing it and have decided to write another poem for Joe Biden.

**[Let me know what you think and chip in if it moves you or if it makes you want to heave.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58930209:6kKaoNEVN:m:1:3253819041:0CE1D76146C7C22BD618B99C31C8401B:r)**

_Roses are Red, the Left loves taxation

A balloon or America? Which has more inflation?

If I could pick one, it'd definitely be the latter

But that's basic common sense which, in Washington, never seems to matter._

name: Maggie for NH
subject: Republicans are laser-focused on Maggie Hassan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks – New Hampshire is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans only have to flip one seat to take back control, and they're laser-focused on Maggie Hassan. Just a few months ago, Mike Pence visited the Granite State to rally the GOP's far-right base saying, **"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire ...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022."** And now he's headed back to headline a New Hampshire Republican fundraising event, raising potentially massive amounts of money to unseat Maggie. But Mike Pence isn't the only Republican focused on New Hampshire. **Mitch McConnell is paying close attention to this race and has promised to spend millions of dollars -- on top of the multiple 6-figure ad buys his allies have already placed -- to flip the Senate red.** McConnell even said Republicans will have a "very good election" in 2022. Having this many attacks at this stage of the campaign is not a good sign, friend. In 2016, Maggie won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. And now, in 2022, polls are showing that it could be even closer. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, we will need as much help as we can get. That is why we're asking for your support today. **[If you can, please consider donating today. Just $5 from everyone who reads this will help us fight back against these relentless attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39311724/319260682/-913685435?refcode=e20211203_attacks&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI2Y2JhZS02MjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETHrdvwnZXJKA5VFvwoOV0rEd8G2V9Lfk53KWoBxl54=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39311725/319260683/-913685435?refcode=e20211203_attacks&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI2Y2JhZS02MjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETHrdvwnZXJKA5VFvwoOV0rEd8G2V9Lfk53KWoBxl54=)

name: Ben Downing
subject: An incredible week
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39312192/319262659/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20211203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDU0YWRhNy02MzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vUBnf9ZzpsSKAAuLn2sRtTsiHxsO1JPxeuR7stXqw=)
Team, It’s been an incredible week for our campaign. We passed our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday — and on Wednesday, Governor Charlie Baker announced that he will not run for a third term. **This changes the game for us and helps our campaign plan our strategy and path to victory. We have to take this opportunity to grow our coalition big enough to take on the challenges ahead.** With only one month until 2022 and the holiday season upon us, now is not the time to slow down or become complacent. While Governor Baker isn’t in this race, there are still others who are weighing their options and looking at our campaign for signs of weakness. Together, we can upend the culture of complacency on Beacon Hill. We have the power to elect leadership that will act with the urgency required to tackle our biggest challenges — leadership that truly represents and works for all 351 communities in Massachusetts. _Thanks to this team, we’re in a unique position to deliver for the Commonwealth in a way that the status quo on Beacon Hill and other candidates in this race are not prepared to do._ Whether you’ve been with us since day 1 or recently joined our coalition, I am grateful to have you on the team. I am here to earn your trust and hopefully your support as we head into the election year. Together, we can build a brighter, more equitable future for our communities. **Together, we can build the Massachusetts we all know is possible.** I look forward to continuing this journey with you. Ben

name: John King
subject: making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Because my ancestors survived, my family is here today. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39312601/319264541/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211203-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=14f945ed-6454-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5NDVlZC02NDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE-WwiXXEZT0E5nr_idIeRhb8biWoFmM2uSOyRTSmMY=)
---
| Peter,

Building a movement for real change may sound like a long shot, but the truth is, my whole life has been about defying the odds. The story of my family is one of breaking barriers, of inequality and struggle, and the generational promise of progress. **Because my ancestors survived, I am here today.**

I live in Silver Spring, Maryland, less than 25 miles from where my great-grandfather, Charles King, and his family were enslaved. I cannot even fathom what they went through, and just one generation later, in 1894, my grandmother was one of the earliest graduates of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. She championed to my family the importance of formal education and of working hard, and the generations who have followed her have taken that guidance to heart.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39312602/319264542/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211203-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=14f945ed-6454-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5NDVlZC02NDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE-WwiXXEZT0E5nr_idIeRhb8biWoFmM2uSOyRTSmMY=)
Having so many people to look up to in my family has been nothing short of an honor. Following their guidance and example, I have dedicated my life to carrying their legacy forward through serving my community with dignity and passion.

They instilled in me that I could do anything, and it is this background that pushed me to run for governor of Maryland. **Now it’s my turn to break barriers: with your support, I would make history as the third African-American ever elected governor in the nation’s history and the first Black governor in Maryland.**

It’s time for people across Maryland — and even across the country — to see leadership that represents our country’s diverse identities.

I am humbled by the opportunity to stand up for those who have too often been ignored, and together we can move Maryland toward a more just future. But to do so, I need the resources to win this race.

[_**Every donation has a direct impact fueling our historic campaign forward, so I’m humbly asking if you can chip in $50, $25, $10 or whatever you can afford today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39312603/319264543/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211203-b-EM&&&&&&&&&&&&amount=25&&&&refcode2=14f945ed-6454-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode2=14f945ed-6454-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5NDVlZC02NDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE-WwiXXEZT0E5nr_idIeRhb8biWoFmM2uSOyRTSmMY=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39312604/319264544/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211203-b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=14f945ed-6454-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGY5NDVlZC02NDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE-WwiXXEZT0E5nr_idIeRhb8biWoFmM2uSOyRTSmMY=)
---
Thank you for learning my story and for supporting my campaign,

John King

clean_body: Because my ancestors survived, my family is here today. | = | Peter, Building a movement for real change may sound like a long shot, but the truth is, my whole life has been about defying the odds. The story of my family is one of breaking barriers, of inequality and struggle, and the generational promise of progress. Because my ancestors survived, I am here today. I live in Silver Spring, Maryland, less than 25 miles from where my great-grandfather, Charles King, and his family were enslaved. I cannot even fathom what they went through, and just one generation later, in 1894, my grandmother was one of the earliest graduates of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. She championed to my family the importance of formal education and of working hard, and the generations who have followed her have taken that guidance to heart. = Having so many people to look up to in my family has been nothing short of an honor. Following their guidance and example, I have dedicated my life to carrying their legacy forward through serving my community with dignity and passion. They instilled in me that I could do anything, and it is this background that pushed me to run for governor of Maryland. Now it’s my turn to break barriers: with your support, I would make history as the third African-American ever elected governor in the nation’s history and the first Black governor in Maryland. It’s time for people across Maryland — and even across the country — to see leadership that represents our country’s diverse identities. I am humbled by the opportunity to stand up for those who have too often been ignored, and together we can move Maryland toward a more just future. But to do so, I need the resources to win this race. = | = Thank you for learning my story and for supporting my campaign, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . | | Derek, In 2018, I was an underdog candidate running against an incumbent Republican Congressman. As a 20-year veteran of the Navy, I’m no stranger to tough fights so I took that challenge head-on. Poll after poll had me down in the run up to Election Day. But we didn’t give up -- and thanks to the hard work of thousands of grassroots Democrats to organize in every corner of the district, we beat the odds and WON by just over two points. But it’s one thing to run as a first-time candidate who’s under the radar -- it’s a completely different story when you’re a Democratic congresswoman defending an R+1 district when Republicans are just five seats away from winning a House majority. Now I’ve been named as a top target for national Republicans, and dark money groups have already launched multiple dishonest attack ads against me. [**We’ll need to fight even harder to defend this seat in 2022 -- so if you’re able to, I’m asking you to chip in a grassroots donation to my campaign. name: Karen Bass
subject: About that goal we had…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hello --

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I have exciting news: our campaign not only reached our November grassroots donor goal -- _**we surpassed it!**_

I want to thank everyone who chipped in last month to help make this possible. Because of you, we are starting December off on the right track and we're immediately putting your hard-earned dollars to work talking to Angelenos.

I'm not the only candidate in this race, so our campaign isn't taking a single moment (or dollar!) for granted. This month, we're growing our coalition and spreading our message across Los Angeles. All of that takes serious resources to fuel voter engagement efforts, so it's important we hit every single goal we set from here on out.

I know we can keep up our campaign's momentum with your support, team. I'm proud to have received the endorsement of many local organizers and leaders, including my friend and colleague Adam Schiff. I'm grateful to have you on this team and I'm counting on you to help us end 2021 strong so we're in the right position heading into the primary next year.

The road ahead won't be easy, but it will be worth it. I know we can make our vision for L.A. a reality if we keep up the pace.

Thank you again, for everything,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Our Future is Bright
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470970?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Our Future is Bright_** Shortly before Thanksgiving, I had the opportunity to speak to the current cohorts of the Lugar Series and the Indiana Leadership Forum. I always enjoy the opportunity to speak to these groups and witness, first hand, the energy and enthusiasm so many Hoosiers have. They want to get involved and make our party, and our entire state, even better.

That motivation and enthusiasm will certainly be put into action in 2022. In fact, just a few days ago, we announced our call to convention for the 2022 Indiana GOP State Convention. Our convention will take place in June of next year. More information on the convention is included below.

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer speaks to the Lugar Series late last month._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **spoke at the 81st Indiana State Police Recruit graduation ceremony where 29 new probationary troopers received their badges and began their Indiana State Police Career. Thank you graduates for stepping up to serve your fellow Hoosiers!
**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb at the Indiana State Police recruit graduation._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Call to Convention**_ Earlier this week, Chairman Kyle Hupfer and State Party Secretary Mary Martin issued a call to convention. The 2022 Indiana Republican State Convention will take place **on Saturday, June 18, 2022 in Indianapolis. **

More information, including details on hotel accommodations, can be found [at this link.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=caa06e0221&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[December 9](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82be20e2b0&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2021 Annual Holiday Luncheon

| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[meets with Mayor Moore in Kokomo](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9c8288ccf7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[attends the National Lt. Governors Association meeting.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=14aa0bcbd8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [promotes new ESA program.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=874cfc7c18&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[announces reelection](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a93b8c2c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan**[is on the road visiting Hoosiers throughout Indiana.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b0b762b4ad&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [is fighting against Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7454725262&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young** [stands up for the rights of the unborn.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2267842381&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun** [pens op-ed against Biden's vaccine mandates.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=119d08f17b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[stands alongside ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e82a5d3b2e&e=1acd9bb3d6)[prolife](http://)[ Americans at the United States Supreme Court.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0264502b2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[demands accountability from federal government workers. ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07cc100740&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [is supporting parental rights in education.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=32e048d95b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [warns about the massive government overreach that is disguised as Biden's "Build Back Better" program.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=45a3083a01&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [wishes Hoosiers a Happy Hanukkah.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf0fcfdc93&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[wants to end surprise medical b](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=51f95b5605&e=1acd9bb3d6)[illing](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=745960cfdb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[tours IBC Advanced Alloys' new expansion](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a1d771772&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Our Future is Bright Shortly before Thanksgiving, I had the opportunity to speak to the current cohorts of the Lugar Series and the Indiana Leadership Forum. I always enjoy the opportunity to speak to these groups and witness, first hand, the energy and enthusiasm so many Hoosiers have. They want to get involved and make our party, and our entire state, even better. That motivation and enthusiasm will certainly be put into action in 2022. In fact, just a few days ago, we announced our call to convention for the 2022 Indiana GOP State Convention. Our convention will take place in June of next year. More information on the convention is included below. Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer speaks to the Lugar Series late last month. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana For All Governor Holcomb spoke at the 81st Indiana State Police Recruit graduation ceremony where 29 new probationary troopers received their badges and began their Indiana State Police Career. Thank you graduates for stepping up to serve your fellow Hoosiers! Photos: Gov. Holcomb at the Indiana State Police recruit graduation. | | | Call to Convention Earlier this week, Chairman Kyle Hupfer and State Party Secretary Mary Martin issued a call to convention. The 2022 Indiana Republican State Convention will take place on Saturday, June 18, 2022 in Indianapolis. More information, including details on hotel accommodations, can be found | | Upcoming Republican Events IFRW Annual Holliday Luncheon : 2021 Annual Holiday Luncheon Adams County GOP Christmas Reception Rush County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. name: Olivia
subject: shocked and disappointed 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Friend,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58926232:65srINEcN:m:1:3299561967:2D14F02E846E563C1385FCB8B4F6EC84:r)
Please choose one of the following options:

---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58926232:65srINEcN:m:1:3299561967:2D14F02E846E563C1385FCB8B4F6EC84:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, you’re one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left’s attacks.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnup-4qqlpo4/)

245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That’s why we’re asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi’s socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnuq-4qqlpo5/)

Patriot, Donald Trump and House Conservatives are watching what you do in this moment: You can ignore this email and give Nancy Pelosi more power in Congress _OR_[**you can RUSH your $17.76 gift to join an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnur-4qqlpo6/)

[**CHIP IN $17.76**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnus-4qqlpo7/)

America’s Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you’ve got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnut-4qqlpo8/)

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

P.S. There are millions of other Trump Patriots who would happily join the 1776 Donor Club. We chose YOU! [**Answer the call**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnuu-4qqlpo9/) or we will have to select the next conservative on our list...

___________________________________________
**
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnuv-4qqlpo0/)

ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. [**Can we count on you to step up?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zu6l-1nnuw-4qqlpo1/)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fauci is absolutely out of control, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)** __ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r) | |
---
Peter, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _ "really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)
__
Peter, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_" I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It's clear all the power has gotten to his head and it's about time we send him home.

**If you 're with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you'll chip in now: [https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that's why he's spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58929900:J54rwNENk:m:1:3253819041:D01A80B3C7E3033BA30D07882A56A6F8:r)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

---
Hey friends, How many people currently in Congress have ever identified as a freelancer or gig worker? **ZERO.** Kind of shocking, right? On the other hand, maybe not so shocking given that our political system is skewed at every level towards the wealthy and people with super-rich-friends. And, to be frank, gig economy workers are not exactly either of those things. I’d know because I used to be one! **Which means that I’m running to be the first freelancer _ever_ in Congress. **[_**Will you chip in $21—the average hourly wage for gig workers right now—to help us bring that perspective to Washington?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39313431/319268373/810955667?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211203freelancer_EG_main_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIwYWU0Zi02YTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuSbCMZaIAnbhLQ4u6FouoUUaf8WCkzFucJFrpxkaw8=) | [Donate $21 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39313432/319268374/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211203freelancer_EG_main_xx_btn&amount=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIwYWU0Zi02YTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuSbCMZaIAnbhLQ4u6FouoUUaf8WCkzFucJFrpxkaw8=)
---
**Did you know that 36%—more than a third!—of the US workforce is part of the gig economy?**
That’s why electing the first freelancer to Congress isn’t just a “cool thing” that we should do. We desperately need people who have real experience working an hourly wage, from paycheck to paycheck with no benefits or stability, because only they fully understand the stress, exhaustion, and frustration that the gig economy often brings with it.
I’m a millennial, which means I came of age and entered the workforce right when the gig economy really started to pick up steam. My first freelance gig was as a script writer and video editor making ads for Democrats. And let me tell you—it is scary! You have to _hustle_ to get work. You’re on your own for healthcare and when your client decides they don’t want to pay you, uh...well...let’s say you have to write some strongly-worded emails.
But that experience ended up being extraordinarily valuable in ways I never could have guessed at the time. Living that uncertainty on a daily basis gave me a deep understanding and respect for people who work those freelance and gig jobs.
**We need more folks in Congress who’ve had a vast array of work experiences—because that’s how we’ll protect workers of all stripes (hint: unions!) and support folks who step up and start small businesses from scratch.**
[_**Can you chip in whatever you’re able to help me be the first freelancer in Congress, where I’ll always fight to protect gig workers?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39313433/319268375/810955667?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211203freelancer_EG_main_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIwYWU0Zi02YTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuSbCMZaIAnbhLQ4u6FouoUUaf8WCkzFucJFrpxkaw8=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Box 1111 11507 Dr Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Mango, FL 33550-9700 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

I’ve been following the Build Back Better Act as it makes its way through Congress. And the more I see, the more important it looks to me that the decision-makers in Washington pass this bill right away.

We need to build a Montana where our people can feel safe from the different economic, environmental, and public health calamities our communities have been experiencing and will continue to experience. I believe the Build Back Better (BBB) legislation helps us build that Montana.

We owe it to the generations before us and the ones that come after to make this historic investment.

If you think it’s vital for Congress to pass Build Back Better before breaking for the holidays, will you join me and show it?

_**[Add your name to my petition to Congress now to show you support passing Building Back Better before the holidays. Our voices are stronger when we speak together.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmhRxBYMPFS2lKOyTiY0dsMFjSZsBzSnpE9D9d1xFzo9gIxI33h2-b33kc-yRN4OWamoW7KOgdpEpDxnP9CEgNym5aJYdovLq7HpRKMzdGQlua7LKTiCJchkz8KfIePrWWNSS7DB_uxsxkwmcDVPeS7ThAG2ztThJlL4hZZIK6J93h5xeOqvUp8x7O-RRPTHDbg9HHHrpe-k9jgX1S-enz-CfE0q7J7rc1UQhpEUSP5ZOFuvFOiTbTBI5U0E4HmuIyNahWf9HSKkEykbYeFk1Ta8EVlLahpf3uxZMwXX5L-j8DurMYg-cnQv__kUSzRoq-GjGtA6eShZRjO2yAHF124mQAzRcKjr3FFM9rlbKK6QrACmyqENZaT5hFAYiyMwNAzlYjeVQtHyQNVCwWQwq1vaYjQoELA5ZRSUVwUxeWlOszGoHDcLijKtlSaNOk49YrcBk_X0Lvt50yo3cfbV4rp3PCFwkXa5aLm-c1C5MKigtSz5_1pd1HxrpqSF0dFyfZaY7KYX8jWHLEtOWqcATLs/3hj/SXsQQBbnQEi74JxqZQOHIw/h1/C2agL5MyZxCSDaqHYUORS_WSj8LWEAeCKQkwtFPPK6A)**_

It’s not radical to believe that if you work a full-time job you should be able to afford a roof over your head, food on the table, and an education for you and your family.

What’s radical is having the power to change it and failing to pass anything.

Our children are being left behind as Montana is one of the only states without pre-k for kids and parents. The BBB will help stabilize lives by bringing pre-k to Montana’s kids both in the cities and rural underserved areas.

Our forests are burning, and our rivers are drying up, threatened by an ever-increasing pace of climate-induced natural disasters. The BBB bill will address Montana’s climate crisis with a focus on equity for Native Americans and rural communities specifically.

Every Montanan individually will benefit from thousands of dollars of direct and indirect investment in their communities — financed by *finally* getting the ultra-rich to pay their fair share.

_**[We need the BBB, and we need it ASAP. Add your name today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmhRxBYMPFS2lKOyTiY0dsMFjSZsBzSnpE9D9d1xFzo9gIxI33h2-b33kc-yRN4OWamoW7KOgdpEpDxnP9CEgNym5aJYdovLq7HpRKMzdGQlua7LKTiCJchkz8KfIePrWWNSS7DB_uxsxkwmcDVPeS7ThAG2ztThJlL4hZZIK6J93h5xeOqvUp8x7O-RRPTHDbg9HHHrpe-k9jgX1S-enz-CfE0q7J7rc1UQhpEUSP5ZOFuvFOiTbTBI5U0E4HmuIyNahWf9HSKkEykbYeFk1Ta8EVlLahpf3uxZMwXX5L-j8DurMYg-cnQv__kUSzRoq8Wz6yZBFwt1q6Gm1KQhP8UdgIit375B6u8a-Fz_HWLH8uLiBsX7XewhugeQIhFIcTLC-_tkyT0178jcu1PU1puS5PvG00KzRQNtYJn1J4riRtgsv5ozS0xnxQTDkbusMVJZfxzCv-ZLnHMbS7mMhbz4bP8feWG6fVAvRrcw_tYiciIKw5ra7kxLLp7GjzYvxZDAr0D_yq18wgfssWSrZIl/3hj/SXsQQBbnQEi74JxqZQOHIw/h2/4KGcbEPjsOJKxmK9qgDiB6ZmZy1Y20L6WvoOCytjv0A)**_

Montana is turning into a playground for out-of-state wealth — just ask the billionaires skiing at the Yellowstone Club. Montana families will be healthier, more prosperous, and safer when billionaires pay their fair share.

Standing with you in this fight,

Tom

| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmhRxBYMPFS2lKOyTiY0dsMFjSZsBzSnpE9D9d1xFzo9gIxI33h2-b33kc-yRN4OWamoW7KOgdpEpDxnP9CEgNym5aJYdovLq7HpRKMzdGQlua7LKTiCJchkz8KfIePrWWNSS7DB_uxsxkwmcDVPeS7ThAG2ztThJlL4hZZIK6J93h5xeOqvUp8x7O-RRPTHDbg9HHHrpe-k9jgX1S-enz-CfE0q7J7rc1UQhpEUSP5ZOFuvFOiTbTBI5U0E4HmuIyNahWf9HSKkEykbYeFk1Ta8EVlLahpf3uxZMwXX5L-j8DurMYg-cnQv__kUSzRoq-TMGswA-ePW614zdxeJ-aXB0Fw4458kmWze0LvdPqbN_9KohzlaNNFvj8YQWHqvapRunRLNeodfbJRRW3j6lgRbKIiHV7t53_dspW76GN-PchqSKrChY3W5FelRS96tdRUjkpjC0GDsDLty1pEBHW49PKvgq6izHu0zu0NJVuHjs0TwUIWLQ5K7cImsWulCOJIUe3hmFew1LRnRJWpPVGS/3hj/SXsQQBbnQEi74JxqZQOHIw/h3/DlvZ9Ccj4dArK8VmXy4xlf6hJ91yGGBL3-Dh-FFi6Dw)

body:
We’d hate for you to miss out on this exciting event
#

Hey friends, exciting news!
We’re hosting a very special grassroots event featuring Malcolm and special guest Gloria Steinem on Tuesday at 2:00 pm EST!
[Look, it’s going to be a blast, so we really hope you join us. Get your ticket now to join Malcolm Kenyatta and Gloria Steinem for our next grassroots fundraiser!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314486/319273127/-1357225661?refcode2=c1d328f5-6b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211203-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMjhmNS02YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0o4kPllOfDkCTg-5kE_4p6K6vYnp5HcCL_SAk7WzSo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314487/319273128/-1357225661?refcode2=c1d328f5-6b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211203-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMjhmNS02YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0o4kPllOfDkCTg-5kE_4p6K6vYnp5HcCL_SAk7WzSo=)
**[GET YOUR TICKET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314488/319273129/-1357225661?refcode2=c1d328f5-6b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211203-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMjhmNS02YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0o4kPllOfDkCTg-5kE_4p6K6vYnp5HcCL_SAk7WzSo=)**
Reproductive rights are on the line in 2022. With Mitch McConnell’s conservative majority on the Supreme Court, Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator must be someone who will take action to abolish the filibuster and codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law.
That someone is Malcolm Kenyatta — and that’s why we’re hosting this special event with Gloria Steinem to talk about the kind of campaign we’re building and why it’s so important for us to bring a big, diverse coalition of grassroots supporters on board.
So we’d hate for you to miss out on this exciting event! Will you join us?
[Don’t wait to get your ticket to our next Team Malcolm virtual grassroots event with Gloria Steinem on Tuesday, December 7 at 2 pm EST!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314489/319273130/-1357225661?refcode2=c1d328f5-6b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211203-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMjhmNS02YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0o4kPllOfDkCTg-5kE_4p6K6vYnp5HcCL_SAk7WzSo=)
**[GET YOUR TICKET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314490/319273131/-1357225661?refcode2=c1d328f5-6b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211203-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMjhmNS02YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0o4kPllOfDkCTg-5kE_4p6K6vYnp5HcCL_SAk7WzSo=)**

Team Malcolm

name: =?utf-8?Q?TinaRamirez.com?=
subject: Sorry we keep sending emails.
body:
But it’s important. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-campaign?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211203_tinaramirezcom_so-many-emails
We get asked all the time: why do you send so many emails? Well Friend, here’s why:

Abigail Spanberger and her D.C. Dark Money Super PACs have poured millions of dollars into our opponent’s campaign war chest. The money they gave her will be used to attack and smear Tina for the rest of the campaign in an attempt to discredit her. They will continue to do whatever they can to keep Spanberger in power.

But to fight back against her campaign mega-donors, our campaign relies on local grassroots supporters. And to engage the core of our campaign, we use our email program for that effort.

More than 25% of our online donations come from email.
We know that we send a lot of emails, but what’s worse: receiving these emails or another 2 years of Abigail Spanberger? This is why we send them.

Please make a contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to keep our campaign going. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-campaign?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211203_tinaramirezcom_so-many-emails)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-campaign?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211203_tinaramirezcom_so-many-emails)

clean_body: But it’s important. | We get asked all the time: why do you send so many emails? Well Friend, here’s why: Abigail Spanberger and her D.C. Dark Money Super PACs have poured millions of dollars into our opponent’s campaign war chest. The money they gave her will be used to attack and smear Tina for the rest of the campaign in an attempt to discredit her. They will continue to do whatever they can to keep Spanberger in power. But to fight back against her campaign mega-donors, our campaign relies on local grassroots supporters. And to engage the core of our campaign, we use our email program for that effort. More than 25% of our online donations come from email. We know that we send a lot of emails, but what’s worse: receiving these emails or another 2 years of Abigail Spanberger? This is why we send them. Please make a contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to keep our campaign going. body:

My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_

**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931332:JxwyvNEyN:m:1:3298722022:EA2F2C6CB5FCAA2489D6A8A87B437F91:r)**

especially in the North State, where folks rely on friends and neighbors for information. |

Friend,

In a moment, we're going to [**ask you to write a letter to the editor**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314914/319275613/-1770769219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU3ZjQzYy02ZjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtSgP03mAsS7NcQ0tUlYY7fmoaBy64jp5jQ2R5T23I4=&emci=7ae7f43c-6f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7ee7f43c-6f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11663292) to support Max's campaign to defeat far-right seditionist Doug LaMalfa. But first, let us tell you why it's so important:

Here's the truth: One of the best ways to get the word out about our campaign is through letters to the editor. When a voter voices their support for Max -- or frustration with LaMalfa -- it's a *strong* signal to voters that Max has a groundswell of grassroots support.

In our humble opinion, letters to the editor beat out fancy television ads any day -- especially in the North State where folks rely on friends and neighbors for information. And if you've opened a local newspaper recently, this should come as no surprise: **Our community is FED UP with Doug LaMalfa and ready to see him go.**

Just take a look at these two highlights:
**"LaMalfa has not served our district well"**
\- Walter B., Chico

**"Doug LaMalfa is part of the problem in Washington and I will do all I can to see that he loses his next election."**
\- Rob D., Chico
The best part about these letters is that they weren't even organized! Imagine what we could do if a bunch of Max's supporters chimed in as well. That's why we're asking:

[**If you live in the district and you're able to write to your local paper, please sign up here to receive more information about writing a letter to the editor. Someone from the campaign will be in touch with next steps.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39314915/319275620/-1770769219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWU3ZjQzYy02ZjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtSgP03mAsS7NcQ0tUlYY7fmoaBy64jp5jQ2R5T23I4=&emci=7ae7f43c-6f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7ee7f43c-6f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11663292)

Thanks in advance,

Team Max HQ

He is a leading CNN political analyst, politician, and author, as well as a close friend and supporter of this campaign.

body:
Freedom is precious.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeuc1qj3o94acpo0bp6l279kidbpmlctvdrq0690_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim9or6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdhcopmbdj6cgrjcd1jmhr65cb269q34phjmlg62ojhcjiecppje5g72dljcmrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjhmiqr9ptiedj3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

Freedom is precious. Even with all the turmoil and injustice we see in the world around us, we still too often take these freedoms for granted.
In our great country, the Constitution serves to safeguard this freedom. Most Americans think they know it well, since they learned about it in school.
But far too few Americans properly understand the Constitution and the freedoms it protects.
Now you can deepen your understanding of this document and its principles in Hillsdale’s most popular online course, **[“Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution”](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zejpfqun31sbgcr9briievcfsnn5ej1s0tpv8vto_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim9or6c3h2bs)**

[Activate your free course now »](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqm0dl7fbqp5s0q3i53tdl2dmeii5sa2culud4e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0slim9or6c3h2bs) I wish you all the best in your future studies. Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

You play a big role in this campaign, so I think it’s important you know the latest on this race: We saw a slump in fundraising last month. _And we get it_ — folks are spending time with their loved ones and shopping for the holidays. Unfortunately our fundraising fell short as a result and with just one month left to go before the midterm election is in full swing, the progress Michael has secured on fighting child poverty, combating climate change, and creating good-paying jobs is on the line. Michael’s opponents have made clear they want to halt the progress he’s made. The National GOP's fundraising has been super-charged to back their final candidate. We have to close the gap in our fundraising to start 2022 on the right foot. That’s why we’re setting a 24-hour goal to close this $15,144 gap. Unfortunately our fundraising fell short as a result and with just one month left to go before the midterm election is in full swing, the progress Michael has secured on fighting child poverty, combating climate change, and creating good-paying jobs is on the line. Michael’s opponents have made clear they want to halt the progress he’s made. The National GOP's fundraising has been super-charged to back their final candidate. We have to close the gap in our fundraising to start 2022 on the right foot. That’s why we’re setting a 24-hour goal to close this $15,144 gap. Michael’s work to strengthen our economy and democracy impacts families in Colorado and nationwide. So, we’re asking just 5 supporters from Monroe County to pitch in before our 24-hour deadline. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. With your help, we can build the power we need to take on the National GOP and all of Michael’s Republican opponents. Chip in $10 now to be one of those 5 donors from Monroe County and help us meet our 24 hour goal. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I’ve seen this grassroots team step up in critical moments many times before, so I know we’ll close this gap in no time. Thanks for all your hard work, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| Elise Stefanik has shown she’s not a responsible leader. It’s clear she’s more interested in amassing power and money than she is in representing our community. And even more than that, as Chair of the House Republican Conference, she’s failed to hold her caucus accountable as they spew hateful rhetoric.

Just two weeks ago, Lauren Boebert used awful, Islamophobic language targeting one of her Democratic colleagues. Before that, Paul Gosar tweeted a video depicting him killing another member of Congress. This kind of vile, hateful language has no place in our country. Those who use it must be held accountable – and elected officials are no exception to that rule. And yet, Stefanik has failed to keep her caucus in check and voted against censuring Gosar.

I know as well as you do that we need new, honorable leadership here in Upstate New York, which is a major reason why I’m running to represent us in Congress. body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_

**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931314:JnqR-NENO:m:1:3253819041:8A48CB09CD1F0B896BBD782CEA67A908:r)**

President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning

**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931314:JnqR-NENO:m:1:3253819041:8A48CB09CD1F0B896BBD782CEA67A908:r)

body:
| Some early gifts (of free training!)...🎁❤️
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..aUkM1-iWIiGjD-Y3BCj9BKJUCUuSO1s4sVoXc7Mk5wQ)

## **🎅**** _Here come VLTs, here come VLTs_****🎅**
## **_On your laptop screen!_**
## **_We’re kicking off December with the gift that keeps on giving.... knowledge from our trainers and experts!_**

Join these extra special virtual live training (VLTs) before the holidays!

* * *

[**Kelly Q &A: Your 2022 Political Forecast**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEyMDMyMV90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.J4G1faeOqHvDxJCHrUVasTD6LC9-3tLSMZnHNpKfFWg)
**Thursday, December 9, 1pm ET** Join us for this exciting Q&A with NDTC’s Founder and CEO Kelly Dietrich _and_ NDTC’s Political Director Anthony Robinson! 2022 is on everyone’s minds. So get a head start on the issues and factors that will affect the political landscape heading into the midterms. This is a Q&A event, so prepare to engage actively and bring questions!
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEyMDMyMV90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.J4G1faeOqHvDxJCHrUVasTD6LC9-3tLSMZnHNpKfFWg)
---

* * *

[**What is a Democratic Precinct Chair?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xXtPzSPx1MSRkCQfIOaRF6pSBLYy0jbchZonzsOnjjI)
**Monday, December 6, 1pm ET**
Want to get involved in your community’s Democratic leadership? Wondering what a precinct chair does? Or even is?
We’ll show you! This training will tell you all you need to know about becoming a precinct chair and the vital role they play in Democratic politics.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xXtPzSPx1MSRkCQfIOaRF6pSBLYy0jbchZonzsOnjjI)
---

* * *

[**Managing Your Progressive Job Search**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nGWvAvB3KuPqbcLklSjVOVrjmRgXd42NRlAP0cVArnc)
**Tuesday, December 7, 1pm ET**
Trust us, we know how tiring finding a job can be.
Join a job-searching expert and fellow job-seeking Democrats this Tuesday to maximize your job search efforts and ensure you find the job best fit for you. ✅
Our trainers have been through every step of the progressive career path, so no matter the stage in your career, you’ll learn something new that you can use to score that dream career.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nGWvAvB3KuPqbcLklSjVOVrjmRgXd42NRlAP0cVArnc)
---

* * *

[**Networking for Early Career Professionals**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GFZ3agnNqnL-20NGyVf0Z5QYA-f4-OiFcRIzoWr2GZM)
**Friday, December 10, 1pm ET**
A strong network creates a solid foundation that will support you for the rest of your career!
But how do you get started and make those connections?
Our expert trainers will walk you through building a solid network and maximizing and deepening those important relationships. Whether you just graduated or are years into your career, don’t miss this!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GFZ3agnNqnL-20NGyVf0Z5QYA-f4-OiFcRIzoWr2GZM)
---

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: The GOP is trying to silence us, we’re not going to let that happen.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Free and fair elections in North Carolina are under attack with the GOP’s
newest racial gerrymandering.

Erica entered this House race to protect and advocate for voices that the
GOP is attempting to silence. Our Congressional district used to be a
safely Democratic district. Now Republicans have turned this into a swing
district and a battleground in determining control of the U.S. House.

Just look at the new 2022 House map:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29139?t=1001&akid=664%2E3698%2EEz4SnE ][IMG]

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29139?t=1002&akid=664%2E3698%2EEz4SnE ]Can you rush a $5 donation to our campaign right now?
It’s absolutely critical that we elect Erica Smith and keep our razor thin
Democratic majority in 2022.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29145?refcode=em20211203-664&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=664%2E3698%2EEz4SnE ]Donate $5

Erica has run in a racially gerrymandered district before and won. She’s
never lost an election in the district and has represented over half these
counties in the state senate. Betting on Erica is betting on a winning
candidate. We can’t afford to take chances in 2022.

We must not let Republicans get away with their attempts at rigging the
2022 election. And that means putting up a strong Democratic candidate who
can win against dirty Republican attacks and strategies. Bold, progressive
policies like universal healthcare, a higher minimum wage, and more are
hanging in the balance.

Your donation to our campaign today will give our scrappy, grassroots
campaign the resources we need to fight back against disenfranchisement

body:
While Nancy is busy picking fights on Twitter, people in South Carolina are struggling with real issues.

| While Nancy Mace is busy picking fights on Twitter, people in South Carolina are struggling with real issues. Just like you, Annie is tired of the immature, ineffective leadership coming from Mace — that’s why she’s running to defeat her.

[Can Annie count on you to join her in becoming a Digital Endorser to prove the people want real leadership in Congress? We still need 291 more supporters to add their names:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316202/319284833/74806484?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211203_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=3pfaQP52soT7K%2FnoIiCJ11F6i6Tje2YEl6QzSLvNCTRkYJOwYnqVgzfb8Pkxx94f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNiMWY0OC03NTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvSfH8e_BWfShPbfZJRi7MWynuZYgcw6oibw-EU7WT0=&emci=d1276b41-7554-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=01cb1f48-7554-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

* * *
_Original Message from Dr. Annie Andrews:_

I’m so grateful for the outpouring of grassroots support we saw ahead of our first budget deadline this week, and I’m so glad you’re on our team to defeat Nancy Mace and bring real, rational leadership to Congress.

Amid rising concerns about a new COVID variant and yet another tragic school shooting in Michigan, I wish I could say Mace spoke out this week to protect Lowcountry kids and families.

**Instead, she engaged in a childish Twitter spat with Marjorie Taylor Greene, engaging in self-absorbed showmanship and ignoring the very real problems threatening our community.**

Great to speak to the Forsyth County Tea Party this week! We're seeing it across all of Georgia — Republicans are fired up and ready to take back this U.S. Senate seat next year. Enjoyed catching up with my friends Rep. Sheri Gilligan and Rep. Lauren McDonald. Grateful for their support and their service to our state.
---
---
# **_Biden Mandates Halted!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/74a74c0864cc4aafc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
This week, a federal court blocked two more of Joe Biden's unlawful vaccine mandates — one for healthcare workers and one involving federal contractors. This is a direct result of the legal pressure we've applied. The fight is far from over, and you have my word I will continue to stand strong against this federal overreach in the U.S. Senate. [**Read more here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/26eea9c57fa06d43c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Standing For Life_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/222db1a6f6b879cfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
This week, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments regarding the pro-life law in Mississippi, which could lead to the end of Roe v. Wade. Next year, Georgia has an opportunity to elect a senator who values all life. We must not fall short in this effort.
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/441358bc40e5eebfc3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/c593592903c9a138c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/7e8d6cabf5330195c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! As mentioned above, the clock is ticking on 2021 and it's vital that we end the year with as strong of a showing as possible. [**If you're able to contribute, I hope you'll do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/41fadb3d31062813c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/9b7779d68415ecc0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[ **DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/37d12d88ac4522fec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[ **DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/54b7852e1bb4aef4/022148665b8b0b68c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
