body:
|
---
| | **Join Rick on a crucial initiative: he believes it is time to abolish the debt ceiling, which has become a weapon against common sense and smart financial planning.** Republicans are threatening to default on our financial obligations, an absolutely ludicrous idea. America will not declare bankruptcy. Not only that, but their political position is outrageous and hypocritical—they are the ones who busted things wide open with their gigantic Trump tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations. Rick firmly believes that we need to do what is best for America and show the world that we will protect the full faith and credit of the United States of America. **[Tell Congress to stop playing high-stakes games with Americans' lives: read Rick's note below and then sign our petition urging Congress to end the debt ceiling for good.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316769/319287099/-1090813702?contactdata=oZWxO40W6R%2F7P7jSfY87hgj0OPaL5ZWPeZ%2Blr%2FA6knsTMqRKqPbK6f6yKh5bdRrADnRNLwMlBw4raXGKCU2Fnwr3Xi9KBhlq49TyB2g%2FUVtqSF1wpWXsvs%2BCsZxwa5hkg2LGxtfggj1sMFwyaiBlKw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhNzUwMy03ODU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBnkiN5s5vBHJFU86aFn5csLOdwSnatH3C3yu6UzaeI=&emci=6a37a3de-ac4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b0a7503-7854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239)** **_Delaney Hewitt_**
**_Team Larsen_** Forwarded Message [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316770/319287100/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhNzUwMy03ODU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBnkiN5s5vBHJFU86aFn5csLOdwSnatH3C3yu6UzaeI=&emci=6a37a3de-ac4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b0a7503-7854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239) **The debt ceiling needs to be eliminated.** Politicians have been weaponizing the debt ceiling as long as it has existed, and it is wrong. This has been especially true in the time after Donald Trump's presidency, where we saw tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans that piled up debt—and then that same debt used as a reason to deny assistance to our most vulnerable communities. Join me and a coalition of my colleagues, community leaders, and grassroots activists to take on this challenge. **[Sign the petition: urge Congress to end the debt ceiling.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316771/319287101/-1090813702?contactdata=oZWxO40W6R%2F7P7jSfY87hgj0OPaL5ZWPeZ%2Blr%2FA6knsTMqRKqPbK6f6yKh5bdRrADnRNLwMlBw4raXGKCU2Fnwr3Xi9KBhlq49TyB2g%2FUVtqSF1wpWXsvs%2BCsZxwa5hkg2LGxtfggj1sMFwyaiBlKw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhNzUwMy03ODU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBnkiN5s5vBHJFU86aFn5csLOdwSnatH3C3yu6UzaeI=&emci=6a37a3de-ac4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b0a7503-7854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239)** [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316772/319287108/-1090813702?contactdata=oZWxO40W6R%2F7P7jSfY87hgj0OPaL5ZWPeZ%2Blr%2FA6knsTMqRKqPbK6f6yKh5bdRrADnRNLwMlBw4raXGKCU2Fnwr3Xi9KBhlq49TyB2g%2FUVtqSF1wpWXsvs%2BCsZxwa5hkg2LGxtfggj1sMFwyaiBlKw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhNzUwMy03ODU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBnkiN5s5vBHJFU86aFn5csLOdwSnatH3C3yu6UzaeI=&emci=6a37a3de-ac4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b0a7503-7854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239) It does not have to be this way. **Congress created the debt ceiling; Congress can abolish it.** Abolish it? Yes. After all, once Congress accrues debt—good, bad, or otherwise—it is Congress's responsibility to make the payments on the debt. Consider this: If your family racked up debt and then refused to make the payments on that debt, what would happen? Your assets would be seized and you would be forced into bankruptcy. **America will not declare bankruptcy. So let's end the political games around the debt ceiling.** I want us to be the coalition that _finally_ brings common sense and urgency to this discussion. We need to do what is best for America and show the world that we will protect the full faith and credit of the United States of America. We must stop playing high-stakes games with Americans' lives. **[Please sign the petition. Urge Congress to eliminate the debt ceiling permanently.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316773/319287115/-1090813702?contactdata=oZWxO40W6R%2F7P7jSfY87hgj0OPaL5ZWPeZ%2Blr%2FA6knsTMqRKqPbK6f6yKh5bdRrADnRNLwMlBw4raXGKCU2Fnwr3Xi9KBhlq49TyB2g%2FUVtqSF1wpWXsvs%2BCsZxwa5hkg2LGxtfggj1sMFwyaiBlKw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhNzUwMy03ODU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBnkiN5s5vBHJFU86aFn5csLOdwSnatH3C3yu6UzaeI=&emci=6a37a3de-ac4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b0a7503-7854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239)** clean_body: | | | Join Rick on a crucial initiative: he believes it is time to abolish the debt ceiling, which has become a weapon against common sense and smart financial planning. Republicans are threatening to default on our financial obligations, an absolutely ludicrous idea. America will not declare bankruptcy. Not only that, but their political position is outrageous and hypocritical—they are the ones who busted things wide open with their gigantic Trump tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations. Rick firmly believes that we need to do what is best for America and show the world that we will protect the full faith and credit of the United States of America. Delaney Hewitt Team Larsen Forwarded Message The debt ceiling needs to be eliminated. Politicians have been weaponizing the debt ceiling as long as it has existed, and it is wrong. This has been especially true in the time after Donald Trump's presidency, where we saw tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans that piled up debt—and then that same debt used as a reason to deny assistance to our most vulnerable communities. Join me and a coalition of my colleagues, community leaders, and grassroots activists to take on this challenge. It does not have to be this way. Congress created the debt ceiling; Congress can abolish it. Abolish it? Yes. After all, once Congress accrues debt—good, bad, or otherwise—it is Congress's responsibility to make the payments on the debt. Consider this: If your family racked up debt and then refused to make the payments on that debt, what would happen? Your assets would be seized and you would be forced into bankruptcy. America will not declare bankruptcy. So let's end the political games around the debt ceiling. I want us to be the coalition that finally brings common sense and urgency to this discussion. We need to do what is best for America and show the world that we will protect the full faith and credit of the United States of America. We must stop playing high-stakes games with Americans' lives. body:
Friends —

Every once in a while, we ask some of Sarah’s most active supporters to share the top three issues they care about most. The feedback we receive helps us know what your priorities are and how they shift over time. So, as we head into the last few weeks of the year, your response to our final issues survey will be the most important yet.

Sarah wants to hear directly from you about where you stand on the issues, and we're looking for a lot of responses today. **[Can you take two minutes to add yours by completing our survey? We hope you’ll share your thoughts, and we’ll review the results as we head into the new year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316860/319287670/-1266625000?ms=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=AE1AI2wIWCECzbK%2FTLFuxBFyKVRzn0QrfZFNh5LrTjmsai7gXz%2BaKjZf7Q3ympzwpxn8yRMh9YnjIsa3SPc4yHIBGBFs5u9SbZtbSY1M9RV9b1tZyg43y8xgY49ULzHhi3JN1XjnipzHYIFdoH%2BzMkdiJ25ax7mdbuZAuP8EmFQ%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkwYjk1Ni03OTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbC2iFn3idb-hl2-eQYIBO5QPhCYmQl7DJCF9jWXQy0=&emci=709787ae-6754-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a790b956-7954-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18659593)**

She's been driving all across Wisconsin to meet voters where they're at, listen to their concerns, ask how she can help, and make a commitment to fight for their interests in Washington.

You see, there's no such thing as an "off-year" when you’re running against a senator like Ron Johnson. That’s why Sarah is putting in the work right now, and in a few weeks, we’ll hit the ground running in the so-called “on-year.” In fact, your feedback will help our campaign make smarter decisions when we ramp up our operations then.

So, as we continue to build out our campaign agenda through the end of the year, it's important that Sarah hears directly from you about what you care about most.

**[Please take two minutes to share your thoughts in our issues survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39316862/319287685/-1266625000?ms=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211203_EOYSur_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=AE1AI2wIWCECzbK%2FTLFuxBFyKVRzn0QrfZFNh5LrTjmsai7gXz%2BaKjZf7Q3ympzwpxn8yRMh9YnjIsa3SPc4yHIBGBFs5u9SbZtbSY1M9RV9b1tZyg43y8xgY49ULzHhi3JN1XjnipzHYIFdoH%2BzMkdiJ25ax7mdbuZAuP8EmFQ%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkwYjk1Ni03OTU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbC2iFn3idb-hl2-eQYIBO5QPhCYmQl7DJCF9jWXQy0=&emci=709787ae-6754-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a790b956-7954-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18659593)**

Whether it's lowering health care costs, protecting reproductive freedom, fighting for paid family leave, tackling the climate crisis, or anything else, Sarah wants to know your top priorities. That’s what this campaign is all about, and she'll be ready to fight for you and your interests on day one in the U.S. Senate.

Thanks for weighing in. Your feedback is important to our campaign.

— Team Sarah

name: Dr. Oz
subject: No More Carnage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
Biden failed, and left us with so little.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931404:JwbkHNE-N:m:1:3253819041:374D8F1AFE8AADF747B95E5D4E10FF94:r)
---

Fellow Americans,

_The collapse and carnage that is unfolding abroad and at our border is a true glimpse into the unmitigated disaster of Joe Biden and his administration._

I was heartbroken and disgusted by the Biden administration's reckless departure from Afghanistan that left Americans behind. Our people deserve better. _[**Join my campaign to bring back strong leadership to America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931404:JwbkHNE-N:m:1:3253819041:374D8F1AFE8AADF747B95E5D4E10FF94:r)_

As a medical student at the Philadelphia VA hospital where I worked with veterans, I witnessed first-hand the sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform.

While I supported leaving Afghanistan, I believe President Biden displayed an utter dereliction of duty by surrendering to the Taliban. _The tragedy that ensued will weigh on our shoulders for years to come._

On the homefront, Biden has failed us as well: the surge of undocumented migrants crossing the Border has not slowed down since he has taken office. _**[Pitch in here to secure our border and put Americans first once again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931404:JwbkHNE-N:m:1:3253819041:374D8F1AFE8AADF747B95E5D4E10FF94:r)**_

If left unchecked, this will not only become an economic disaster but a complete humanitarian catastrophe. _**[Americans can not endure another catastrophe of this magnitude.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931404:JwbkHNE-N:m:1:3253819041:374D8F1AFE8AADF747B95E5D4E10FF94:r)**_

**As Commander in Chief of the United States, Joe Biden has failed us.

Such a display of weakness on the world stage would not have happened under President Trump's leadership.**

I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer. His failures go far beyond political partisanship. Joe Biden's sickening actions should outrage every patriotic American. The U.S. is supposed to be a defender of democracy and a protector of its allies.

This administration is out of touch with the American people -- and we are sick of it.

As Pennsylvania's Senator, I will always put the people FIRST.

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931404:JwbkHNE-N:m:1:3253819041:374D8F1AFE8AADF747B95E5D4E10FF94:r)
Dr. Oz

* * *
_Dr. Oz is a Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you.**[Donate $25 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931405:JwbkHNE-N:m:1:3253819041:374D8F1AFE8AADF747B95E5D4E10FF94:r)** to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania's next Senator._
* * *
| Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 12/3 Newsletter
body:
I recently had the privilege to stay overnight with Pastor Corey Brooks who is spending 100 days living outdoors on top of some freight containers, as part of a fundraising effort to raise money for a community center in Woodlawn.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_3_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_3_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- I recently had the privilege to stay overnight with Pastor Corey Brooks who is spending 100 days living outdoors on top of some freight containers, as part of a fundraising effort to raise money for a community center in Woodlawn. Pastor Brooks has a heart for service, and he cares deeply about people. He does not just talk about doing something to help people, he takes action. The world needs more servant leaders like Corey Brooks. Obviously, most of us cannot spend 100 days living outdoors to make a difference, but there are ways we can get involved and be a force for good. We can get involved in charitable endeavors. We can volunteer our time and talents to community organizations. We can donate money to worthwhile causes. If everyone did this, the world would indeed be a better place. Spending time with Corey Brooks was time well-spent. I learned a great deal about what it truly means to be a servant of the people. His commitment to helping his community is inspiring. It made me even more determined to win this election and serve the people of Illinois as their next Governor. I want to be the kind of leader our state desperately needs, but I need your help. Please consider getting involved in our campaign. Visit [https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_3_newsletter&n=3) today to learn how. Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_3_newsletter&n=4 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_3_newsletter&n=4)

---
### Illinois: Home of Unbalanced Budgets
A Pew Charitable Trusts report found that Illinois was one of eight states to spend more than long-term revenue allowed.
The report found the State of Illinois failed to garner enough revenues between Fiscal Year 2005 and Fiscal Year 2019 (the last Fiscal Year before the pandemic) to reconcile state spending during that time. In fact, total revenues represented about 94 percent of state spending, meaning the state spent 6 percent above actual revenues. To what extent the balance sheet is any better is a reflection of the federal influx of cash not Illinois’ fiscal management.
We are constantly told that Illinois needs to raise taxes to pay its bills, but the truth is we will never balance the budget if we don’t get spending under control. It is an affront to taxpayers to tell them they need to pay more when the state continues to live beyond its means. We need new leadership to get our finances back on track because the federal money train will not last forever.
### Governor Signs Sham Partisan Map Into Law
Last week the Governor signed the Congressional map into law despite the campaign promises he made in 2018 to refuse to sign a partisan map. Here is the statement I sent out on the Governor signing the Congressional map into law.
“The congressional map is nothing but a partisan sham and JB Pritzker lied to Illinois voters when he said he would not support a gerrymandered Congressional map. JB Pritzker will always put his political party ahead of the interests of Illinois citizens and he simply can't be trusted. It’s time for new leadership in Illinois.”
### Inflation Impacting Christmas Shopping
Retailers depend on robust holiday sales to balance their books and end the year strong, but this year inflation and other financial concerns may limit holiday shopping.
According to a recent WalletHub survey, one in four respondents say they will forego shopping altogether and many of those who do plan to shop for Christmas say they will spend less than they normally do. Welcome to the Biden/Pritzker economy. Far-left policies are taking its toll on working families. We need a change in leadership, and we need it now.
* * *

clean_body: I recently had the privilege to stay overnight with Pastor Corey Brooks who is spending 100 days living outdoors on top of some freight containers, as part of a fundraising effort to raise money for a community center in Woodlawn. | | | ---|---|--- Dear Peter -- I recently had the privilege to stay overnight with Pastor Corey Brooks who is spending 100 days living outdoors on top of some freight containers, as part of a fundraising effort to raise money for a community center in Woodlawn. Pastor Brooks has a heart for service, and he cares deeply about people. He does not just talk about doing something to help people, he takes action. The world needs more servant leaders like Corey Brooks. Obviously, most of us cannot spend 100 days living outdoors to make a difference, but there are ways we can get involved and be a force for good. We can get involved in charitable endeavors. We can volunteer our time and talents to community organizations. We can donate money to worthwhile causes. If everyone did this, the world would indeed be a better place. Spending time with Corey Brooks was time well-spent. I learned a great deal about what it truly means to be a servant of the people. His commitment to helping his community is inspiring. It made me even more determined to win this election and serve the people of Illinois as their next Governor. I want to be the kind of leader our state desperately needs, but I need your help. name: John Fetterman
subject: Bad news re: Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Dr. Oz just jumped into our race. Now he’s putting at least $1.2 million of his own cash into TV ads.
#
Derek,
Not even two days after launching his campaign, Dr. Oz just booked $1.2 million (at least) in TV ads to try to buy this Senate seat. With a reported net worth of $100 million, Oz can spend virtually unlimited sums to keep Pennsylvania Red. 🔴
**This is a pivotal moment for our campaign, Derek. I *truly* believe that how we respond to this could make or break us.** We’ve got two options:
1. We either stand by while this celeb pseudoscientist buys his way into the U.S. Senate — where he’ll have an even _bigger_ stage to push right-wing policies and COVID conspiracies.

**\- OR -**

2. We raise up a grassroots army so freaking big that we can match him dollar-for-dollar, flip PA blue, and send a true Pennsylvania fighter for working people to the Senate.

[**_What do you say, Derek? Can I get you to donate $5 now to help us fight back against this $1.2 million TV ad onslaught from Dr. Oz? Every bit helps._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37902?refcode=em20211203-3689&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3689%2E434096%2EmLrYqF)
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37902?refcode=em20211203-3689&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3689%2E434096%2EmLrYqF)**
The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz.
Yes, he’s a celebrity doctor.
Yes, he’s spent the last decade profiting off of provably false obscure medical theories and conspiracies.
Yeah, his home isn’t even in Pennsylvania ... it’s in New Jersey.
**But, we know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated.** His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016.
With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to win not only the Republican nomination, but the whole damn thing.
**The good news is we have been preparing for this very moment.** We have — by far — the biggest grassroots campaign in the state. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why I’m asking you right now...
[**_Please make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s six-figure TV ad onslaught. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that we all do it together._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37902?refcode=em20211203-3689&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3689%2E434096%2EmLrYqF)
Oz is a big threat. But he’s no match for our movement. 💪💪💪
Let’s win this thing,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211203-3689-footer&t=22&refcode2=3689_434096_mLrYqF&akid=3689%2E434096%2EmLrYqF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3689%2E434096%2EmLrYqF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3689%2E434096%2EmLrYqF)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s coming down to this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

It’s coming down to this,
Peter.

With less than 75 days until early voting starts in Jessica Cisneros’
primary election against Henry Cuellar, it’s all about climate change and
Big Oil.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85574?refcode=em20211203-20796&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b ]Washington Post headline reads Another Texas House primary showdown is
coming, and it's all about climate policy and Big Oil donations

This primary is clear: Jessica, a Green New Deal champion vs. Cuellar, Big
Oil’s best friend. Jessica will fight for a Green New Deal, while Henry
Cuellar continues to collect fossil fuel money and oppose bold action on
climate change.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85574?refcode=em20211203-20796&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b ]Can you support Justice Democrats right now to help us elect Jessica?
Our work relies on your support to defeat corporate incumbents like
Cuellar and transform the Democratic Party.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85574?refcode=em20211203-20796&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b ]Contribute

We’re doing everything we can to support Jessica’s campaign to bring
progressive representation to Texas’ 28th Congressional District. Cuellar
has spent years protecting the worst special interests in America — from
Big Oil and private prisons to Wall Street and Big Pharma.

Now is the time to defeat Cuellar and continue growing our progressive
force in Congress. With so little time before early voting starts, it’s
critical that we have the resources to defeat Cuellar right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85574?refcode=em20211203-20796&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b ]So, can you chip in to fuel our work to elect Jessica, a Green New
Deal champion? Congress has enough Republicans backing Big Oil, we don’t
need Democrats like Cuellar supporting the fossil fuel industry too.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211203-20796-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20796_1203867_tPJq2b&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=20796%2E1203867%2EtPJq2b

Knoxville, TN 37932

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: High gas prices?! Blame Biden!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Need to send him a message! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b2d194574d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Let's face it: Joe Biden is a screw-up.

_This guy can't do anything right. He screwed up Afghanistan, screwed up COVID response, screwing up the economy. And now, he's intentionally giving us higher gas prices._

Joe Biden hates America and hates Americans. That's the only way to put it. It's time to put a stop to him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a5a91d7f94&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, in a string Republican year, we are going to flip it to Red!**

It will be a strong Republican year in 2022, particularly in the Red-trending Free State of Florida, because of boneheaded Biden policies like hiking the price of gas.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9e05c1cf1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The slavish Leftist devotion to climate alarmism is to blame for this. Biden lacks the mental capacity to stand up to the extremist Socialists.

The Socialists and crazy Left WANTS higher gas prices. They think that this will result in lower emissions.

Biden's extremist Energy Secretary, the woefully inept Jennifer Granholm, touts energy price hikes:

_U.S. Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm laughed at the nation’s high gas prices on Friday when asked about the administration’s strategy to ramp up supply to meet demand.

“[In] Sturgis, Michigan, it is $2.89 a gallon. I guess that’s better than in California,” said Bloomberg Host Tom Keene as gas prices reach all-time highs on the West Coast. “What is the Granholm plan to increase oil production in America?”

“That is hilarious,” Granholm said, throwing her head back with laughter as Americans cope with rising prices at the pump compounded by inflation._

In reality, the only thing this will ensure is inflation and poverty and misery. The Washington Examiner reports:

_Granholm also addressed the likelihood that Americans will be paying higher home utility bills over the winter, and resorted to another set of blame-shifting talking points on that subject, saying "We have the same problem in fuels that the supply chains have, which is that the oil and gas companies are not flipping the switch as quickly as the demand requires."

What an extraordinary statement that is, given the ongoing efforts by Granholm and the rest of the Biden administration to inhibit the ability of the domestic oil and gas industry to get its business done in this country. From cancelling major pipeline projects via executive order to refusing to schedule and hold court-ordered federal lease sales to the implementation of an array of onerous new regulations at the Interior Department and the EPA, this administration been waging war on the U.S. oil industry since literally the day it took office._

When the Biden regime declared war on oil and gas, it declared war on ordinary Americans. It declared war on the American economy.

Higher gas prices were the start of high milk prices, higher meat prices, and others.

_**It's time to blame Biden for what he has done. It's time to send him a clear, loud message that we don't accept his sabotage of America!**_

subject: Liz Cheney tries to lay trap for President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Stop Lyin Liz |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5ffb0aae4d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Arizona Representative leading the way in election integrity: from pioneering the Maricopa audit to developing world-class watermarks and security systems to verify and solidify ballot-integrity, I fight every day to make sure our elections are protected.
---
|
---
| **This is why I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona. We desperately need our elections cleaned up. I am a six-sigma process engineer – I know how to get this job done.**

_[You can support my campaign here. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a5fc7c3b52&e=44b8c466b0) Right now, we are fighting back against the media that is silencing our movement. Every dollar helps tremendously._

President Trump just put out a challenge...
---
|
---
| _“It’s really interesting, everybody wants me on television, I get the highest ratings by far, they need ratings to survive, and yet I put out a challenge to debate me about the massive election fraud, which took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, and there are no takers – think of it, zero takers for the so-called ‘ratings machine.’_

_The reason is, they know they can’t win. All I have to do is lay out the facts- they are irrefutable. I’ve supposedly won all my political debates, but this would be the easiest of them all! Swing state by swing state, they get decimated. This is the Hoax and the Scam and the Crime of the Century. Just remember, no takers!”_

**A very reasonable challenge, and something which needs to be done. But no one will even engage. _This is how scared the media is of letting the true narrative of the election integrity movement get out! They won’t let it happen!_**
---
|
---
| **RINO Turncoat Liz Cheney is threatening our President so that if he brings up election integrity, she will try and trap him and punish him for speaking the truth.**

**_The Gateway Pundit Reports:_**

_Vicious Liz Cheney is now openly threatening President Trump._

_The turncoat Republican and serial liar warned President Trump that any “lying” about the election results could result in criminal penalties._

_Cheney hopes that if she gaslights the American public long enough they will excuse the fraud in the 2020 election._

_Weakling GOP House Leader Kevin McCarthy allows this from Republican Caucus members._

_They both need to go._

**_Yes, in America this is what political debates have come to. One side trying to speak the truth, and the other threatening to throw you in jail if you disagree with them._**

This isn’t America. This isn’t Freedom. This is Maoist. **Silence those who disagree with you so no one learns the truth.**

_[And this is why I need your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b4e9c6081&e=44b8c466b0) Every day we are fighting to loudly proclaim the truth of election integrity and put pressure on AG Mark Brnovich to demand perp walks! [Please donate today with anything you can! Make a rush donation of $50 tonight to help us keep up the pressure!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ba2f28f122&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bc66ec93fc&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f7a175dedf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

**Cheney votes to allow federal government to track citizens' private vaccine status
**
---
Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney voted to [fund the enlargement of a federal database ](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfuruUKT-2BHgD0QwCwoClFWpYLI462GILdEw4tbxhdzfk7OvhydtZQc8mHyE4Z-2B5NsbzDpuLTUir-2FvvkoV51fs73Ri4viKAeU-2FB6AhLNoCDyED2oE0eCHiP-2FiDeR30MYIrNco0YlVXQ1o2K2pNjGVy4i6CoEWD6I1PIJ2ahTZAVgSHxVgdQUd8y5Hd9DC-2F8I-2BOUk9ohUcI2WuTiZ7x6pB67RI-3DKRku_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz61XEGdy3mT4MA-2FGn3Za-2FPU3dmoWxco1tvHryBo93Ezlo7UUMW4BZwK-2BIfxetPAql-2BsAnHEdyFGHzQN42qG3b0cQxKY6EltjhdqMMDahelZ4edSOC3ARPgJQWrAJGoRuKHDl9j2rfm80ItaTaLMWmpZhvj6aPfvhi89layEQf-2F7hzTWD5dKPhz7lvvFsudVuikVrSsfrpKi8b7msUW7J-2FCG7Z4LwMMebxT3FwH5sjplXq2bky7wR1OjfyOSsvh6A0xiOQcKorQHFeHQZQcMLmfuTBnhyvbrReTzNEymyBTKiwLVJQwUBH-2Bv9SC3X3GegtvB3U-2Fcafjd2ILFENDq2-2FNag0V0wtqe4pWTCu2z-2BIOjY7w1Zv6UR4PdVKvpeOd9cAHlc8o6JZ9H8rVGfLGnA4nZQsfWQtI8S9PiLHWHv1fCY1sHh-2BnK3-2BD1OrZttNBfRN40gvR9RYEfA0-2BCb2le7Dq9eG8Q5w9-2BSii0CpCiswJPhkGjYWVcjr3RbLifW4NzaWAnHfgbeoo3G16KEk9h8Cxk2cWcpOjuD5vGBzqokTdTk3GOgGo9MOTUGkcvwj5RZYqlIxVWKEVCQ-2Fu-2BjBi3chu8E574dknO5J1IEj5QLQnrwc2LlYp4X2zI49-2BscSWP2ODrNwx7H71FILvol9QWYknI-2Bh6uLUE85t6ZeBIUoyFm4YwL4sGj5byXVAN0xF2xHdj1KHTXTo34RyfaI-2FfAovq05XYrbQMueOZZc3NEAHd0yNrCPMeuXXC8eS0DNneCGa-2FgvkGJ5ziia46g3raNl25fz7yQKDwpEoIN7XifqylIbAMc8q4CFiHBWjNOk-2BEwxnz)that would track COVID-19 vaccine doses administered to private citizens and allow the federal government to contact citizens to encourage them to receive a shot. The [Immunization Infrastructure Modernization Act ](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfuWP7EqfWgu5-2BD-2BlxqoEh4X-2Fif-2FBVkACoJkAYSC6NelnH3d-2FXnNFxu6nf1xhRPuj3PfEhNPg3Epfkk9K-2B3FnQ8o-2BP7TZ4FVGyGDPo2TWqW6phbOAeZKKJMYLo-2FJ35IBSk9R41zWK7ZEMSzMxlvT7dkOc0JOtHi5WUzQP8f7HQ-2FzKwMAw_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz61XEGdy3mT4MA-2FGn3Za-2FPU3dmoWxco1tvHryBo93Ezlo7UUMW4BZwK-2BIfxetPAql-2BsAnHEdyFGHzQN42qG3b0cQxKY6EltjhdqMMDahelZ4edSOC3ARPgJQWrAJGoRuKHDl9j2rfm80ItaTaLMWmpZhvj6aPfvhi89layEQf-2F7hzTWD5dKPhz7lvvFsudVuikVrSsfrpKi8b7msUW7J-2FCG7Z4LwMMebxT3FwH5sjplXq2bky7wR1OjfyOSsvh6A0xiOQcKorQHFeHQZQcMLmfuTBnhyvbrReTzNEymyBTKiwLVJQwUBH-2Bv9SC3X3GegtvB3U-2Fcafjd2ILFENDq2-2FNag0V0wtqe4pWTCu2z-2BIOjY7w1Zv6UR4PdVKvpeOd9cAHlc8o6JZ9H8rVGfLGnA4nZQsfWQtI8S9PiLHWHv1fCY1sHh-2BnK3-2BD1OrZttNBfRN40gvR9RYEfA0-2BCb2le7Dq9eG8Q5w9-2BSii0CpCiswJPhkGjYWVcjr3RbLifW4NzaWAnHfgbeoo3G16KEk9h8Cxk2cWcpOjuD5vGBzqokTdTk3GOgGo9MOTUGkcvwj5RZYqlIxVWKEVCQ-2Fu-2BjBi3chu8E574dknO5J1IEj5QLQnrwc2LlYp4X2zI49-2BscSWP2ODrNwx7H71FILvol9QWYknI-2Bh6uLUE85t6ZeBIUoyFm4Zrv9wunFD7tmutwQ7OPJcUp2BCeUzNCjbTDSrbRDps-2BdjlThwlO-2FOqhJ8Ry0I418a1j7Vz-2BxOYZnWDXJADbC7d-2FtctAiKIXVeAEz6Ght1wh26Pymmbr9fevALCH61am-2B8jUMo3s8VpXLfnsJLQGTp1)provides $400 million in taxpayer funding to expand the power of the government to track individual vaccinations and identify geographic areas were vaccine rates are low. The legislation also creates channels for state and local health departments, in addition to private and public healthcare facilities, to forward their own data to the federal government.
[Cheney voted for the bill](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfsnxgGhmRAUEFU4KDC-2FFxuoqZg0Nf514BebLJQv6yIYuRrq__XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz61XEGdy3mT4MA-2FGn3Za-2FPU3dmoWxco1tvHryBo93Ezlo7UUMW4BZwK-2BIfxetPAql-2BsAnHEdyFGHzQN42qG3b0cQxKY6EltjhdqMMDahelZ4edSOC3ARPgJQWrAJGoRuKHDl9j2rfm80ItaTaLMWmpZhvj6aPfvhi89layEQf-2F7hzTWD5dKPhz7lvvFsudVuikVrSsfrpKi8b7msUW7J-2FCG7Z4LwMMebxT3FwH5sjplXq2bky7wR1OjfyOSsvh6A0xiOQcKorQHFeHQZQcMLmfuTBnhyvbrReTzNEymyBTKiwLVJQwUBH-2Bv9SC3X3GegtvB3U-2Fcafjd2ILFENDq2-2FNag0V0wtqe4pWTCu2z-2BIOjY7w1Zv6UR4PdVKvpeOd9cAHlc8o6JZ9H8rVGfLGnA4nZQsfWQtI8S9PiLHWHv1fCY1sHh-2BnK3-2BD1OrZttNBfRN40gvR9RYEfA0-2BCb2le7Dq9eG8Q5w9-2BSii0CpCiswJPhkGjYWVcjr3RbLifW4NzaWAnHfgbeoo3G16KEk9h8Cxk2cWcpOjuD5vGBzqokTdTk3GOgGo9MOTUGkcvwj5RZYqlIxVWKEVCQ-2Fu-2BjBi3chu8E574dknO5J1IEj5QLQnrwc2LlYp4X2zI49-2BscSWP2ODrNwx7H71FILvol9QWYknI-2Bh6uLUE85t6ZeBIUoyFm4bYJxilgmCik9kzdo9VvSZwYQDYs23Qi7nt5FgX7bRCuBvbOx2IRS410DsKF-2F96FVvRA8LLLCEg-2FG7rHrhWAAzGZLEOSNzOk-2BDvu8RQiDab3stc-2BIcYmoPmINfxckbXh0R3r-2F7mfWZq6nbVPG24nN6S), with every Democrat and a minority of Republicans, which now will be considered by the Senate.
Wyoming candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives Harriet Hageman today issued the following statement:

“This is straight out of George Orwell, and the fact that Liz Cheney thinks the federal government has the right to know your personal medical information to help Joe Biden enforce his unconstitutional mandates shows you that she has lost her mind. Taking the vaccine is a personal decision, and it is not business of the government. In the United States, we value personal privacy, and we don’t allow the federal government to identify and harass people over medical decisions they make for themselves.

“It is shocking that Liz Cheney would vote for this massive intrusion into most basic personal privacy, and I don’t believe Wyomingites will stand for it. This vote alone shows you how far out of step with Wyoming Liz Cheney is.”
###

clean_body: | | | | Cheney votes to allow federal government to track citizens' private vaccine status Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney voted to would track COVID-19 vaccine doses administered to private citizens and allow the federal government to contact citizens to encourage them to receive a shot. The $400 million in taxpayer funding to expand the power of the government to track individual vaccinations and identify geographic areas were vaccine rates are low. The legislation also creates channels for state and local health departments, in addition to private and public healthcare facilities, to forward their own data to the federal government. , with every Democrat and a minority of Republicans, which now will be considered by the Senate. Wyoming candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives Harriet Hageman today issued the following statement: “This is straight out of George Orwell, and the fact that Liz Cheney thinks the federal government has the right to know your personal medical information to help Joe Biden enforce his unconstitutional mandates shows you that she has lost her mind. Taking the vaccine is a personal decision, and it is not business of the government. In the United States, we value personal privacy, and we don’t allow the federal government to identify and harass people over medical decisions they make for themselves. “It is shocking that Liz Cheney would vote for this massive intrusion into most basic personal privacy, and I don’t believe Wyomingites will stand for it. This vote alone shows you how far out of step with Wyoming Liz Cheney is.” | | | |

Now this week, it's Congresswoman Lauren Boebert who's making horrifying comments about our Muslim brothers and sisters. I wish I could say that this was an isolated incident, but you and I both know that's just not the case. **I mean, seriously, what is going on with the Republican Party right now in Washington that every single week, I 'm emailing you about another GOP extremist in Congress who's done something reprehensible?** It's crazy to me that these extremists are only 3 seats away from taking control of the House majority. It's also reprehensible that Kevin McCarthy won't do anything to stop the fringe of his party - not now as the GOP leader, and certainly not if he becomes the Speaker of the House next year. _That means we could literally have Marjorie Taylor Greene and Lauren Boebert in control of Congress. And that 's why we're fighting so hard to hold this swing seat._ [**We can 't let these extremists take over our country in Donald Trump's name. name: Catherine (D)
subject: I’m personally asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
The GOP only needs ONE seat to flip the Senate -- and it's clear they've got their sights set on Nevada.
#
A new poll shows me 2 POINTS behind my Trump-endorsed opponent.**
And now, I'm about to fall short of my make-or-break midnight fundraising goal. I have nowhere else to turn, and Senator Jacky Rosen suggested I reach out to you, **[so I'm urgently asking you to split $5 before tonight’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39317952/319291897/-1059817126?refcode=jr_em_nd_211203_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWIyYjA1MC03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5G-Irco9U3TkZLFHC2tm4F5nAPFK2N0Tt9AX7X3xH4=)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39317955/319291899/-1059817126?refcode=jr_em_nd_211203_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWIyYjA1MC03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5G-Irco9U3TkZLFHC2tm4F5nAPFK2N0Tt9AX7X3xH4=)**
This news couldn't have come at a worse time: CNN is already calling me one of the most _vulnerable_ senators in the country, The Cook Political Report downgraded my chances of defending this seat, and now this new poll has me 2 points behind my extremist opponent.
**The GOP only needs ONE seat to flip the Senate -- and it's clear they've got their sights set on Nevada.** GOP outside groups have poured more than $2 million into attack ads to defeat me -- and this new poll shows their efforts could be working.
I cannot afford to lose any more ground, and Democrats cannot afford to lose in Nevada -- not with Senate control hinging on my race. This poll is still within the margin of error, so I can turn this around, but it needs to happen now. That's why I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support to make it possible:
**[Please, will you split $5 or more to my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help us defend the Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39317957/319291902/-1059817126?refcode=jr_em_nd_211203_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWIyYjA1MC03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5G-Irco9U3TkZLFHC2tm4F5nAPFK2N0Tt9AX7X3xH4=)**
I truly can't do this without you. Thank you so much for giving what you can at this critical moment.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39317959/319291904/-1059817126?refcode=jr_em_nd_211203_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWIyYjA1MC03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5G-Irco9U3TkZLFHC2tm4F5nAPFK2N0Tt9AX7X3xH4=)**

name: Letitia James
subject: I have the courage and passion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39318179/319292651/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk212-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmU5ZGJhYi03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCisI4JfHrbBruo9Qx8tsZwdqgXM_GcL8QYcsJC_UIs=)
Did you see the news, Peter?
**FIRST:** I was elected attorney general of New York, where I’ve fought tirelessly to defend the vulnerable. As your attorney general, I’ve worked hard to hold the country's most powerful and wealthy – including Donald Trump and the gun lobby – accountable.
**THEN:** I launched my campaign for governor at the end of October. I’m running because New York needs real, impactful change right now, and _I have the courage, the passion, and the record of experience to get things done._
**NOW:** I need a dedicated grassroots team behind me if I’m going to reach the finish line. I have so much more fight left in me, but winning this race will be impossible without your help.
I cannot afford to lose any momentum. I have big plans to defend New York from the threats of climate change, racial and economic inequality, and the interests of the ultrawealthy and powerful, but I need your help. **[Peter, will you donate $5 right now to help me fight for powerless and vulnerable New Yorkers all over this great state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39318180/319292652/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk212-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmU5ZGJhYi03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCisI4JfHrbBruo9Qx8tsZwdqgXM_GcL8QYcsJC_UIs=)**

Thanks for being a part of this historic team,

Letitia James
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fdc141a1-fd52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/7fe9dbab-7c54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmU5ZGJhYi03YzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCisI4JfHrbBruo9Qx8tsZwdqgXM_GcL8QYcsJC_UIs=&id=128810098) James for NY
PO Box 476
New York, NY 10034

name: American Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8126%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vuRRc1YSTUV%2bKoBKKJirSQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19873%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8iaeEaLiKa9gCHvw1TOcwA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19874%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fR22Y0IwN3flVnCdOiasYQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j0KCfZd0uz9tvQB1ulJNfA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8126%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vuRRc1YSTUV%2bKoBKKJirSQ&sysid=1)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Silk Brocade and donating what you can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1a2585492095/join-me-saturday-in-provo-5325702?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=43529f53aa&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends, This week at a campaign event I told the story of Susan B. Anthony’s black silk dress. Anthony wore the dress for years as she advocated for women’s suffrage throughout the country. This dress was made from a bolt of silk brocade that Utah women sent her in 1900 as thanks for helping them win the vote in the Utah territory. The community of Utah women came together to create the beautiful fabric by importing silkworms so they could extract, spin, and weave the silk. They did this to support a woman at the forefront in the fight for the vote. While there’s one person at the forefront of a campaign, a campaign is actually about more than just the candidate. It’s about a community coming together in support— like Utah did to support women’s suffrage. Not everyone can run for office, but we can all do our part of either time, skills, or resources for what’s important. This season as we reflect on what’s important, I hope you know that you and your community are important, and your contribution, great or small, can make a difference. It will take more than one person; it will take a community to unseat Mike Lee. Even a small thing like silk thread means something, so I’m asking for your continued support— your figurative “silk thread”— as we head into January signature gathering in preparation for the Republican primary. Join me! Become part of our growing community that knows what’s important: better politics, better leadership, and better solutions in the U.S. Senate. Contribute today!
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a5183c4f0d&e=10c1db3257 "Donate")
---
| Thank you again for your support!

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: The Civil Rights Case that will SHAKE the Nation
body:
AMERICAN PATRIOTS! CIVIL RIGHTS SUPREME COURT UPDATE Patriots: We are at the Supreme Court of the United States! That's Right, Our case is sitting
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=456757.2505.1.35ba0a221c90b9560bcefe36a1375fc6) |
---
# AMERICAN PATRIOTS!
---
|
---
CIVIL RIGHTS SUPREME COURT UPDATE
Patriots:
We are at the Supreme Court of the United States! That's Right, Our case is sitting on the desk of Justice Clarence Thomas.
Read Below and Join us during this historical time in our nation.
https://documentcloud.adobe.com/link/track?uri=urn%3Aaaid%3Ascds%3AUS%3A9b67a285-ea97-47c2-8219-2e6a361c11c8#pageNum=7
Read the article by Kari Donovan
https://frontlineamerica.com/exclusive-thomas-is-listening-potential-scotus-hearing-you-can-help/
Why are we fighting for our civil rights?
Latinos for Trump is a plaintiff in a civil rights lawsuit. We believe it is time to hold bureaucrats accountable in a non partisan way. We are tasked to hold elected officials and governmental agencies accountable under law for violations against our Civil Rights and Helping America Voting Right (HAVA) ACT.
Our mission is to restore our nation to a true "republic" and a nation of laws that applies to all citizens regardless of political or economic status. We must importantly RESTORE our most precious right in the United States of America: The Right to Vote.
Help us accomplish just that by donating to our cause and helping us restore election integrity in the United States of America.
The January 2021 filing in the Western District of Texas
READ ALL ABOUT IT BELOW
https://djhjmedia.com/kari/huge-exclusive-election-do-over-latinos-for-trump-sue-to-shut-congress-down-over-civil-rights-violations/
God Bless YOU and God Bless America!

body:
Let me tell you something about why the fight for a cleaner, more sustainable economy is so deeply important to me. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39318863/319295665/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.37d70b2a-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.37d70b2a-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q3MGIyYS04MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kq_VMYJmjlhYnt4hgNV1LwbTKaAXGmgiY18G3Wy5c3s=) **_[We are running out of time to make meaningful changes and curb the worst impacts of climate change. That’s exactly why we can’t let Republicans win another four years of complete control in Columbus. Please, I’m asking you to chip in just $25 to defeat Mike DeWine, and get OH back on track>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39318864/319295666/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.37d70b2a-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.37d70b2a-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q3MGIyYS04MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kq_VMYJmjlhYnt4hgNV1LwbTKaAXGmgiY18G3Wy5c3s=)_** Team, **Let me tell you something about my parents.** My mom, a schoolteacher, and my dad, a Vietnam veteran, taught me the values of faith, service, integrity, and making the world a better place. So when I read the dire reports about the path our world is on, the quickly warming planet, and the increased extreme weather patterns, I think about the lessons my parents taught me and the world I’m leaving for my son. **Frankly, I know we’re simply not doing enough to build a sustainable future for our children and our children’s children.** I am proud to be bringing the biggest municipal solar farm in the country to our city. Not only is this a good investment in our planet’s future, it is a good investment.**_Period._** We are bringing good-paying jobs to our city and are helping lower the cost of energy. That’s why I am deeply angered to watch Ohio Republicans do everything they can to stand in the way of clean energy investments in our state. And that’s why I am determined to win this election — because our state needs investments in clean energy to grow our economy and build the kind of future we can be proud to leave to our children. Friend, this was never going to be an easy fight. We’re up against a corrupt Republican machine that’ll do anything to prevent real progress in our state. **_[But no fight worth fighting is ever easy. That’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign today to flip Ohio Blue and get to work on the future we can be proud of. Will you chip in just $25 today to help us get the job done?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39318865/319295667/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.37d70b2a-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.37d70b2a-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q3MGIyYS04MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kq_VMYJmjlhYnt4hgNV1LwbTKaAXGmgiY18G3Wy5c3s=)_** clean_body: Let me tell you something about why the fight for a cleaner, more sustainable economy is so deeply important to me. | = = Team, Let me tell you something about my parents. My mom, a schoolteacher, and my dad, a Vietnam veteran, taught me the values of faith, service, integrity, and making the world a better place. So when I read the dire reports about the path our world is on, the quickly warming planet, and the increased extreme weather patterns, I think about the lessons my parents taught me and the world I’m leaving for my son. Frankly, I know we’re simply not doing enough to build a sustainable future for our children and our children’s children. I am proud to be bringing the biggest municipal solar farm in the country to our city. Not only is this a good investment in our planet’s future, it is a good investment.Period. We are bringing good-paying jobs to our city and are helping lower the cost of energy. That’s why I am deeply angered to watch Ohio Republicans do everything they can to stand in the way of clean energy investments in our state. And that’s why I am determined to win this election — because our state needs investments in clean energy to grow our economy and build the kind of future we can be proud to leave to our children. Friend, this was never going to be an easy fight. We’re up against a corrupt Republican machine that’ll do anything to prevent real progress in our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. This morning, the Supreme Court announced they've accepted the redistricting commission’s work, and declined to adopt a new redistricting process. We know what our district will likely look like next year -- and this map will make our race even more competitive. **"Washington Supreme Court declines to redraw political maps, accepts redistricting commission’s work"**
\-- _The Seattle Times_
Peter,

This morning, the Supreme Court announced they've accepted the redistricting commission’s work, and declined to adopt a new redistricting process. We know what our district will likely look like next year -- **and this map will make our race _even more_ competitive.**

Under these maps, not only will WA-08 remain the most competitive district in our state, but more than 20% of Kim's constituents will also be new to the district.

**We'll be blunt: We can't hold the House majority without winning WA-08.** But with Election Day less than a year away, we don't have much time to introduce Kim to thousands of new voters. This will be one of the closest -- and most expensive -- congressional races in the country, so we need your help right away to spread Kim's message to every corner of the new 8th District in order to defend Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority.

# Take the poll: Do you support vaccine requirements for airline passengers?
---

---
| | | Anti-vaxxers continue to put our entire population at risk – and with the holidays quickly approaching, it’s critical that we do everything we can to keep everyone safe. With the potential for another surge in COVID infections, and with airports getting more packed with travelers this holiday season, a growing number of medical experts and politicians think vaccines should be mandatory for domestic flight passengers. We’ve seen vaccine mandates work in several industries. This could be exactly what we need to get the pandemic under control. Vaccine mandates are controversial, so we want to know what our top activists think: Should vaccines be required for air travel?
---
| | | | [YES >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93b14818-0aa7-4861-857d-4378e13af702/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Take the poll: Do you support vaccine requirements for airline passengers? | | | | | | | | | | | Anti-vaxxers continue to put our entire population at risk – and with the holidays quickly approaching, it’s critical that we do everything we can to keep everyone safe. With the potential for another surge in COVID infections, and with airports getting more packed with travelers this holiday season, a growing number of medical experts and politicians think vaccines should be mandatory for domestic flight passengers. We’ve seen vaccine mandates work in several industries. This could be exactly what we need to get the pandemic under control. Vaccine mandates are controversial, so we want to know what our top activists think: Should vaccines be required for air travel? | | | | | | | | | Looking to reach progressive activists?. Looking to take action on another front? Check out the . If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses. | | | | | | | | Thanks, Left Action | | | Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Will you take a quick survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

This year has been one of triumphs and losses. We've continued to battle COVID-19 as we worked to rebuild our local economies. Sadly, right-wing state lawmakers across the country have waged attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ+ rights.

At the same time, President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have shown us what's possible when we work together to build back better. We've passed historic relief and a once-in-a-generation infrastructure bill, with more investments in our country's future on the horizon.

I'm still fighting for the people every step of the way. And as we look ahead to 2022, I want to know what issues matter the most to you and your family.

**[We're nearly halfway through this session of Congress, and we need to make as much progress before the term is up. Will you share your top priorities with me? Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- Roe vs. Wade in Jeopardy -** This week, the Supreme Court heard arguments on an extreme anti-abortion Mississippi law that threatens to undo Roe v. Wade as we know it. This move is unpopular with a majority of Americans, and it should come as no surprise to Hoosiers that the “pro-life” Indiana Republican Party is in lockstep with the Court in wanting to deny women their right to their own healthcare. Here’s what you need to know: Any anti-abortion policy that extreme is unpopular with a majority of Hoosiers. The INGOP’s 2016 anti-abortion law was opposed by 56% of voters, and the Mississippi and Texas anti-abortion laws are far worse. Indiana Democrats will always stand up for women’s rights and we will always push for personal reproductive health care to be kept between a woman and medical professionals -- not politicians.
**\- INGOP Praise American Rescue Plan (Again) -** President Joe Biden’s American Rescue plan is continuing to deliver for Indiana families. On top of investments in broadband, public schools, and childcare, towns like Garrett, Beech Grove, and Anderson are approving relief funding for lost revenues, sewer or water projects, and other needs for municipalities. Media continues to showcase how the Rescue Plan is creating a better future for Hoosiers, and every time this happens, it’s a good reminder for us to share that it was Democrats who delivered this opportunity for our families. What’s more, the success of the American Rescue Plan is not lost on Indiana Republicans like Chairman Kyle Hupfer. The state government’s Indiana Economic Development Corporation (IEDC) described Governor Holcomb’s READI program (funded exclusively by American Rescue Plan dollars) as an “anchor” for Indiana’s economic future. INGOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer also agreed and promoted the IEDC’s comments online this week too. This comes as every Indiana Republican cast a “NO” vote on the American Rescue Plan earlier this year. Here’s the INGOP’s partisan trick: Vote “NO”, call it “socialism”, but take the dough anyway. Republicans such as Governor Holcomb and Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch have been quick to celebrate the Rescue Plan’s $250 million for broadband internet expansion across Indiana. Two months ago, Indiana House Speaker Todd Huston bragged about the Rescue Plan raising teacher pay. And, just two weeks after he voted “NO” on the Rescue Plan, Congressman Greg Pence touted the law’s Restaurant Revitalization Fund – a program to help Indiana’s food and restaurant industries during the pandemic.
**\- INGOP: Bad for Business, Bad for Hoosiers - ** Lastly, the Indiana Democratic Party is announcing a new effort to highlight how our state is continuing to fall behind the rest of the nation thanks to the Indiana Republican Party’s extreme partisanship. The “Indiana Republicans = Bad for Business, Bad for Workers” campaign will highlight the Republicans’ troubling record that has stunted Indiana’s economic opportunity, underpaid and undervalued Hoosier workers, and produced unnecessary culture wars that have divided communities across Indiana. This campaign will also hold Indiana Republicans accountable for voting “NO” on creating new jobs and investing in broadband, roads and bridges, clean water, childcare, public schools, state tourism, and Governor Holcomb’s READI program – despite campaigning on these issues themselves. Indiana’s extreme, partisan Republicans prefer obstructionism, misinformation, and calling these investments “socialism” over investing in our state’s economy and workers. Indiana Democrats will take this campaign on the road next year for the critical 2022 elections, and we hope you join us in holding the INGOP accountable every step of the way. Indiana Republicans are extreme, and their partisanship is bad for business and bad for Hoosiers. It doesn’t have to be this way and we look forward to offering Hoosiers a better choice. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Annual Holiday Party -** [Get Your Tickets By Clicking Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39319896/319300077/-710561404?11.09.21-INDemsHolidayParty=11.09.21-INDemsHolidayParty&FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&emci=510597c4-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmMxNDBhNy04NDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omJnatMcKwdtVnCcZ9RI02Cl8zXO4k8A-K91_9noTco=)
**\- Spring Interns 2022 -** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
#### **Benefits**
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
#### **Intern Duties**
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
#### **Qualifications**
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
#### **Start/End Dates and Schedule**
Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility.
* * *
#### **How to Apply**
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org). **\- Party Leader Trainings -** clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- Roe vs. Wade in Jeopardy - This week, the Supreme Court heard arguments on an extreme anti-abortion Mississippi law that threatens to undo Roe v. Wade as we know it. This move is unpopular with a majority of Americans, and it should come as no surprise to Hoosiers that the “pro-life” Indiana Republican Party is in lockstep with the Court in wanting to deny women their right to their own healthcare. Here’s what you need to know: Any anti-abortion policy that extreme is unpopular with a majority of Hoosiers. The INGOP’s 2016 anti-abortion law was opposed by 56% of voters, and the Mississippi and Texas anti-abortion laws are far worse. Indiana Democrats will always stand up for women’s rights and we will always push for personal reproductive health care to be kept between a woman and medical professionals -- not politicians. \- INGOP Praise American Rescue Plan (Again) - President Joe Biden’s American Rescue plan is continuing to deliver for Indiana families. On top of investments in broadband, public schools, and childcare, towns like Garrett, Beech Grove, and Anderson are approving relief funding for lost revenues, sewer or water projects, and other needs for municipalities. Media continues to showcase how the Rescue Plan is creating a better future for Hoosiers, and every time this happens, it’s a good reminder for us to share that it was Democrats who delivered this opportunity for our families. What’s more, the success of the American Rescue Plan is not lost on Indiana Republicans like Chairman Kyle Hupfer. The state government’s Indiana Economic Development Corporation (IEDC) described Governor Holcomb’s READI program (funded exclusively by American Rescue Plan dollars) as an “anchor” for Indiana’s economic future. INGOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer also agreed and promoted the IEDC’s comments online this week too. This comes as every Indiana Republican cast a “NO” vote on the American Rescue Plan earlier this year. Here’s the INGOP’s partisan trick: Vote “NO”, call it “socialism”, but take the dough anyway. Republicans such as Governor Holcomb and Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch have been quick to celebrate the Rescue Plan’s $250 million for broadband internet expansion across Indiana. Two months ago, Indiana House Speaker Todd Huston bragged about the Rescue Plan raising teacher pay. And, just two weeks after he voted “NO” on the Rescue Plan, Congressman Greg Pence touted the law’s Restaurant Revitalization Fund – a program to help Indiana’s food and restaurant industries during the pandemic. \- INGOP: Bad for Business, Bad for Hoosiers - Lastly, the Indiana Democratic Party is announcing a new effort to highlight how our state is continuing to fall behind the rest of the nation thanks to the Indiana Republican Party’s extreme partisanship. The “Indiana Republicans = Bad for Business, Bad for Workers” campaign will highlight the Republicans’ troubling record that has stunted Indiana’s economic opportunity, underpaid and undervalued Hoosier workers, and produced unnecessary culture wars that have divided communities across Indiana. This campaign will also hold Indiana Republicans accountable for voting “NO” on creating new jobs and investing in broadband, roads and bridges, clean water, childcare, public schools, state tourism, and Governor Holcomb’s READI program – despite campaigning on these issues themselves. Indiana’s extreme, partisan Republicans prefer obstructionism, misinformation, and calling these investments “socialism” over investing in our state’s economy and workers. Indiana Democrats will take this campaign on the road next year for the critical 2022 elections, and we hope you join us in holding the INGOP accountable every step of the way. Indiana Republicans are extreme, and their partisanship is bad for business and bad for Hoosiers. It doesn’t have to be this way and we look forward to offering Hoosiers a better choice. \- Opportunities - \- Annual Holiday Party - = \- Spring Interns 2022 - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility.
