## Morse: Biden Policies Make This Holiday Season Less Than Bright
---
| | | Op-Ed November 24, 2021 It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas, and for many of us who weren’t able to spend last year’s holidays with friends and family, it can’t come soon enough! While the pandemic is not over, we are returning to normalcy and that is a very good thing. But at the risk of sounding like a Grinch, the news isn’t all good. This holiday season is shaping up to be another challenging one for many New Hampshire families, as we are seeing a new set of problems, unrelated to the pandemic, that threaten to derail our holidays yet again. First and foremost: Inflation. If you feel like your dollar isn’t going as far this year as it did last year, you’re not alone. When polled, most Americans have said inflation is the most serious issue we face today. In October, the rate of inflation was 6.2 percent, the highest it’s been in 30 years. Gas prices in New Hampshire are up more than a dollar a gallon since Biden took office. Grocery prices, car prices, and appliance prices are all up across the board as well. Shopping for Thanksgiving dinner this year is the most expensive it has ever been. And that’s assuming that the store shelves aren’t empty. Supply chain issues and worker shortages are coming to a head. Container ships are sitting at docks around the country with no one to unload them. Stores and restaurants are cutting back operating hours, or shutting down completely. The majority of people in these same polls put the blame squarely on the Biden administration and our federal delegation, and for good reason. Runaway spending and failed economic policies have forced the inflation rate up and the Democrats in Washington have failed to adequately address the real problems that Americans care about. Democrats have instead chosen to spend their time waging culture wars and threatening legal actions against parents with the audacity to question their local school boards and take interest in their child’s education. Since Day One of his presidency, Joe Biden and the Democrats in Washington have sought to remake America into a country that few of us recognize, and even fewer wanted. When President Biden visited our state a few weeks ago to sell his infrastructure bill, an interview with a Woodstock resident named Guy Hoover went viral on social media. Mr. Hoover was asked about the President coming to his town and expressed that he is far more concerned with being able to afford to heat his home this winter. He is far from alone. Home heating oil and natural gas prices are skyrocketing at the worst possible time. These are the real concerns that real people have. These are the new worries that threaten to keep us from traveling to visit our families. These are the issues being discussed at kitchen tables and keeping parents up at night. It’s time that Washington stops talking and starts listening. _Sen. Chuck Morse (R-Salem) is President of the New Hampshire Senate. He wrote this for New Hampshire Journal._

subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39320433/319301895/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjM0NDdlYy04NjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUXXsknJkHOAJ7GkypY9yJqNlFIgAGt3g3dfCbBpung=&emci=cf4b19d7-8354-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8b3447ec-8654-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643047)

| | Hi I'd like to introduce myself. **My name is Shannon Geison and I've just joined Team Salinas as Andrea's campaign manager.** I'm so excited to join you in this cause. For the first time in 40 years, Oregon has a new congressional district — and we have the opportunity to elect just the sixth woman to serve Oregon in Congress, and the first Latina. Andrea will be a tremendous champion in Congress for the things we care about — affordable health care, the right to choose, protections for working families like a strong minimum wage and paid family leave, and a deep commitment to fighting the climate crisis. Not only does she have strong progressive values, she's also proven again and again that she's a highly effective leader, delivering on the issues that matter most to Oregon families. **As Andrea's campaign manager, it's my job to keep you informed about how the campaign is going, create opportunities for you to get involved (both online and offline), and do everything I can to put us in the best position to win on election day.** I'm looking forward to getting to know you and everyone on Team Salinas. If you've been her friend for years, thank you for welcoming me to the family. If you're new around here, I'm excited to be building this with you. Let's go! _Shannon_ [P.S. clean_body: | | | Hi I'd like to introduce myself. My name is Shannon Geison and I've just joined Team Salinas as Andrea's campaign manager. I'm so excited to join you in this cause. For the first time in 40 years, Oregon has a new congressional district — and we have the opportunity to elect just the sixth woman to serve Oregon in Congress, and the first Latina. Andrea will be a tremendous champion in Congress for the things we care about — affordable health care, the right to choose, protections for working families like a strong minimum wage and paid family leave, and a deep commitment to fighting the climate crisis. Not only does she have strong progressive values, she's also proven again and again that she's a highly effective leader, delivering on the issues that matter most to Oregon families. As Andrea's campaign manager, it's my job to keep you informed about how the campaign is going, create opportunities for you to get involved (both online and offline), and do everything I can to put us in the best position to win on election day. I'm looking forward to getting to know you and everyone on Team Salinas. If you've been her friend for years, thank you for welcoming me to the family. If you're new around here, I'm excited to be building this with you. Let's go! name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Outdoor recreation should be accessible to all (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39320482/319302141/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg1NjA1Yi04NzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdIQtuNvFFOk-KbTMabSnhGeK9ZZebjJYyevfIte6Jc=&emci=108e05dd-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=de85605b-8754-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Spending time outdoors is one of life’s simple pleasures. Everyone, from people in New Mexico to across the country, should be able to easily access and enjoy our beautiful lands. That’s why I introduced the bipartisan _Simplifying Outdoor Access for Recreation (SOAR) Act_ — it will finally simplify and streamline our country’s process for issuing outdoor recreation permits. Our current permitting process is outdated and far too complicated. It regularly stops outfitters and organized groups from making use of our public lands. That’s a shame. Not only does everyone deserve to spend time on our lands — **outdoor recreation supports our economy by generating billions of dollars in revenue and creating millions of jobs.** We need to pass these common sense changes to the permitting process to both boost our economy and help the next generation get outdoors. **[**Sign my petition urging the Senate to pass the _Simplifying Outdoor Access for Recreation Act_ to make outdoor recreation accessible to everyone.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39320483/319302142/-1954871626?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg1NjA1Yi04NzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdIQtuNvFFOk-KbTMabSnhGeK9ZZebjJYyevfIte6Jc=&emci=108e05dd-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=de85605b-8754-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39320484/319302143/-1954871626?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg1NjA1Yi04NzU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdIQtuNvFFOk-KbTMabSnhGeK9ZZebjJYyevfIte6Jc=&emci=108e05dd-8054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=de85605b-8754-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)

— Martin

subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6524%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4cgr2SzZb06W0WO99%2bdjSA&sysid=1)
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67426%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mE7XQDE5KrbSB7TG13YRMQ&sysid=1)** __ [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67427%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wlzWfkqWbjzULZjxFtAv5w&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take \- and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67428%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hvehLXdfeDBkjP4YbIsRkQ&sysid=1)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home.

**If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67429%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qu22FbYFQNkYnioOBaQtJg&sysid=1)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67420%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ErNxpp1wcMMAjMw8Amg0QQ&sysid=1)

[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67422%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xZH0jfaApW%2bIoiOe6eJfhw&sysid=1)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67423%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3I1nm6AGXOwqKnIyOu1X4w&sysid=1)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

clean_body: I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. It’s time to FIRE FAUCI! | | Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control. He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research. Now, he's lying about ME. This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is "really criticizing science because I represent science." The absolute hubris is almost too much to take \- and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door. Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing. "I represent science." It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science. He won't acknowledge natural immunity. He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus. He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus. It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home. If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:** I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired. Please, chip in what you can to join the fight. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | | | | | | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0nvkt0s2ljbsvn82mg4bf3qniegq3k07sv17bd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljm0or6c9h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbics6qds9gru5esglohlejdfo01hndnvqkfk4eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljm0or6c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf4nljh0trcsp7rljsil2tikag20qjgmvu7t5340_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljm0or6c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

So now, we're calling on our BEST grassroots Democrats to join her in the fight and chip in $3 to elect pro-voting rights House Democrats in Georgia and all across the country. Can we count on you?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/AGmXQyxLgXF_)****

There's not a moment to spare.

**FIRST:**

Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans CRUSHED our efforts to strengthen our democracy and SAVE voting rights. _**NO!!**_

**BUT THEN:**

**Stacey Abrams REFUSED to give in --_and launched a HISTORIC bid to be Georgia 's next governor!!_**

It was a crucial part of her efforts in 2018, and she has continued making inroads with rural communities. Stacey’s work paved the way for Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to win the state. Now it’s her turn. Republicans in Georgia are doing everything they can to suppress the vote and stop Stacey from winning this race. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Your 2A rights are no longer safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
We don’t need more gun control, we need more idiot control [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6537%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=waIYeDJV1Gwzd0ym7rcNmw&sysid=1)

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67436%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ViG5i%2bgn8SC2p6siMaG0kg&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

As I’ve said before: **guns are a lot like parachutes, when you need one and don’t have one, you’ll probably never need one again.**

The politicians who attack our 2nd Amendment rights are the same ones who refuse to go out in public without armed guards surrounding them. Reminds me of that old hypocritical saying, “Do as I say, not as I do.”

Biden announced that he’s coming after our **_2nd Amendment RIGHTS!_**

The Left is licking their chops at the idea of taking away our guns. **[We must protect our right to bear arms!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67437%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9YTZixs62GrTv%2flYQFngYQ&sysid=1)**

**The people protected by all the guns and security in Washington D.C. are the same people who say that neither work and you can’t have them ...isn’t that a kick in the shin?**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Folks, I urgently need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
folks, **a new poll came out showing me tied with a far-right Trump Republican.** With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we cannot afford to fall behind in this campaign. If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win here in New Hampshire. But the GOP has endless resources, and they're pulling out all the stops. So far, top Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the Granite State to rally their far-right base. I know we can turn these polls around and pull ahead, but we urgently need your help. name: Melanie D'Arrigo
subject: Dark money is rigging our courts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Dark money isn't just poisoning our elections and policies. It has fueled a right-wing takeover of our courts.
For decades, dark money groups funded by anonymous donors have helped groom future judges like Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett and bring them into power.
Dark money funded conservative groups like the Federalist Society and the Judicial Crisis Network push nominees through confirmation with flashy TV ads, and then influence the justices through legal briefs filed to encourage pro-polluter, pro-corporate, and anti-choice decisions.
**I’m running for Congress to get dark money out of politics _and_ our judicial system. I’ll vote to balance and expand the Supreme Court.**
**[But first, I need your help to win. I’m refusing donations from corporate PACs and lobbyists,. Can you chip in to my campaign today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC_8y10xvckykmtdks2ZlIf2i-VdpDqwm4Drjsvyhn6RiiJAZ-Pt_SrSB2pBYkLYv13QBfAF8Cnq7XU9wIOgtpA-y-X-GdqfCyjjfmjH9qgrJFz-_VaMJprW1vOMtDrWMH8zONTAEDWadT4BMvasAMFxkd6jvcJc3f8OxuY0lzQEnA-L56aoIwctdedFykAfUfm3nYoEZvK0YS1ZeyqZuD1g7lygWGvvDj2IJmKHJlHgrlP_srb-mcqjlQaLs9_MzQ7ZXyTq4WJQK-QILWdHEWsY2nqm95ZOcuFIYMSSZYp3vA/3hj/XTO4czJgTzey0wsIYz1JOw/h0/dTs6Mi9L4bVUJGOUUMmLm2Cq0E6JiMIBENC0cwfjz9o)**
Republicans have been strategically working to stack the courts for years. Donald Trump alone filled over 200 court seats with conservatives. We must fight back.
**Why is the Republican Party focused so heavily on the judiciary? Because judges aren’t accountable to voters and their hand-selected conservative judges are free to impose their own ideology on all of us.**
As the Supreme Court undermines voting rights and threatens to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , public confidence in our courts is at an all time low.
To restore faith in our democracy, we need to get dark money out of politics and restore balance to the Supreme Court. Will you join me?
**[My people-powered campaign relies on thousands of grassroots supporters like you because I’m not taking a dime in corporate PAC money. Donate to my campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC_8y10xvckykmtdks2ZlIf2nZeDobR9ymSy_lqbsUR5PaY01-fO5tZaz55aYY_tFu_Xq8sTgWgScpHxHAt78ljuJUqV3a3Opc4HZ9sAwdTJocSItrJ_tECIJ_1xdsT88N9-dhrqR4OEVYEa6INs816_SieBgFQObbLAeSjaPkMSCyVzPYrwAI2BJHNAwafUnUvRbFnZF2Hf58SGgSe8OuDqQxHdXILPyU8P0kdjBpaZOROQ420Htx4NKpxkdKQsM_B4niZj-7HvYZjaMWyo-0l09Cd5HGtUwNseixtITRNHtg/3hj/XTO4czJgTzey0wsIYz1JOw/h1/oBtnaC6pHsHvmuachYIyGb5jY1ZyceZk_rDbU-V4Z_U)**
Thanks for your support.
\-- Melanie

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Biden Dismantling the Family
body:
Biden administration undermines parent’s rights and responsibility. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a7cdccf3b4b3/biden-dismantling-the-family-8634157?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
|
---
Peter,
**A quick reminder** , please RSVP for _Holidays with the Shawn Hyland for Congress Fundraiser_ on Tuesday Nov 30 and Thursday Dec 2nd from 7pm to 8:15pm. Tickets are $50 per person and $250 and $500 for silver and gold sponsors, respectively. Refreshments and desserts are provided.**RSVP by emailing**[**campaign@hylandforcongress.com**](mailto:campaign@hylandforcongress.com)**today.** Thank you.
|
---
# Biden Administration Dismantling the Family
Today’s federal government is at war with our culture and the families that are struggling to raise their children in it. Biden’s education and justice administration is stocked to the brim with progressives seeking to implant upon the entirety of American culture their thin, ideological views of life, education, and justice. The results have been nothing short of a disaster. I am running for congress expressly because I am concerned that New Jersey doesn’t have candidates willing to go to Washington to fight head-on against Biden and diligently against cultural decay.We, New Jersey’s parents, are looking for relief from Biden’s agenda, and are fighting back in the halls of power. Our election this year in 2021 was merely the first wave. We are going to win bigger in 2022 and use our wins to secure parental rights for millions of Americans.
School district board members and education unions across the country have rallied behind this radical agenda and have become the local embodiment of progressive ideology. They are the boots working on the ground to change America’s families through our children. Their mindset betrays the fundamental right parents have over their children. There are no finer and more essential advocates for our children than us, their parents. As Biden’s government works to step into this role, it is nothing short of a move to dislodge us parents from our essential role. And as a consequence, our children suffer.
| [Will you contribute to my campaign?](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=9e34ad121c&e=5167ed8367)
---
As partisan ideologies are seeping into our school boards and education unions, our elected education officials are becoming increasingly partisan and willing to do terrible things to push their agenda. Take Loudoun County, Virginia, for instance. Recently [the school board covered up sexual assaults](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=c41a7d70a7&e=5167ed8367) and leveraged [the DOJ and FBI](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=257d7d3dac&e=5167ed8367) against vocal parents. Why? Because local parents were speaking out against their school restroom policies at school board meetings and this sexual assault was a direct result of bad privacy policy from school board leadership.
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
# We need you!
Running a campaign is hard work and requires a great team. Help me fight for New Jersey and volunteer for my campaign today!|
---
[Volunteer](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=cec56ceaa3&e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
Parents are done with the left’s dangerous ideology. They have put our children in jeopardy in order to win political points and we are outraged.I am running for congress because I didn’t see candidates from New Jersey that are taking this fight seriously. I am running for the safety of our children, to keep parents in charge of their children’s education, and to fight back against the current leadership that is building a dangerous future for America.I believe that the best is in front of us, but we need to fight together against the left to get there.In case you missed it: I released a statement of support of the Parents Bill of Rights Act. If you’d like to read more, you can do so [here](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=998ec68fcc&e=5167ed8367).For New Jersey, Shawn Hyland
| | | | [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=0bf1199273&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=7bcf32bbc8&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=d5a5511fbb&e=5167ed8367)
---|---|---

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=055c20a6f75c4536b36c3aee11a28c54&_e=92ETkwe2I_M3cnBRHIn74tn7h4CARucigEr5vLnLGiCXh54vkks9dSuZBJny8uyLByVv_DY--gmxAUQTdzu5WN3oTKS4UxHeuC2IW3uYQ7uCVCA_H1liO14QtgyM70MLfdezjrYL7xpfkciytF22wkJ5vwwjmtcunRbS66Z7mTfBqaudahl77oYBNOnvRDvev5XImWNlzG0qxKscT8f6iPm0lIMED_P1ccc4aGAqJ_i7v3j5rdYcncmSzyohsdJWTyKQZ_NDx2euPfXlKcyY6wlolVKw2d5yBpRbhKBNR499CjCyt9Je46yGyRjVwW-hd_0ZKn3GcRDX3-50P_z84g%3D%3D)

Team - Where has this year gone?

Can you believe it is December already? In just a few short weeks, my campaign will file our end-of-the-year campaign finance reports. This is one of the most critical campaign disclosures of the entire election cycle.

One of the first things the media will do in January is look at the financial reports and see which candidates are raising money. They will only cover the campaigns that are making a serious effort to raise money.

[**So my team and I set a goal to find 500 conservatives who will make at least a $100 contribution.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=055c20a6f75c4536b36c3aee11a28c54&_e=92ETkwe2I_M3cnBRHIn74tn7h4CARucigEr5vLnLGiCXh54vkks9dSuZBJny8uyLByVv_DY--gmxAUQTdzu5WN3oTKS4UxHeuC2IW3uYQ7uCVCA_H1liO14QtgyM70MLxRE7NP-heg8J2RqTEOzkVU3n84Byb52oiZWtaCJQe3z64FhWhpQWSA02bu0zg5-WxaUPIxwvF0nXCTa6yKX1Fsvi-myjnlk20Iv4jvHRc6ais-w6S63VA63SnIJOYjEfFdSVJke9ztBcVRGU2rXhmb6DY_-QNo9NOc1jWCtM_Z3m-eMFPRdyXyjaz6EDXCDwV1p99lWfd1haUK8SFSO3mw%3D%3D) This kind of grassroots support will go a long way in showing the media that we are a serious campaign.

Will you make a $100 contribution today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=055c20a6f75c4536b36c3aee11a28c54&_e=92ETkwe2I_M3cnBRHIn74tn7h4CARucigEr5vLnLGiCXh54vkks9dSuZBJny8uyLByVv_DY--gmxAUQTdzu5WN3oTKS4UxHeuC2IW3uYQ7uCVCA_H1liO14QtgyM70MLdo2bUi4pOSG6UxdhWOa8YV3zpnh-LERFKgNVD6V2SBFnLktrn0ThOWVpeTCixr_3fNA2UhvM0LOOQ4A-Ncvkj9WXhEZ3KaWsFfBeDxUPUIaCyk0fkXyX_WDxiqQALhVLycDJneroxKsrWmRdiFbCrNocm7Jncs1arfJd2sO5aqvyRi-9WNX5o8rOxnVLXib9WY9Z2C4pafvg-aqJoSgsQw%3D%3D)

**A generous contribution of $100 or more will show that this campaign is ready to ride the Red Wave all the way to Election Day 2022.**

I understand that you might not be in the position this holiday season to make a contribution that large. [**But even a small monthly commitment of $5 or $10 can make a major impact on my campaign.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=055c20a6f75c4536b36c3aee11a28c54&_e=92ETkwe2I_M3cnBRHIn74tn7h4CARucigEr5vLnLGiCXh54vkks9dSuZBJny8uyLByVv_DY--gmxAUQTdzu5WN3oTKS4UxHeuC2IW3uYQ7uCVCA_H1liO14QtgyM70MLteMMFfBTSYyoPqURZabXjB1NYLYl4XmyGKCm_zWhnE6zO8nmnSZNOlPfTMbciid_2iCPi6wLUyiw1ae1natRn_51qTV67K2jF5du44-q-nk__BeUbzY-bwkRvE6nEIVjpEqmX0CDjhdLsq5cL_V5Z0ZNj04YvxKY7Obu3xig6r116rgSDXwYEoP_ND4V-QCUi-wRjbpv62bSBe60OtIyyw%3D%3D)

[**I know that the holidays can be a busy time with many distractions, so please take a moment to contribute immediately.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=055c20a6f75c4536b36c3aee11a28c54&_e=92ETkwe2I_M3cnBRHIn74tn7h4CARucigEr5vLnLGiCXh54vkks9dSuZBJny8uyLByVv_DY--gmxAUQTdzu5WN3oTKS4UxHeuC2IW3uYQ7uCVCA_H1liO14QtgyM70MLuYjkxq51HVcr3gResJHBszX2zjc3GVcz3LC60x_LZOW7cKWu1kIVlJqGFY7o7UvuJ_cMBONfDQ89IUS9fx5Fny-TpFH16kn4QW9HhcGg85sCcrxdgCcewSgwdv3n21ebIDHkpWNdC8D-62C_hcMl_sEhuezqZtfwPxBFqxeTlZ3SjSwEzr4kjngLb5O8I5cjYstcDKvbH0td9iuOO0TG7Q%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their constitutional rights. It is becoming evident to me that 2022 will be a good year for Republicans. 2010 was the year of the Tea Party, but 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=055c20a6f75c4536b36c3aee11a28c54&_e=92ETkwe2I_M3cnBRHIn74tn7h4CARucigEr5vLnLGiCXh54vkks9dSuZBJny8uyLByVv_DY--gmxAUQTdzu5WN3oTKS4UxHeuC2IW3uYQ7uCVCA_H1liO14QtgyM70ML2aBoCqKeERsQ3EuJnSnx4uuRFDhYM0c_WEGKjdIx05_tciQgjwHuCDdevnKefR55PhMcZ6QVCSOimdXsf-G1wvUgLm3KFJeY7F0Pcv9AwYwR1RgMOxFHlPMu9XLJS99dwgOK-BwRz9c3mGsgx8KgW7-nU9S-3_RRcy9iH7wXbBfk3z7eNEQkdVhmHOMBwaCFPmh-mCsJb86u11-Swy_MGQ%3D%3D)

body:
This historic legislation will be life-changing for so many American families and workers.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321296/319305629/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211203-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDIwMmIyYy04ZDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWQVX8PwVye95X9wrPdLQutL8y4Vu-e7u_5VGC_PAIk=)

| Peter,

Last month, Susan and her Democratic colleagues in the House of Representatives voted to pass Joe Biden’s historic investment in America's middle class. This historic legislation will be life-changing for so many American families and workers. Here are just some of the provisions we here on Team Wild are so excited about:
* Medicare negotiation on costs of some prescription drugs. This sets a hugely important precedent and will hopefully pave the way for negotiation on prices of more prescription drugs. Importantly, the cost of insulin will be capped at $35 per month, which is life-changing to so many people here in the district and across the country.
* The nation’s largest-ever investment in combating climate change, including over $170 million in funding for electric vehicle charging stations right here in Pennsylvania. Susan knows that fighting climate change is something that will take consistent, long-term investment, and this is a key step in the right direction.
* Access to affordable child care, including universal Pre-K for every child not just in Pennsylvania but across the nation. Both of these will allow more parents to stay in the workforce and will create a stronger foundation for our next generation.

**Susan has been a tireless champion for these and so many other crucial issues since arriving in Congress, and we can’t afford to lose her advocacy or leadership yet.[_Please, will you chip in $10 or more right away to keep Susan in Congress and keep the House blue in 2022?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321297/319305630/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211203-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDIwMmIyYy04ZDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWQVX8PwVye95X9wrPdLQutL8y4Vu-e7u_5VGC_PAIk=)**

clean_body: This historic legislation will be life-changing for so many American families and workers. | = | Peter, Last month, Susan and her Democratic colleagues in the House of Representatives voted to pass Joe Biden’s historic investment in America's middle class. This historic legislation will be life-changing for so many American families and workers. Here are just some of the provisions we here on Team Wild are so excited about: Medicare negotiation on costs of some prescription drugs. This sets a hugely important precedent and will hopefully pave the way for negotiation on prices of more prescription drugs. Importantly, the cost of insulin will be capped at $35 per month, which is life-changing to so many people here in the district and across the country. The nation’s largest-ever investment in combating climate change, including over $170 million in funding for electric vehicle charging stations right here in Pennsylvania. Susan knows that fighting climate change is something that will take consistent, long-term investment, and this is a key step in the right direction. Access to affordable child care, including universal Pre-K for every child not just in Pennsylvania but across the nation. Both of these will allow more parents to stay in the workforce and will create a stronger foundation for our next generation. Susan has been a tireless champion for these and so many other crucial issues since arriving in Congress, and we can’t afford to lose her advocacy or leadership yet.= | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Team Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: “CVS, Walgreens and Walmart Fueled Opioid Crisis, Jury Finds”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
These huge corporations need to be held accountable for their disregard for Ohioans.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211203-435-footer-ak&t=2&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)
_“A federal jury in Cleveland on Tuesday found that three of the nation’s largest pharmacy chains —**CVS Health, Walmart and Walgreens — had substantially contributed to the crisis of opioid overdoses and deaths in two Ohio counties** , the first time the retail segment of the drug industry has been held accountable in the decades-long epidemic. _ _After hearings in the spring, the trial judge will determine how much each company should pay the counties.”_
---
This is breaking news, and we’re glad that some semblance of justice is finally being handed down to corporations that have put their pursuit of profit over human life.
A federal jury found that CVS, Walmart, and Walgreens turned a blind eye to countless red flags about suspicious opioid orders in Ohio.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16564?t=3&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)
During this campaign, Morgan and our team have already spoken to folks in recovery from drug abuse. It’s heartbreaking, raw, and it's affecting _families, brothers, sons, sisters, mothers, and fathers_.
We believe in universal healthcare, and a system that cares about human lives over the astronomical profits drug companies make from prescription drugs. [**_If you’re with us, can you donate $5 — or anything you can afford today — to send Morgan to the Senate to fight for accountability and a better healthcare system._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16564?t=4&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16777?refcode=em20211203-435&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)**
**We don’t accept a dime of corporate or Big Pharma money for that exact reason.** We’re committed to fighting for the best for Ohioans, not _corporations or Big Pharma_. Accepting their money means accepting their influence and allowing for conflict of interests.
**On the other hand,** **60% of Tim Ryan’s donations come from corporate PACs and he’s taken over $500,000 from the pharmaceutical industry.**
We need a representative in the Senate whose actions speak louder than their words. We need someone who will be bold and fight the good fight. Only Morgan has the track record and the grassroots fundraising to prove that she will do just that. [**_Can you help us keep pace with our corporate-backed opponent? Because we’re powered by small-dollar donations, every contribution makes a huge difference — no matter the size._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16564?t=24&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)
Thank you,
Morgan Harper HQ
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16564?t=25&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211203-435-footer&t=26&refcode2=435_90090_A2woPn&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=435%2E90090%2EA2woPn)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321590/319306899/-2098736573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGVlNmE5OS04ZjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAz94a3S5DZEFf_ZRRr2r8kogjzIS4x9tVWxks3vTbg=&emci=9a44be76-8954-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d8ee6a99-8f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952) | Peter The weather forecast is showing much colder air coming to our area, and for some of our neighbors this can be a difficult time. We are stronger when we come together, and so **I wanted to share with you some local resources that are available for anyone who is struggling with our Central Illinois brand of cold.** Whether you need heating assistance, warm clothes, or a hot meal, I hope you will reach out and get what you need to make sure you and your family are safe as we head into the winter months. Please feel free to share this email with anyone you think might be in need or may know someone who is. **[City Of Champaign Warming Centers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321592/319306901/-26435162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGVlNmE5OS04ZjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAz94a3S5DZEFf_ZRRr2r8kogjzIS4x9tVWxks3vTbg=&emci=9a44be76-8954-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d8ee6a99-8f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952)** [**Central Illinois Food Bank**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321594/319306903/-572944389?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGVlNmE5OS04ZjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAz94a3S5DZEFf_ZRRr2r8kogjzIS4x9tVWxks3vTbg=&emci=9a44be76-8954-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d8ee6a99-8f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952) [**Illinois Valley Economic Development Corporation**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321596/319306905/-378236528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGVlNmE5OS04ZjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAz94a3S5DZEFf_ZRRr2r8kogjzIS4x9tVWxks3vTbg=&emci=9a44be76-8954-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d8ee6a99-8f54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952) We are all in this together. We need to come together as a community to ensure each and every one of us has the resources they need to stay safe this winter. **The warmth of our hearts is blazing, but everyone needs a little extra coziness when times are tough.** Thank you for looking out for each other during this important time. David
---
* * *
David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. **Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on.** Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on.** Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . | Paid for by Palmer for Illinois Palmer for Illinois PO Box 164 Champaign, IL 61874 United States

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfd1l0ij98inm4lfs6fkfclhrgo4k4ecokt44n60_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhehrmcpji6qqj8djlepjmddr2eaqr4ddgmcpm4odkcqp74ddkckon8tb76qon0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3n6kq30sjjcoo71cr4suobapbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztohan1tisl5kqr82prmb8654hso59fmohfjgj3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrbrv5lbc9sf7def9rtt4e33vmqe63m1ajcfivio_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zekd7b5ip9eqsncm6qnskj88udmln5ent8qgji88_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zurav7v43ifpedkofvvg1hn3ut55kerrc5s1bi00_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztgot3sa0cl0l48hdpa5ipacu4nnq206rr1ji94o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjoqlo6ff90gqv0h50dkb2oe770d5fblqte2id8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 12/3/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=1)
---
Friend, Tomorrow is championship Saturday in college football—many of the major conferences are having their conference championship games. But the game that stands alone is the Army vs. Navy game and I'm having a [watch party](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=2) for it next weekend at Bandito Barney's in East Dundee! [Bring your family and friends out on December 11th starting at 1:30pm to join me and many other supporters and veterans to watch these two teams battle for the Commander-in-Chief's Trophy.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=3) Beyond watching some good football, it'll be a great opportunity to meet you and talk about how we can work together to renew our state and defeat JB Pritzker. [Join us by RSVPing here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=4) Full details and sponsorship availabilities are listed on the invitation below. I hope to see you out on the campaign trail soon, if not at our Army vs. Navy watch party. S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer of the week is Sandi Mosak. Sandi is our Wauconda Township Director in Lake County. She recently organized a meeting where I gave my Saddam Trial presentation. Thank you, Sandi, for your support and friendship! [****](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAL-cRqVT8lMkIVjiYjnAijHtVoFiHxt5NiVWecWywUbQ&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=5)[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=6)
* * *
**Kitchen Table Discussion** Lori and I are both suffering from sticker shock after pricing this year's Christmas Eve rib roast (price up almost 50%). Runaway inflation is just one of the consequences of the Biden-Pritzker spend-a-thon. Illinois (and now our nation) has a spending problem—not a revenue problem. I was one of only a handful of Republicans who voted against JB Pritzker's first budget that significantly increased state spending. [If you feel the same way, let me know on my Facebook post!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAlomWyMHq-ZZ8_MPhP7D-vaRTUxRB9_eiLcpDB-hAB_E&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=7)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAb59ln7L2R1y21VWF_68Tan7YuqcqT4qwjBK25sY_vx4&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=8) [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAb59ln7L2R1y21VWF_68Tan7YuqcqT4qwjBK25sY_vx4&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=9)
* * *
**Army-Navy Game Watch Party** [RSVP to attend our watch party here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=10) [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=11)
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=12)** to help us share [this Facebook post](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAb59ln7L2R1y21VWF_68Tan7YuqcqT4qwjBK25sY_vx4&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=13) with more people across Illinois. Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=14).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=15) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=16).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_3&n=17), software for leaders.

name: Dr. Caraveo
subject: Costs go up but wages don’t? Make it make sense.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter: Let’s take action for $15. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39321750/319307531/1561815853?Refcode=ea.c53b0ff2-9054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c53b0ff2-9054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNiMGZmMi05MDU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxfgEdwpvr2OzePlrdGt9247IAhm7v4iR13aoEALoBc=&emci=69af8110-8454-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c53b0ff2-9054-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter,

Despite the rising costs of rent, food, and other essentials, the federal minimum wage has not been raised in over a decade.

If the minimum wage had increased with productivity and the economy, it would be almost $30 by now. But the federal minimum wage is only $7.25, and in Colorado it’s only slightly higher at $12.32.

As a pediatrician working with mostly Medicaid patients, I saw how my patients and their families were affected by so much more than just a lack of health care accessibility. They struggled with housing access, child care, and rent.

**[It’s long past time to make sure every worker can make a living wage. I need 1,000 supporters to sign on and demand Congress increase the federal minimum wage to $15. clean_body: Peter: Let’s take action for $15. | | Peter, Despite the rising costs of rent, food, and other essentials, the federal minimum wage has not been raised in over a decade. If the minimum wage had increased with productivity and the economy, it would be almost $30 by now. But the federal minimum wage is only $7.25, and in Colorado it’s only slightly higher at $12.32. As a pediatrician working with mostly Medicaid patients, I saw how my patients and their families were affected by so much more than just a lack of health care accessibility. They struggled with housing access, child care, and rent. | ** As our economy continues to grapple with the consequences of the pandemic, we must do better. The COVID-19 crisis is a harsh reminder that when we experience economic fallout, it’s people of color who often see the worst impact. Regular economic recovery is not enough to tackle racial disparities. Our leaders need to take action to ensure workers receive the wages they deserve, and a $15 federal minimum wage is a great step in the right direction. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp9ghoqj4v73tiabn15pr3j5sid8bh126ccrjbt0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziacks1u9hps9239hj4tdf0e5a82e43c1pu8s54g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znrlbhdhpm69pgm9b7bjksoqsg6r06o3mnhc5v40_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ptjb59fn5kqvrs1f7r4hk2dqvg1p16ek6sfq0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt5qme7aad98s9stc1trs4fd5j68j2guhjh5tom0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zte2129qbtbl9rnf9j7vi77so1di02ikn1lefg4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqusrn2dfionp0sdthh30nvk1fj3oun9igmbqv0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkalanfmvojm8p92eiuubk8s6ut1sec6l7iufpog_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onkelj78s776pqj4spncgoe9c71euqb2pj56qpb8cb0c9jr1d5le4oe8pj7c3ij1oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrermdud1fqfn0rcp0hn4d8buu86sijdr373kjn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sljmcpj2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carleah=20Summers?=
subject: Endorsed by Tekesha Martinez!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ee36eac7cb36/volunteer-opportunity-happy-thanksgiving-14833822?e=3bc549893c)
---
| |
---
| |
# 12/3 Endorsement!
Hey Team Carleah, have you seen the news?

Hagerstown City Councilwoman, community leader, and inspiration to us all Tekesha Martinez is officially endorsing Carleah for Congress!

_"It’s with great pride that I’d like to officially endorse my friend and community champion Carleah Summers in her run for Congress. Carleah’s already incredible track record of service and leadership in the recovery community is just the beginning and I am beyond excited to see what she does next for us. I couldn’t imagine a more devoted, caring person to represent District 6!"_

Make sure to check out and share our posts on social media to spread this great announcement!

In the meantime, we would also appreciate a [small donation, even of $10 or $15](https://carleahsummers.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f56790a135a1d688e4182dde&id=39cd9f8f02&e=3bc549893c), to mark the occasion. Tekesha made her way into Hagerstown City Council with small donors, and that's how we intend to make it to Congress!

Make sure to get in your donations before our end-of-year FEC deadline so we can have a strong showing and prove that District 6 is ready for change!

In solidarity,

Brett Guessford
_Campaign Advisor_

subject: Together We Can Do This!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/95265d29b625/conforti-for-congress-5041569?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,
As you know, the 2022 election will be critical for the future of this country.

It will take all of us working together to take back our District and turn it red!

After the holidays, my campaign will be charging ahead to win the Primary election in June and represent the Republican Party in the General next November. Today, I am asking for your help. We will need additional staff to help with phone calls, set meet & greets, and gather petitions.

Can I count on you to lend a hand to win the election and take back our country?

Simply reply to this email, and we will add you to our growing list. We'll be reaching out with more details individually.

Thank you, and together we can make a difference!! [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=1c0184377e&e=25f4fa3311) to donate to my campaign and help get our country back on track.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

body:
President Trump would be so thrilled to see your name.
Christmas will be here before you know it, Peter. We just launched our official Christmas card for President Trump and Melania -- and your signature is currently **[MISSING]**.
[**T****his is our third time reaching out. We 're hoping to hit our ambitious goal of ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND SIGNATURES before midnight tonight****.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931711:JCBT7NENu:m:1:3253819041:A5A461CE6B7A851AE44CBEA19A1D5205:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58931711:JCBT7NENu:m:1:3253819041:A5A461CE6B7A851AE44CBEA19A1D5205:r)

Deadline: **11:59 PM TONIGHT**

As President and First Lady, Donald and Melania Trump did _so much_ to Make America Great Again -- the least we can do is wish them a Merry Christmas. We promise you: it won't take more than a few minutes of your time to sign our official card.

Will you help us hit our ambitious goal? We want to show the Trump family how many Americans appreciate all their incredible work.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6545%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CN%2beEvfZxmaFSyhMbfRA%2fA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68588%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DYHjAdRxINTmo0Xu03nlVw&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68589%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vEwgT5kjUFd9MMuXCbOzwA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68588%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DYHjAdRxINTmo0Xu03nlVw&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68580%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wk55I7boINlKh25ba4g00w&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68581%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=autnb3LF0mefXgyOpIm6Ug&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68582%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WvyIbY3zQFgGuSZplWmV9g&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6545%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CN%2beEvfZxmaFSyhMbfRA%2fA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6545%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CN%2beEvfZxmaFSyhMbfRA%2fA&sysid=1)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6546%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZMv%2bgzXdJjL9a%2fZSv38aBw&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68584%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X%2bOy18RD5rWzhnjr%2bt4KwA&sysid=1)
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68584%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X%2bOy18RD5rWzhnjr%2bt4KwA&sysid=1) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ --and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021 --but we need your help to do it.**** **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68595%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9aCCGtB4T9WIqhWIDhmGdw&sysid=1) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68596%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5jb1kyYB8QIywVlDfhWA6g&sysid=1)**[?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68597%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hJMXjmNXERNOjSPjdT1%2fHw&sysid=1) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68598%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DXKqMV1xuww0XP9CAA05ow&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68599%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fpftgr5HHtzBz13wcSP7Gw&sysid=1)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68590%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wVJ%2bbMQvTr95pCqqo2Vb5Q&sysid=1) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen--by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68591%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u9lWTEzP01xEYP9eUgOLuQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68592%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kjDneysmRrgerF%2bRZL7CpQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68593%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n6plqiJYxwZfyZMWAQmFWg&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68594%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IYcSjx0%2fq2l543PTtIIa%2fw&sysid=1)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on--_and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** --[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68505%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UU7fzhHVdZUtLu2L5cNw5g&sysid=1)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6546%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZMv%2bgzXdJjL9a%2fZSv38aBw&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6546%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZMv%2bgzXdJjL9a%2fZSv38aBw&sysid=1)

name: Iowa Senate Alert
subject: will you CONDEMN Sen. Grassley for blocking gun safety reforms?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
This is appalling:
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: Sen. Grassley (R-IA) ****Blocks Background Checks in the Wake of Michigan School Shooting**
This is appalling, Peter.
Just days after the tragic shooting at a Michigan high school, Sen. Grassley SHATTERED hopes of reform by blocking unanimous consent on a common-sense background check bill.
This legislation would make all of our communities safer, and the vast majority of Americans support these measures. But Sen. Grassley stopped this bill from advancing – preventing us from doing anything to break this deadly cycle of gun violence.
Once again he's put the gun lobby and their interests ahead of the safety and well-being of Americans. It's heartless, it's wrong and it's dangerous.
**We must CONDEMN Sen. Grassley and show that we're sick and tired of him pushing his far-right, out-of-touch and deadly gun policies on our communities.**
But we can only stop them and win real victories with a united, grassroots team. **That's why we need 276 more Democrats to respond to our live poll before 11:59 p.m. and denounce Sen. Grassley's actions. So please, Peter, will you make your voice heard?**
**Do you CONDEMN Sen. Grassley for blocking background checks?**

clean_body: This is appalling: | | | BREAKING NEWS: Sen. Grassley (R-IA) Blocks Background Checks in the Wake of Michigan School Shooting This is appalling, Peter. Just days after the tragic shooting at a Michigan high school, Sen. Grassley SHATTERED hopes of reform by blocking unanimous consent on a common-sense background check bill. This legislation would make all of our communities safer, and the vast majority of Americans support these measures. But Sen. Grassley stopped this bill from advancing – preventing us from doing anything to break this deadly cycle of gun violence. Once again he's put the gun lobby and their interests ahead of the safety and well-being of Americans. It's heartless, it's wrong and it's dangerous. We must CONDEMN Sen. Grassley and show that we're sick and tired of him pushing his far-right, out-of-touch and deadly gun policies on our communities. But we can only stop them and win real victories with a united, grassroots team. That's why we need 276 more Democrats to respond to our live poll before 11:59 p.m. and denounce Sen.
