name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom’s Student Mandate – Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Waterloo](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorfxYaoWoKOY57jl9YLQw77Mb43IRvj-0DyyaQ2Ig3Dbw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_3&n=1) On October 1, Newsom announced his student vaccine mandate. A press release oozing with self-satisfaction declared California the “first state in the nation." Two months later, we remain the _only_ state. New York, Michigan, Illinois, and every other state – red or blue – has rejected his mandate. Newsom thought he'd be a hero. He’s now looking to save face. Families are leaving public education in droves; school boards are passing resolutions of opposition by the dozen; parents are banding together and fighting back. Many Californians who accepted previous mandates are seeing with fresh eyes what’s been going on all along. There's a sense this is Newsom’s Waterloo: the moment where his corruption and publicity-seeking have caught up with him, where his disregard for personal freedom and the rule of law have finally gone too far. Newsom is also maintaining his school mask mandate despite [new scientific findings](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=y8n46rkHVBQIC4m9-n5Hz8d6YyN-YT-dbOgc2mV189aPPsDgMZdI9xRcbGbBjjERNIKC4crdj8p6X70s3Qc-74U1kK-PCzKFfKCu-dRe3Ao&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_3&n=2) on the harm to kids. Incredibly, some districts are still requiring masks _outdoors._ At a hearing this week, I asked the San Diego Superintendent for evidence to justify this policy. He [couldn’t provide any](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvXjywgur4GeOjOHd8mH7XJFQ0m83c6yO9Qb34JnHHXLkTH1fbL8o88UQKGGvDl_Dg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_3&n=3). We now know the virus will be “endemic." What remains to be seen is whether the collapse of our form of government will be as well. This is the time to fight. [Support our fight for sanity in California](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0JHWSzI75LyWvC6h1sivRLtVVWDof7SVZORZZbP1UPz4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_3&n=4) [Share This Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxNwJTVRlzF0T7Romq71QwC_hFcnB9cDBtCgMMz0IOL0w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_3&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_3&n=6)California Legislator

If someone at your job made vile, racist, Islamaphobic comments that directly endangered the life of another colleague, they would most likely get fired. **But in Congress, with Kevin McCarthy as GOP Leader, there seems to be a different set of rules.** A few days ago, Lauren Boebert — an extremist right-wing Congresswoman — unleashed a verbal attack on Congresswoman Ilhan Omar that directly contributed to even more violent threats made against her.
Kevin McCarthy has taken no meaningful action. **Instead of condemning the attacks, he’s helped prop up other people in Congress who share Lauren’s views and neglected to outright condemn them.** If he becomes Speaker next year, that means people like Lauren will have even MORE power to make these kinds of dangerous statements without consequence. We can’t let that happen. **Not on our watch**. [**We need leaders who will fight for folks all across our district by fighting for economic, reproductive, and racial justice. clean_body: | | | If someone at your job made vile, racist, Islamaphobic comments that directly endangered the life of another colleague, they would most likely get fired. But in Congress, with Kevin McCarthy as GOP Leader, there seems to be a different set of rules. A few days ago, Lauren Boebert — an extremist right-wing Congresswoman — unleashed a verbal attack on Congresswoman Ilhan Omar that directly contributed to even more violent threats made against her. Kevin McCarthy has taken no meaningful action. Instead of condemning the attacks, he’s helped prop up other people in Congress who share Lauren’s views and neglected to outright condemn them. If he becomes Speaker next year, that means people like Lauren will have even MORE power to make these kinds of dangerous statements without consequence. We can’t let that happen. Not on our watch. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Kevin McCarthy would rather stay in the good graces of the most extreme wing of his party — in order to stay in power — than condemn such dangerous actions. Here’s the good news: folks like you, from all over our district and across the country, are ready for a change. You’ve been helping build a grassroots movement to defeat him and bring a different kind of leadership that listens and leads with the people in mind. I’m so grateful you’re in this fight. Let's go, Bruno | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

A brand new public poll of the North Carolina Senate race was just released, and we’re in a dead heat. Take a look:

Pat McCrory (R): 42%

name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 3rd for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39322612/319325713/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZjZWM5ZS05YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PwkSnQTpC08bn5YH4vwFDiO4QWD0KtKAfUf6iCpWTHo=)

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 3rd, 2021**
Peter,
From all of us here at Team Tom, we hope you had a lovely Thanksgiving! As we gear up for the holiday season, we know that we wouldn’t be where we are today without your support.
Thank you for your continued support of our campaign, and we look forward to staying in touch with exciting updates from the trail.
Best,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39322613/319325737/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZjZWM5ZS05YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PwkSnQTpC08bn5YH4vwFDiO4QWD0KtKAfUf6iCpWTHo=&emci=64e47cff-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=346cec9e-9b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom kicked off his week with a “Lawyers for Tom” fundraiser at Pour Vino N’ Hops in Rockville. It was a great event where Tom got to share his vision for the state of Maryland with dedicated change agents in Montgomery County.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39322614/319325751/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZjZWM5ZS05YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PwkSnQTpC08bn5YH4vwFDiO4QWD0KtKAfUf6iCpWTHo=&emci=64e47cff-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=346cec9e-9b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom was greeted by a full house of Roland Park residents ready for progressive change here in Maryland. He spoke in depth with folks about his vision to create a stronger Baltimore, because Maryland only succeeds when Baltimore succeeds.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39322615/319325755/-1828914841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZjZWM5ZS05YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PwkSnQTpC08bn5YH4vwFDiO4QWD0KtKAfUf6iCpWTHo=&emci=64e47cff-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=346cec9e-9b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
On Thursday, Tom had the privilege of participating in a gubernatorial forum hosted by Our Black Party. Candace Hollingsworth, the founder of Our Black Party and former Mayor of Hyattsville, is a tireless leader who has dedicated her career to ensuring that Black Marylanders have access to opportunity in our state and across the country. Thank you, Candace, for your lifelong commitment to creating positive change, and for allowing Tom to join you in your important conversations.
* * *

2930 Carroll Ave, Takoma Park, MD 20912
**[RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39322616/319325756/451613558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZjZWM5ZS05YjU0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PwkSnQTpC08bn5YH4vwFDiO4QWD0KtKAfUf6iCpWTHo=&emci=64e47cff-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=346cec9e-9b54-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)**

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 3rd, 2021 Peter, From all of us here at Team Tom, we hope you had a lovely Thanksgiving! As we gear up for the holiday season, we know that we wouldn’t be where we are today without your support. Thank you for your continued support of our campaign, and we look forward to staying in touch with exciting updates from the trail. Best, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail Tom kicked off his week with a “Lawyers for Tom” fundraiser at Pour Vino N’ Hops in Rockville. It was a great event where Tom got to share his vision for the state of Maryland with dedicated change agents in Montgomery County. Tom was greeted by a full house of Roland Park residents ready for progressive change here in Maryland. He spoke in depth with folks about his vision to create a stronger Baltimore, because Maryland only succeeds when Baltimore succeeds. On Thursday, Tom had the privilege of participating in a gubernatorial forum hosted by Our Black Party. Candace Hollingsworth, the founder of Our Black Party and former Mayor of Hyattsville, is a tireless leader who has dedicated her career to ensuring that Black Marylanders have access to opportunity in our state and across the country. Thank you, Candace, for your lifelong commitment to creating positive change, and for allowing Tom to join you in your important conversations. Volunteer with us! Montgomery County Canvass Saturday, December 4, 2021 | 10AM-12PM 2930 Carroll Ave, Takoma Park, MD 20912 Baltimore Regional Canvass with AFSCME Saturday, December 4, 2021 | 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM MITAGS 692 Maritime Blvd, Linthicum Heights, MD 21090 #TeamTom for a rally and sign wave ahead of the Committee for Montgomery’s Legislative Breakfast Gubernatorial Forum Friday, December 10, 2021 | 6:30 AM - 8:30 AM Bethesda North Marriott Hotel & Conference Center 5701 Marinelli Rd, Rockville, MD 20852 ICYMI Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on . subject: My meeting with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Walsh for Congress
body:
This week, I was in Florida for a brief campaign visit, and I was honored to have the opportunity to meet President Donald J. Trump. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/80dc1352ac47/my-meeting-with-president-trump?e=4df934edcc)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

This week, I was in Florida for a brief campaign visit, and I was honored to have the opportunity to meet President Donald J. Trump.

Of course, the President was busy, but he was very generous with his time. We discussed Missouri politics and my race. He asked lots of questions and listened intently. The conversation lasted about ten minutes, and he very graciously obliged my request for a photo with him, which is below:

Before we met, I couldn’t help but think back to my childhood. I grew up down a dirt road in rural Missouri. Back then, I never could have imagined that one day I might have a conversation with the President of the United States.

We live in a wonderful country—one where anything is possible if you dream big and work hard.

But those values are under attack by socialists and career politicians in Washington, DC.

Now more than ever, we must resolve to Defend the American Dream. I promise that I will never stop fighting—and I hope you won’t either.

If you’d like to help, consider [making a donation](https://saraformissouri.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=84aa3adf8d6ab062aee220759&id=50fbd2cb03&e=4df934edcc) to the campaign.

God Bless!
Sara Walsh

name: James Tarantin
subject: Jerusalem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ce846f54916f403a9869b02f4304ffb1&_e=yG6LJiF0u5GfasI1QLoHN1NiMNZ3cvHzjZ2jUjoXu1TCgCBJ76aKwz-U3Nfyz3ySxDE7ijb5OWxiEE2o2Vot-5Onhk5RyVL84HUSqRRm-FGazrw7kWbCriNvEYa76YEoF0sgzv5k0mdMOWF_o6-vTvgd3LHD5hZ9E_ZOR_9Bc8bQk7vHJV63v0u0MbMgrRuiP9jPJ8ZFF-N13ac__T9rTx4R-gDf__mI4SU7-okoiR0P76PSe9uHfvBImYkeR1kdEjSq9KAbSmeVXUiG0TgxbMw54FUabfexHUDQw6VCQw98lcvPdj25JZqTtL-Qq30W1MS3d8r2Ucxd4ObpjN_drUBl1v9WHvgfyJcp9G7Y_OiRbvc4ancMiU4Z0GsE1nD1DwC48d_5nrY8D-wuyVzoXg5NdiGiX51INxeygFDYHW2M7o4M0UyrowICxo8jz2nGgv1vKvJh6zlvoJOgvnMW-suLBNYA3MQIbUwT6orM1Gg%3D)

Hey Fellow American,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ce846f54916f403a9869b02f4304ffb1&_e=yG6LJiF0u5GfasI1QLoHN1NiMNZ3cvHzjZ2jUjoXu1TCgCBJ76aKwz-U3Nfyz3ySxDE7ijb5OWxiEE2o2Vot-5Onhk5RyVL84HUSqRRm-FGazrw7kWbCriNvEYa76YEoF0sgzv5k0mdMOWF_o6-vTvgd3LHD5hZ9E_ZOR_9Bc8bQk7vHJV63v0u0MbMgrRuiP9jPJ8ZFF-N13ac__T9rTx4R-gDf__mI4SU7-okoiR0P76PSe9uHfvBImYkeR1kdEjSq9KAbSmeVXUiG0TgxbFcInCqeJWzQMSgRibU-Pb4X5jN7YYEzt0oZmHO8uA2t6H_GwFTeXIgJwn6jR5xcrQLykOeds0OLD9Vm-ffXTUwd77hxext4p5KEfotkquyJDNbZe9z-n0PGHn3tqfPXJ1sNN2fiXLLTf3TZKgCzXy10LzM6g6eV0Lb6zjBwuNSL_Z0nKPsGRiBtYOAoC-_ITz_ZYIstX5dbfX97jl5JbY0%3D)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. clean_body: Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. | Hey Fellow American, I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world. Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision. I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. END OF STORY. The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel. Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values. We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate. subject: Tony Evers is in trouble
body:
Cook Political Report: WI-GOV race is now a TOSS-UP!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cook_political_e_solicit_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- It’s official: Tony Evers is in trouble. **Cook Political Report just moved the ranking of Wisconsin’s gubernatorial election from Lean Democrat to Toss-Up.** [**The momentum is on our side, and we can’t miss this opportunity.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVrJUGVLUdMzikHoVxUlE6l6HnqwkbARF1L0qLWEW1V6U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cook_political_e_solicit_v3&n=2) According to the report:****_“Most damning for Evers though was when the [Marquette Law School] poll asked whether he should be re-elected: only 40% said definitely/probably, while 53% said they'd definitely/probably vote for someone else. While named ballots once a nominee is chosen will, of course, tell us a more exact snapshot of the race, these are numbers an incumbent doesn't want a year out from the midterms.”_ **This is a HUGE indicator of the momentum leading into 2022, Friend – but it won’t matter unless we step up to the plate.** There is no doubt that Washington, DC, New York, and California Democrats are going to do everything they can to keep Tony Evers in office. The Republican Party of Wisconsin relies on grassroots supporters like you to keep up, and we won’t be able to bridge the gap without your help. [**Chip in just $20.22 right now to make sure we can build on the momentum!**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVrJUGVLUdMzikHoVxUlE6l6HnqwkbARF1L0qLWEW1V6U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cook_political_e_solicit_v3&n=3) We want to send a message to the coastal Democrats that we are prepared to take back the Governor’s Office and elect a conservative who will stand up for Wisconsin families – not the far-left fringe and coastal liberals. **If 100 people chip in $20.22 right now, we will add $2,022 to our efforts to equip grassroots with the latest tools and data, so that we can take our message directly to the voters. Let’s show the Swamp that Wisconsin grassroots supporters are ready for the fight ahead.** [**Together, we can show Democrats what Wisconsin grassroots conservatives are made of. Can you help?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVrJUGVLUdMzikHoVxUlE6l6HnqwkbARF1L0qLWEW1V6U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cook_political_e_solicit_v3&n=4) Thanks, Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVrJUGVLUdMzikHoVxUlE6l6HnqwkbARF1L0qLWEW1V6U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cook_political_e_solicit_v3&n=5 "CONTRIBUTE $20.22") [CONTRIBUTE $20.22](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVrJUGVLUdMzikHoVxUlE6l6HnqwkbARF1L0qLWEW1V6U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cook_political_e_solicit_v3&n=5)

His disastrous socialist policies have tanked our economy and sent the cost of basic goods like food and gasoline through the roof. I’m counting on you to help me EXPOSE just how unpopular Biden really is. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

****President Joe Biden is proving to Americans how little he cares for our economy. ****

The Biden administration’s US Commerce Department imposed a tariff on Canadian softwood lumber to 17.99%, more than doubling the rate from the previous administration. This action is an attack on American families, prolonging the already peak pricing that’s been imposed by the Biden Administration. Just this month we saw statistics proving this administration is unable to promote economic progress, having missed job growth expectations once again, and to an [exceptionally disappointing](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cnbc.com%2F2021%2F12%2F03%2Fjobs-report-november-2021.html/1/0100017d81f85cbf-15713878-dcf4-4340-9d07-68bdcd2b1e49-000000/FYvWe2yzn4I2T2bFo42RsVqQA6o=247) degree. Despite this, it’s evident lumber costs will increase well over 10% and the Biden Administration remains inculpable, insisting they hold no accountability for resulting inflation spikes or stagnant job creation.

More so, instead of taking a stand for Granite Staters, our Federal Delegation remains in lockstep with an administration that has no desire to help it’s constituents find an economic foothold. Senator Hassan, Senator Jean Shaheen, Representative Chris Pappas, and Representative Kuster need to show some loyalty to the voters who elected them, instead of blindly following behind the likes of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer.

On a more positive note, the Christmas season is underway and local Republican committees are hosting tons of fun events to attend through December 2021! There are plenty of opportunities to celebrate this season with fellow Granite State Republicans, so check out the events section for more information.

To all those who celebrate, I wish you a very Happy Hanukkah. Hanukkah Sameach!

Finally, the Derry Special Election is approaching this Tuesday, so we are in the final stretch of efforts to secure a Republican win for Derry residents. Whether you’d be willing to knock doors, make phone calls or join in on Election Day efforts, everyone should find a way to contribute to her campaign. Check out her website **[**HERE,**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.jodiforderry.org%2Fget-involved/1/0100017d81f85cbf-15713878-dcf4-4340-9d07-68bdcd2b1e49-000000/YoUZVYsCPJu3FSCDGX_aJaXMTkQ=247)**to find out more about how you can get involved. ******

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

_**Majority Leader Osborne Comments:**_

“In 1945, New Hampshire adopted our state motto ‘Live Free or Die,’ as a constant reminder of the utmost importance of our rights. This phrase epitomizes New Hampshire’s commitment to freedom and individual liberty, so it should be no surprise that we are the national leader in empowering individuals to embrace the unalienable rights that we are endowed with.
“Last year, we made significant achievements in advancing the freedoms of Granite Staters. We empowered parents to make the best educational choices for their children by passing Education Freedom Accounts. We cut over $170 million in taxes and put money back in the pockets of all Granite Staters. Even with this progress, there is always more work to be done. In 2022, House Republicans will continue to expand individual liberties, fight an intrusive and overreaching federal government, and protect the New Hampshire Advantage.”

| **Morse: Biden Policies Make This Holiday Season Less Than Bright**
November 24, 2021
It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas, and for many of us who weren’t able to spend last year’s holidays with friends and family, it can’t come soon enough!
While the pandemic is not over, we are returning to normalcy and that is a very good thing.
But at the risk of sounding like a Grinch, the news isn’t all good. This holiday season is shaping up to be another challenging one for many New Hampshire families, as we are seeing a new set of problems, unrelated to the pandemic, that threaten to derail our holidays yet again.
First and foremost: Inflation. If you feel like your dollar isn’t going as far this year as it did last year, you’re not alone. When polled, most Americans have said inflation is the most serious issue we face today. In October, the rate of inflation was 6.2 percent, the highest it’s been in 30 years. Gas prices in New Hampshire are up more than a dollar a gallon since Biden took office. Grocery prices, car prices, and appliance prices are all up across the board as well. Shopping for Thanksgiving dinner this year is the most expensive it has ever been.
And that’s assuming that the store shelves aren’t empty. Supply chain issues and worker shortages are coming to a head. Container ships are sitting at docks around the country with no one to unload them. Stores and restaurants are cutting back operating hours, or shutting down completely.
The majority of people in these same polls put the blame squarely on the Biden administration and our federal delegation, and for good reason. Runaway spending and failed economic policies have forced the inflation rate up and the Democrats in Washington have failed to adequately address the real problems that Americans care about. Democrats have instead chosen to spend their time waging culture wars and threatening legal actions against parents with the audacity to question their local school boards and take interest in their child’s education.
Since Day One of his presidency, Joe Biden and the Democrats in Washington have sought to remake America into a country that few of us recognize, and even fewer wanted.
When President Biden visited our state a few weeks ago to sell his infrastructure bill, an interview with a Woodstock resident named Guy Hoover went viral on social media. Mr. Hoover was asked about the President coming to his town and expressed that he is far more concerned with being able to afford to heat his home this winter. He is far from alone. Home heating oil and natural gas prices are skyrocketing at the worst possible time.
These are the real concerns that real people have. These are the new worries that threaten to keep us from traveling to visit our families. These are the issues being discussed at kitchen tables and keeping parents up at night.
It’s time that Washington stops talking and starts listening.
**Sen. Chuck Morse (R-Salem) is President of the New Hampshire Senate. He wrote this for New Hampshire Journal.
**

name: Team Ryan
subject: State of the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1629%2E3611125%2EY_jyT8 ][IMG]

Folks, we wanted to give you a quick rundown on the state of our
battleground race:

FIRST: Polls showed Tim beating Republican JD Vance by only one point and
right-winger Josh Mandel is only slightly ahead of Tim!

THEN: Tim’s GOP opponents wrote themselves huge checks from their
multi-million-dollar bank accounts. And the super PACs supporting them are
spending millions of dollars on early TV ad buys.

NOW: We’re headed into the midterms as “Democrats’ most important 2022
candidate,” which means we CAN’T fall short of our fundraising goals. The
GOP knows that the only way they can take back the Senate majority is by
defeating Tim -- so they’re DETERMINED to undermine us at every
opportunity.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6235?t=1007&akid=1629%2E3611125%2EY_jyT8 ]Can we count on you to chip in RIGHT NOW to keep our campaign
competitive? The GOP has virtually unlimited resources to use against us
and without your support we’ll be left vulnerable to their nasty attacks.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6236?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1629%2E3611125%2EY_jyT8 ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6236?t=1015&amount=50&akid=1629%2E3611125%2EY_jyT8 ]Donate $50

National Republicans and wealthy GOP donors are already throwing millions
of dollars at this race, making huge ad buys, and trying to drown out our
pro-worker message with their far-right propaganda.

Time is ticking for us to build the team it’ll take to fight back against
the GOP’s attack machine and elect a Senator who will cut workers in on
the deal.

We can ONLY do that with the help of our grassroots supporters like YOU.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6235?t=1008&akid=1629%2E3611125%2EY_jyT8 ]Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more and help flip this seat
blue?

-- Team Ryan

name: ACTION NEEDED (via VPP)
subject: tell Sen. Manchin to PASS Build Back Better!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6)
---
| **BREAKING! BREAKING! BREAKING!** **_Manchin Holds Off on Committing to Advance Biden’s Agenda This Year_**
---
[Team: We can’t stand on the sidelines and accept this — add your name and tell Manchin to STEP UP and pass President Biden’s agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Manchin_PET/?refcode=VPP_20211203_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6)
---
Team, this was a tough headline to read:

Joe Biden’s agenda is at risk — **_and not only because of MAGA obstructionists!_**

While Senator Joe Manchin is waiting for a bipartisan miracle, it’s CLEAR that President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda cannot wait one more day.

**That’s why we need dedicated Democrats like you to stand with us and sign our petition calling on him to support President Biden’s agenda!**

[Please Team, if we don’t get 5,000 signatures this won’t even be worth sending to Sen. Manchin. ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Manchin_PET/?refcode=VPP_20211203_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6)
[SUPPORT THE BUILD BACK BETTER AGENDA!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Manchin_PET/?refcode=VPP_20211203_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6)
---
Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=987%2E878179%2EoJfTB6)

name: John Isemann
subject: Momentum, Team, Money
body:
Hi Peter

Reaching out to share what’s going on behind the scenes _(beyond what you’ve seen on Fox & Facebook)_ and to discuss how you can get involved.

So many have asked [**“how’s it going & how can we help?”**](https://isemann.us/donate)

Well...here is just a brief update on everything we've done and how you can help us do even more..._(and why financial support is so important today through Dec. 31st)_

**_Momentum:_**
Our campaign has organically _(unpaid)_ reached over 1 million people around the country - across [television](https://fb.watch/9AZzuGcXxn/), [local](https://patch.com/new-jersey/longvalley/long-valley-resident-puts-hat-ring-malinowski-s-seat) and [national](https://nj1015.com/these-valiant-millennial-candidates-could-change-nj-for-good-opinion/) news, [radio](https://fb.watch/9AZwRvo_rH/), and [social media](https://fb.watch/9AvUoqrb1d/). We've visited 35 of the 74 towns in our district connecting with voters, business owners, and elected officials from all 6 counties.

**_Team:_**
We've built a team with experience that ranges from [Glen Youngkin's Campaign](https://numinar.com/case-studies) to the Long Valley Republican Committee, the [George W. Bush White House](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cmmarston/) to some of the fastest growing startups in the country, [The Jack Kemp Foundation](https://www.jackkempfoundation.org/) to tech incubators in Newark. This team has built dozens of successful campaigns and scaled even more successful companies. We're supported by dozens of advisors, interns, and volunteers - including US House & Senate Staffers, veterans, corporate board members and non-profit leaders, former candidates and elected officials from school board to secretary of state - all excited and passionate about flipping the house, changing the state/country, and starting it all in NJ-07.

**_Fundraising/Money:_**
We've been blown away by the financial support from donors like you across the state and country _(14 states!)_. All of this done without the annoying emails and gimmicky deadlines, negative narratives, or overpaid consultants _(who often take 20-80% off the top)_ \- which have become disappointingly standard to political campaigns. We're spending conservatively, incentivizing effectively, and a few of us - myself included - have quit our jobs to do this full time on no salary.

**This unconventional campaign is made possible by your unconventional support**. Many of you have given to a political campaign for the first time - whether it was $5, $504 _(our campaign avg.)_ or $5,000 - taking a chance on the idea that we can actually change politics, a party, and a nation. The truth is we can and we are. Look how far we've come in just 56 days. To those of you who have already given and supported, THANK YOU.

**For those of you yet to contribute - candidly, we need you NOW.** We have just 30 days left in our first fundraising quarter. We need to double our fundraising this month - not only so we can double the size of our team and pace of or campaign, but so when we report our fundraising figures on Dec. 31st we send a message of momentum to the state and national party, our competition, and donors/PACs around the country.

If you're considering giving to our campaign at any point I ask you do it TODAY****_(_[**_GIVE HERE: isemann.us/donate_**](https://isemann.us/donate) _)_! And if you have any questions - shoot me a text or call _(_**_908-448-8711_** _)_**_._**

Thank you,
John

**John H. Isemann
**(908) 448-8711
[ji@johnisemann.com](mailto:ji@johnisemann.com)

[johnisemann.com](http://johnisemann.com)

clean_body: It’s been a big week for Team Schmidt. We wanted to check in with you to make sure you saw Derek’s last few emails. Derek joined Fox News this week t Friend, It’s been a big week for Team Schmidt. We wanted to check in with you to make sure you saw Derek’s last few emails. Derek joined Fox News this week to discuss... ✅ The need to CUT the grocery sales tax here in Kansas ✅ The BIG VICTORY in court blocking vaccine mandates for Kansas health care workers Derek is fighting hard to bring relief to Kansas families struggling to keep up under Biden’s inflationary policies. Derek is working every day to fight unconstitutional vaccine mandates in court – especially when they threaten our most vulnerable in rural Kansas hospitals and nursing homes. –Team Schmidt \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, In case you didn’t get a chance to watch my appearance on Fox News yesterday, I wanted to make sure you heard the big news... Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandates were dealt another MASSIVE blow in federal court this week: we obtained a preliminary injunction blocking the CMS mandate for health care workers. I believe that Kansans should be trusted to make their own medical decisions, and that no president has the authority Joe Biden is claiming, which is why I took him to court. This is a major win for the fundamental rights of every American to make their own health care decisions, and a major win for rural Kansas health care that could be devastated if this mandate ever goes into effect. WATCH me discuss on Fox & Friends here: This win is just the next step in our battle against Biden’s excessive federal overreach. I’m not stopping here, but I’m going to need your help to sustain our efforts. - Thank you for any support you can give, friend. It means a lot to have you on my team, and I promise to keep leading the charge day in and day out to protect you and your family. Sincerely, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fd634f719d47464bac8d9e28e35c665a&_e=FiDxJLffrJYnK8i0OYIskXg70PNtsWxI_k11XIM60bne3Heayd-1lpdxZ4vNT-w9obqZ-QVKgC55Js_h5MuXO8-76bVrNL-MTRnguS3Mg5Xil7pQJmOve1AP2nrS5RhTC3MMXqI86C_ooPq0y79zJjDQ6ztT7eVaxdimMDPj8SmwfQEY0j71wCh4LZCtX_OLZT9vs-taQdDT8B75jQjCuqinhfYRNENdVutaR2zqVhCvniqa9bVTUQF83nq0iQxsPJLMMuk6rOjWKVP_2DmO3WXZmNyFdM0CP8iNKR2V0jnwWywM1CebTuWquoy3zJT4nBLVUEjfQeOhRUIc1OCWmpF3FV7mIWIQapfPl3POyV6_GUeD5IugjdD-3Qa54ZtI9pyiiv8NvC3UqYqsSkFjnPdSyrB3FsE-mM6chqSwolkDjFhTu59E8KJlFIbnJEQ_QlMu-rnRBJERBlI1ZEe0OGALY7yKymaxfUbf2Lo6Rabcuc39k-KSRZWsgZ6koTLT)

Hey Peter,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fd634f719d47464bac8d9e28e35c665a&_e=FiDxJLffrJYnK8i0OYIskXg70PNtsWxI_k11XIM60bne3Heayd-1lpdxZ4vNT-w9obqZ-QVKgC55Js_h5MuXO8-76bVrNL-MTRnguS3Mg5Xil7pQJmOve1AP2nrS5RhTC3MMXqI86C_ooPq0y79zJjDQ6ztT7eVaxdimMDPj8SmwfQEY0j71wCh4LZCtX_OLZT9vs-taQdDT8B75jQjCuqinhfYRNENdVutaR2zqVhCvniqa9bVTUQF83nq0iQxsPJLMMuk6rOjWKVP_2DmO3WXZmNyFdM0CP8iNKR2V0jmhL3s6kAC1o__oXdrTpP_ZX_UoYQZlPk_Bnzy9SxHgX1CjQCn7MWjiZSMJ24ZN1qC4GuwuGfs0U4NkDL5wJXFsGDV9VvSeedsym3sToZLeEsgxwza6aUVujkgAESlZZMbYGr4nk6Ogm6waobt7_eWVW-YxdH0VpPbRhJYw9tZjfY8XnUh8DXgNHNzWq-D7vg6EH9NY7XmAe6Hbd1MhqJqP)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Peter?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fd634f719d47464bac8d9e28e35c665a&_e=FiDxJLffrJYnK8i0OYIskXg70PNtsWxI_k11XIM60bne3Heayd-1lpdxZ4vNT-w9obqZ-QVKgC55Js_h5MuXO8-76bVrNL-MTRnguS3Mg5Xil7pQJmOve1AP2nrS5RhTC3MMXqI86C_ooPq0y79zJjDQ6ztT7eVaxdimMDPj8SmwfQEY0j71wCh4LZCtX_OLZT9vs-taQdDT8B75jQjCuqinhfYRNENdVutaR2zqVhCvniqa9bVTUQF83nq0iQxsPJLMMuk6rOjWKVP_2DmO3WXZmNyFdM0CP8iNKR2V0jk83NxDdb0pst0ltptKct1sJXemJ8h1tBO0DggD_BKDZ4a86ZV7EzJ38VnhrMMWYSdUq0Gja-NQORviCYu3q_gy4c0FmWURRhxPjOVgMkGK0vYBEwUyjqD9IR75kYCbSjEcFL8j9ibDxP3qpw2QXS4R7JrDkzMqzQ8E3htsXNfpqb5-2dbv8TucUq6p0X0yvkH_8gxYYm2j7wuDuZ5dyYHg)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, and let’s finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fd634f719d47464bac8d9e28e35c665a&_e=FiDxJLffrJYnK8i0OYIskXg70PNtsWxI_k11XIM60bne3Heayd-1lpdxZ4vNT-w9obqZ-QVKgC55Js_h5MuXO8-76bVrNL-MTRnguS3Mg5Xil7pQJmOve1AP2nrS5RhTC3MMXqI86C_ooPq0y79zJjDQ6ztT7eVaxdimMDPj8SmwfQEY0j71wCh4LZCtX_OLZT9vs-taQdDT8B75jQjCuqinhfYRNENdVutaR2zqVhCvniqa9bVTUQF83nq0iQxsPJLMMuk6rOjWKVP_2DmO3WXZmNyFdM0CP8iNKR2V0jlMJk4K9CYAA6nd-iSQy22uvRpP9didJBEi6Sx-CV3XHlnS-CSs4y6Nqv2QR969zTf04Dg1XMDyVMXbJgroI2UsDpB8r9bNPjNf0vqP0YERgxn7S02cpX7IN96J82dVRo9gD5u_7gkXipxV6xTVSAnRccNLoMPHfkCg4RctpN1vsKJvfk4fdwSvmy4kQjgPQX_ZvNctqL_aPhpAM39ezc--)

law requiring women on the boards of publicly traded companies, he
suggested it might not survive legal challenges. Three years later, a
judge will begin hearing evidence that could undo the law credited
with giving more women seats in boardrooms traditionally dominated by
men.

clean_body: = Team, during the disastrous political career of Marjorie Taylor Greene, one thing has been clear and constant since day one: Majorie Taylor Greene only cares about serving herself. She doesn’t serve on any congressional committees, she votes NO on bills that serve the American people, she spreads dangerous (oftentimes violent) conspiracy theories, and she refuses to deliver solutions on ANY of the issues facing her constituents. As one of her constituents, I couldn’t sit back and watch her continue to embarrass - and that’s why I decided to run for Congress against her. I know that our district, state, and country can do better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. As a veteran, I’ve proudly served this country on multiple continents -- so I know what a real patriot looks like, and it’s not Marjorie Taylor Greene. But I’ll be frank: this is going to be a tough race. The radical-right LOVE Marjorie Taylor Greene, and they’re terrified of this seat falling into Democratic hands. But, guess what? I know that we can prove them wrong. = | = In a race this important, every little bit counts. I appreciate your support, Marcus Flowers Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 725 Bremen, GA 30110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

Dear Peter,

Vaccine mandates are starting to crumble!

Just a few weeks ago, a large coalition of states _**obtained a national injunction against the OSHA vaccine mandate.**_ This mandate would have forced _ALL EMPLOYERS_ with _over 100 employees_ to _mandate the vaccine_ within their company or face weekly COVID testing.

**We stood strongly against this overreach and worked with my colleagues to stop this!**

Now, other judges are following up on the OSHA vaccine case and providing us with additional victories.

In the last few days, we also had these wins:

1. A Louisiana-based federal judge, _**effectively blocked a COVID vaccine mandate for health workers**_ _**across the country**_ at hospitals that receive federal funding. This applies to West Virginia and the entire country!
2. A Kentucky-based federal judge, _**paused the administration's vaccine mandate for federal contractors**_ in Kentucky, Ohio and Tennessee. West Virginia expects to hear more about its case in the upcoming days.

For the sake of our economy and our sanity, we must block these unlawful mandates. _**Can you imagine how many essential workers would be displaced if these mandates went unchecked?**_

In a time of record high prices and labor shortages, should the government really demand to companies that they fire large percentages of their staff?

**No.**

And frankly, the government shouldn't get involved in an individual's decision to get the Covid-vaccine.

Now taking this position isn't the most popular thing to do. Quite frankly, it _**puts me on the radar screen of powerful and wealthy radicals**_ who will come after me.

clean_body: | | | | Vaccine mandates are starting to crumble! Dear Peter, Vaccine mandates are starting to crumble! Just a few weeks ago, a large coalition of states obtained a national injunction against the OSHA vaccine mandate. This mandate would have forced ALL EMPLOYERS with over 100 employees to mandate the vaccine within their company or face weekly COVID testing. We stood strongly against this overreach and worked with my colleagues to stop this! Now, other judges are following up on the OSHA vaccine case and providing us with additional victories. In the last few days, we also had these wins: 1. A Louisiana-based federal judge, effectively blocked a COVID vaccine mandate for health workers across the country at hospitals that receive federal funding. This applies to West Virginia and the entire country! 2. A Kentucky-based federal judge, paused the administration's vaccine mandate for federal contractors in Kentucky, Ohio and Tennessee. West Virginia expects to hear more about its case in the upcoming days. For the sake of our economy and our sanity, we must block these unlawful mandates. Can you imagine how many essential workers would be displaced if these mandates went unchecked? In a time of record high prices and labor shortages, should the government really demand to companies that they fire large percentages of their staff? No. And frankly, the government shouldn't get involved in an individual's decision to get the Covid-vaccine. Now taking this position isn't the most popular thing to do. Quite frankly, it puts me on the radar screen of powerful and wealthy radicals who will come after me. | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 == \-

name: Antoine Smith-Rouse via Team Booker
subject: Driving 4+ hours for doctor’s appointments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

My name is Antoine Smith-Rouse. I’m a Kentuckian and a father of seven.
(Here’s a picture of two of my kids!)

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13516?refcode=em20211203-1293&t=1001&akid=1293%2E346206%2EQmzFAB ]A picture of Antoine's two kids

Today is International Day of Persons with Disabilities, and I’m here to
tell you why Charles Booker is the right (and only) choice — not only for
Kentuckians with disabilities but also for folks all across our
Commonwealth.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13516?refcode=em20211203-1293&t=1021&akid=1293%2E346206%2EQmzFAB ]But before I get into my family’s story and why I support Charles, I
want to ask if you’d be able to support the campaign and join me in making
a donation of any amount today. Can you chip in?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13516?refcode=em20211203-1293&t=1022&akid=1293%2E346206%2EQmzFAB ]Contribute $5

As a busy father of seven, I am often asked why I get involved with social
justice issues, and why I take time to vocally and proudly support Charles
Booker. The simple answer is this: my family and others affected by
disabilities have no other choice.

Of my seven children, two have documented disabilities that require
regular medical care. And like many other Kentuckians in our situation, we
often have to drive over two hours one way for doctor’s appointments and
battle with insurance companies day in and out. Even in our city of
Owensboro — Kentucky’s fourth-largest city — healthcare isn’t as easily
accessible as it should be.

Charles’ Kentucky New Deal includes delivering quality healthcare to
everyone in our Commonwealth, no matter how much money they have in their
pocket — and that gives me hope for the future of my family, children, and
others.

Seeing that Charles has the vision to make the future better for ALL
Kentuckians regardless of age, race, sex, gender, sexual orientation, or
ability gives me hope that my children will prosper in the New Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13516?refcode=em20211203-1293&t=1023&akid=1293%2E346206%2EQmzFAB ]And Peter,
if we want to send him to the Senate, it’s going to require all of us
working together to make it happen. Will you please chip in
$5 or any other amount to Charles Booker’s campaign today?
Let’s work together for a brighter future for Kentucky.

With love,

Antoine Lamont Smith-Rouse
(He/Him)

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211203-1293-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1293_346206_QmzFAB&akid=1293%2E346206%2EQmzFAB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1293%2E346206%2EQmzFAB

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Traveling Texas with Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto’s officially on the ballot and making incredible connections everywhere we go — thanks to you.
#
Exciting news! **We officially filed the paperwork: Beto O’Rourke will be on the March 2022 Democratic primary ballot as a candidate for Governor for the state of Texas.**
That’s not all. Beto and the team are also back on the road — because our mission as a campaign is to reach every eligible voter in every corner of this state and, person by person, build a winning coalition to elect Beto next year.
[Will you pitch in $20.22 now to keep Beto on the campaign trail? Every dollar helps us personally reach the voters who will decide this election.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50324?refcode=ema20211203-165336&t=1&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)
**[Contribute $20.22](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50324?refcode=ema20211203-165336&t=2&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)**
**[Contribute another amount](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50316?refcode=ema20211203-165336&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)**
Dallas, Fort Worth, Austin, Houston, Sugar Land, Killeen, Galveston, Beaumont, Nacogdoches, Marshall, Texarkana, Paris, Gainesville, Wichita Falls, Amarillo, Lubbock, and Midland...we’ll visit them all in the next two weeks.
Our upcoming campaign stops are chances for Beto to listen to and learn from people who’ve been abandoned by our current Governor. He gets a deeper understanding of what’s keeping folks up at night and what solutions they want to see with each conversation. And every time he steps out of his truck, Beto’s making the real, human connections that inspire people to show up to the ballot box.
Sure, our opponent may have a $55 million war chest. But we have a grassroots movement powerful enough to help us campaign in all 254 Texas counties and mobilize voters of every age, job, background, and yes, even political affiliation. [Chip in $20.22 or more today, and you're directly helping build a people-powered campaign like Texas has never seen before.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50316?refcode=ema20211203-165336&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)
I’ll be in touch soon with photos, stories, and updates from the trail! Until then, thank you for officially helping put Beto on the ballot, and thank you for helping us win this election in 2022.
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211203-165336-footer&t=5&refcode2=165336_444211_TZHnnb&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=6&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=165336%2E444211%2ETZHnnb)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:
I want to make sure we give this election everything we’ve got. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQ6FKSfaxIkIrA17ayJt0nD880Y-P1yjSbGlNZdDo5ZcHp8VJQ4B3oPz7wc4RX60r0ke1VbF7umOL__9gas5hbLpXYZdjJwcIym2p7rJ04wGPlEmgB6MRfTKJH2R2-FcUfVbga6jcyV7es3803ImkQ9PX5nF6zciHFvZf-8-YwlT1KPvyHAUtrF9qtEZF8KSe-4wNVUSCfjoYtIivAznLt9A/3hj/gvS6NShNQoCiR-pjyRzAEg/h0/fsEflu8-4aMuz5eceAlZO2PpyaPzwk0Oa3yFqkHYXwU)
We did a big thing, Peter.
Just last week, almost 500 of you chipped in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. With those funds, we’re looking at powerful things for our campaign: widespread organizing, targeted ads, and community events where I get to do my favorite thing — have real conversations with the good people of Tennessee and share how we’re going to deliver for working people. body:
Our children need REAL education | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-5355749?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=b17716d5a2&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Our children need to be saved from Critical Race Theory. CRT is being pushed by radical Democrats to infiltrate our schools and indoctrinate our kids, teaching them how to judge others based on skin color before knowing their own names.

The importance of education cannot be understated. **We cannot allow our children to be indoctrinated** by this hateful ideology instead of learning the basic skills needed to succeed in life.
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=9cc6d50dcc&e=102b599530)
---
| Instead of fixing the issue, crony MLG is too busy dealing with scandal after scandal while New Mexico continues to be ranked last in education in our country.

That’s why we need to defeat her and elect a real Conservative candidate to protect our children from the CRT nonsense.

[_**Please make a donation of any amount today**_](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=f41c9c0ef1&e=102b599530)**** to show that you, like thousands of parents across the nation, are fed up with the failed radical Democrat agenda.
---
| [LET'S SAVE OUR KIDS FROM CRT ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=5de4915389&e=102b599530 "LET'S SAVE OUR KIDS FROM CRT ")
---
| As your next Governor, **I will fight back and ban CRT in the State of New Mexico for good!** Our kids deserve and need a real education, not indoctrination.
---
| Yours in liberty,

**_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret), USAF

[](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=62e7c4fd9a&e=102b599530)

clean_body: | | | | Join us at Mar-a-Lago Friend, President Trump and I want to personally invite you to dinner at Mar-a-Lago! This invitation is only for our top America First, true Conservatives, like YOU. Together, we will defeat the Swamp, the Establishment and take our party and country back. Not only does President Trump want to have dinner with you, but he wants the three of us to get a photo together! This opportunity is only for President Trump and my most dedicated supporters. I want YOU by my side when I see President Trump. Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, It was an exciting week in the U.S. Senate race as Jane surged in the polls thanks to her best in the race grassroots operation, constant travel and talk to Ohio families across the state, and relentless focus on the issues that matter to Ohioans. As Jane continues to work hard for your vote every day, the momentum continues to grow as more and more Ohioans come to realize what I already know: Jane Timken is the grassroots, America First candidate that Ohio needs. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane's Surging Momentum** [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a14fb9a9645544099330699cf04c369a&_e=zppxb4h-ITKHXz4T4euborfEFGbOpjuBrVbY3Tvtn4MJ6W1NocJxkJSv3VCeEt1D-C5DgIZD1GWSF-hvQXp1wiIROjXBDpBmjH4PU22e8qdxTKiDCEZ8ISU0Gc4d3acm4GhPW5sYxQVkCCp6hkHdPhOQj8aDMvzYR1CS8lXh7NAWIF0hAYc8iMwH1Cn3FQB6pURB-SV5XaClmfcy07Clfkz88QLdc9KBHGydiCgoWoWODE4l1Mbnf2DTUl6D-qDsPXacYR8P8_T4hWzK3Ejmd4RrRbV0HW-UJKalAbCr11E%3D)
[Brand new survey results show](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a14fb9a9645544099330699cf04c369a&_e=zppxb4h-ITKHXz4T4eubotTwVYWO3vHzccHNPIb15pSJ1W-G5QINNDBsuJ-WEQNq9b3nckOiKS35nU6oxBWgci7qeKiNIL0enTiTZMrCIOY-_wSj62L4b-CjZQsUaEo5w-UrheSefapJd4NdxE-J8vbvHv1ApotjKSbhsjZ2nA6WdyAZ8ObArBGSlqGvrDYAIJW9hxxkndHcfjWLoVVvKAQY5_o1fYXpYOueqpK0Aenc0uN7wnilgdk7gvRYcZ80GdFTRWb3_sErMxOJzbEI8NgOiCkztVwQvRXRHkGdGcnfYMl0kteFdfl9gtw5ve3SvTnJCHu9n_euTsoEYwpaJnCHKtxroSzMJxcS7kjAXUccKf-IP0C_ybHruIKkyWH8) that **Jane Timken is surging on the ballot and is now within striking distance of Josh Mandel**. Climbing six points since our last survey, Jane’s relentless focus on the issues that matter to Ohio families, the air support from our aggressive TV ad campaign, and our unparalleled grassroots ground game is rocketing Jane into a position to win this race in May.

The momentum Jane has gained on the ballot is coupled with her ever-increasing favorability with voters. **With a more than a 2:1 positive image with primary voters** , Jane continues to gain traction – and as more primary voters become aware of Jane as a mom, a fighter, and an authentic champion of the America First agenda, this will only keep growing.
**From the Trail**
On Tuesday, Jane took part in Rep. Haraz Ghanbari's #RideAlongAndLearn challenge by going out with the Toledo Police Department.
Gaining a better understanding of the day to day of Ohio’s police officers will help Jane be a strong voice in the U.S. Senate for our law enforcement communities.
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a14fb9a9645544099330699cf04c369a&_e=zppxb4h-ITKHXz4T4eubovahk5fGzx0bMK_Ie2dJcj8dd7hzJ5EmKrcCmH1q-gjhbC7ejkh-eLJ8iADP82VhH4rWdLIDzw0VD3b6K4cI10GxJ7-5mlmaO7WLaJ5Dng7s6G-B_EaDwxX2E7IQSxgzG2srgnmYC6WqM3hZF1WobIWWRzfv4M49PJo9yJmCHLfyM5gdj5GvYAkNEmcVs6sTDeJy5b7vX5LD8tX7EyyCYbd1UcHUF3nVy7sas7zuG_-c4ZT7JUOPC9zwhlRQLNuVEw%3D%3D)
Later that evening, Jane joined a group of supporters for a great event. Jane's grassroots network reaches every corner of the state and we are grateful for our support in Northwest Ohio!
On Thursday, Jane’s Parents First Tour continued with a group of conservative parents in Columbus who have had enough. Enough with lowering standards, enough with divisive curriculum, and enough with putting teachers unions over kids. Jane will be a strong voice for parents in the U.S. Senate.
**Ohio GOP Senate Forum**
After enjoying the Thanksgiving holiday with her family, Jane hit the ground running on Monday at the final Ohio GOP Senate Forum put on by the Ohio Press Network. It was clear to anyone watching at home that Jane is the best prepared to defeat Tim Ryan and is the conservative fighter we need in Washington D.C.

Don’t believe me? Take a look at a few clips from Jane’s great performance Monday night.

Jane on being a fiscal conservative:
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a14fb9a9645544099330699cf04c369a&_e=zppxb4h-ITKHXz4T4euborfEFGbOpjuBrVbY3Tvtn4Nx4_-ZuX6xfKQMjuAuIm_fEivgn3ErcVS-5iQ1DJZBw2gYgcFnmsUjAKQd3_yUPaSjFbBlVWYIGFxkuTmx7_VaFeXMDWb--v26CzyO0PB7-OJ-_8vWphKb6jYJMmVRjG7c3g8ISQd53nWIBlu_110VlDL0ZchhDJtkMJsaQye9icFfD6aUIyQ7tVcloVK0Cl3KcHqEksaiODF0DDLOW2K9rco0p5kFKH0wE_dwVtcDgH66B27y-BeXU3zqeiyO41o%3D)
Jane on bucking the party establishment:
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a14fb9a9645544099330699cf04c369a&_e=zppxb4h-ITKHXz4T4euborfEFGbOpjuBrVbY3Tvtn4Pu_sl1ZrFIE5ks8FDz0a9DkSn32Edjr1_bk2Mjn7x3hg7fXeH1FAdtMrM_GuzWjnc8U-PvBTmxWl-NVVHXWxRuMdAawS8lZ8VxZIA-YK3O4aQsuaQLhdbuBxEerKv_m3u7njAmVkvcrI9AVRs5GDJtu9BGElKvuv_fDSwqprJv3vXjIDilBmXY-xKVrKggLIu3UCPRj6ASWD7RFxvJtFX0-129c_wR5CHcAXxYsag_J2hx6M3XzQeH64I2SGiZPSc%3D)
Jane on being a fighter for Ohio:

You can watch the full forum [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a14fb9a9645544099330699cf04c369a&_e=zppxb4h-ITKHXz4T4eubotDGHk2_ukCWg_U9j9KtdcyPKU5H1iS_vknPEOgA9TwTlz5mOp-MiQnoim35WXftSKfMvMYbrWFhbHf8Lnr3_Zj4GHBXWz2zY6AWqT-jd7eXNkBh3fQpzxaj8cwwFZ1II-eCztCn2I1iRivaLrsBnpNVan6AVUQrwH4ZBUCtunNdwS0POR0w_AdJdao6x_hexJgSPBRdXCdPp5C2P-GZHl-u1XnoDB_u629gryJmPUGucp7GSNLdP08E7o4GzNOD0g%3D%3D).

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, It was an exciting week in the U.S. Senate race as Jane surged in the polls thanks to her best in the race grassroots operation, constant travel and talk to Ohio families across the state, and relentless focus on the issues that matter to Ohioans. As Jane continues to work hard for your vote every day, the momentum continues to grow as more and more Ohioans come to realize what I already know: Jane Timken is the grassroots, America First candidate that Ohio needs. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Jane's Surging Momentum that Jane Timken is surging on the ballot and is now within striking distance of Josh Mandel. Climbing six points since our last survey, Jane’s relentless focus on the issues that matter to Ohio families, the air support from our aggressive TV ad campaign, and our unparalleled grassroots ground game is rocketing Jane into a position to win this race in May. The momentum Jane has gained on the ballot is coupled with her ever-increasing favorability with voters. With a more than a 2:1 positive image with primary voters , Jane continues to gain traction – and as more primary voters become aware of Jane as a mom, a fighter, and an authentic champion of the America First agenda, this will only keep growing. From the Trail On Tuesday, Jane took part in Rep. Haraz Ghanbari's #RideAlongAndLearn challenge by going out with the Toledo Police Department. Gaining a better understanding of the day to day of Ohio’s police officers will help Jane be a strong voice in the U.S. Senate for our law enforcement communities. Later that evening, Jane joined a group of supporters for a great event. Jane's grassroots network reaches every corner of the state and we are grateful for our support in Northwest Ohio! On Thursday, Jane’s Parents First Tour continued with a group of conservative parents in Columbus who have had enough. Enough with lowering standards, enough with divisive curriculum, and enough with putting teachers unions over kids. Jane will be a strong voice for parents in the U.S. Senate. Ohio GOP Senate Forum After enjoying the Thanksgiving holiday with her family, Jane hit the ground running on Monday at the final Ohio GOP Senate Forum put on by the Ohio Press Network. It was clear to anyone watching at home that Jane is the best prepared to defeat Tim Ryan and is the conservative fighter we need in Washington D.C. Don’t believe me? Take a look at a few clips from Jane’s great performance Monday night. Jane on being a fiscal conservative: Jane on bucking the party establishment: Jane on being a fighter for Ohio: You can watch the full forum . I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

subject: I’m running for the United States Senate

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epWd8gqymh7bblQdPw5l2aJuCXg7824612LGTss7WUmhgOTmWWAoUF1RueJoPhcsuBHVjAe8_Kz2hDhS9DAL-fboQvjeGSMF-kC9-vJXC1_ZSSk9661tzySzSZf6qDKJ4E3pf7JXFWIKqquWhRsL7v0uI7NfSzCKQFzF3or64JQAs9AgUxiEI3yJ8yqIJtPkuCjOJUKXR1rurQSGI2DojkR8%3D)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epSU_ojzD9mzGzvJdrW3F8OIZdbOxq25354FkTASvzMG9WAQLVMJ__JW71imZdsuK0ma-HsAJC19yh-Oy3hUK6qpNgaq_CYneKPyrg4cDsDqOXazTWkJElw3IWqobHxlGLVqcPGBLh7HvswcDQHPDf2WRckHT2vtZ74uFRzTToToUGe-kO3EaRk9X19bA7PT6NwPD6K4d-6dudYNTxyGt9YA%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epfl7LLbO0jjLOgwvSy38xjeqhqBDfhV7yy3As4kTtL8YXt8_pdCiPm17wSSDR-5FhYvZHY2T5ShLDU7gGD6vgzyy7xZyfQp1OI2uv1licAuKC2e9TGhGtIEFiAa9VdAtw88bEZpgEfqUn4VBG0RbNELTajFPQ464EsxpwmTRiEW5-qjvkadLPt7D57Cf8U2xPnDL2nvz-ZWctrpk6iNCvMk%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epbg8fV5EJRq4nH9NMVNnZ715NajsBUC36DTOJWJ3I10WxvW9Wkt72Z6i77uj4Ww6wO5rZv7DGFCCzGuaeRSjAJcsoMLszMIw3DEERymYvckg24-4l_-JmoLUeNaKOmQF9WRK_7PHiOqi7g6g1llZ3WuFQPgqnwoCn2Qvf4l3ErS8NCd1a8kvAoqswPZM8Z00oDGU9zS252TKqJdej2Gp7k8%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epRY0qT1ebPB60YOjJ8peSFTTPpaQF3UkLtktuMFXnLYjtHkdr3XwZ-HnlGbFvNkdLIU-qbuwSo2MZijXLzdQJPk7MkBNQ4hrWOLEthsy9aNDclgUwKguPEXeHY8dvtPuBkdQTTlRnR7sL-kBeuKyL0vl9MaF8DFkt06Xwz05rC7FZJywfXTwqtE4_n0ptuhTVgLOke_8Fuw60E-p8FGt8CM%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epa8FvLzgxMS4nViTCjk7ucZSeQVjsy6mY52rYGXlKnvTX6IXEHegFVZdVLpd7l4vfo7DVRSKt5-ykZx0bdBJJWd8G3Y8xHctgyu43XRIXlo3z6rA5dbM-twfI7A7P54uGnrk-NEXY7bmvhiFALQ8gdP8nmIA8T_76h1X7oTngcl7dIh-Xcdd72SYLIv4HBARvH4CZDYb-SMqcVAVoCfneN8%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The Democrats in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epU539GJMJSI1zs4gjm0Cfc4vz6UcWozdX-oSBYdas4x_6L6M9YG5SdcuDgE_LTBpznud1fGZCemHJaHmjfTZp4SecjNmwvGwyzvrrHlK8tFq6bpSE9iEyPVPHWu1VAZYZwTfYI0G6WlvdG5yf5Wnp0I5ea0lX4SEV4dPX_YP-rWZwJMVAGQbLlN3b0Pfw-glBdeiE93QnU4nldBVhF8ugTs%3D)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d8c18a0b51884996ba81d4e74e137f01&_e=Vu8srsxkaEKpXtBNLPu2xd9O_GtGxZZfPs4CTUIHEYRObXqAJCrkv2fqtzoUAQR8aeLPwH22tEUms8vXoNxLhgF_o8wnSXBjqK7v5T3RMEHMtrqaVVqpfv4Pl3-L4xe55_48WJmY-5FfwjG2H2qqRRrpVJbS-CftTXMD3j3uJ_9ov5xY5zGvZxWnrdYeM6rIBRQ4iFF2d7aZnl_bx0L4-HeOYbX0nJVJ6kr1Xq8UyD6cYKyilllDNouep5SdeMyImY1TD6onoD5d-5dSGi6epbSYtGYwoMwHH83P-sJgpAdPKDVPyxkerAnkxUMZo64WJjkGFVkgLEPlrh30FL7wv6J4X1EMJh8cfOCnaHMTOeKD6D1NGgGvZ1Khz-O9NgtUFLxA4-1IfiKcnRbKvJKrUPV7Bat3iIdNh9hllOR8gNaYzjoNEB6KQLl5e5yN0PEbKotPpR3XYaf7HVNlowVBgT4PXUyX4R8sy1ZjL4VdIYg%3D)

name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: Dont miss out on upcoming trainings
body:
We'll be going over candidate lit, fundraising, events... and more!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- Nomination signatures for the upcoming local elections in April 2022 are currently being distributed. **If you are still on the fence or want to find out what running for local office entails, be sure to attend our FINAL 2 trainings on the subject on 12/06 and 12/08. ******
### **Local Candidate Overview**
| [](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_06_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=2 "12/06 @ 7PM") [12/06 @ 7PM](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_06_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=2)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_08_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=3 "12/08 @ 7PM") [12/08 @ 7PM](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_08_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=3)
---
* * *

For those that have committed to running, **we want to start providing additional trainings on areas where you might need some assistance or want to hear about best practices!**
The first group of topics we will discuss is **Yard Signs & Literature** and the second group of topics is **Fundraising & Events**.
Be sure to check out the dates for these specific trainings below:****
### **Yard Signs & Literature**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_15?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=4 "12/15 @ 6PM") [12/15 @ 6PM](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_15?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=4)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_06?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=5 "1/06 @ 6PM") [1/06 @ 6PM](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_06?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=5)
---
* * *
### **Fundraising & Events**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_20?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=6 "12/20 @ 6PM") [12/20 @ 6PM](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_20?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=6)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_11?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=7 "1/11 @ 6PM") [1/11 @ 6PM](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_11?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=7)
---
We look forward to seeing you at these upcoming trainings![](http://act.wisgop.org/?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=8)
Best,
Jordan Moskowitz
Political Director
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=9 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=9)
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
