You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=11) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=12).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_lcr_push_3&n=13), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Did you see me on Tucker re: Vaccine Databases?
body:
Patriot,

Did you see me on Tucker Carlson’s program last night? We discussed the threat to our liberty and privacy posed by the all-encompassing vaccine database that the House of Representatives just passed.

You can see the clip here: https://joekentforcongress.com/tucker-vaccinedatabase/.

This legislation will track who and who has not been vaccinated and how many “boosters” they’ve received. Those who choose not to be vaccinated or would prefer to keep that medical information private can be targeted for harassment by government agents, lose their jobs, or face fines or even jail.

You don’t have to look any further than Australia where this is happening now.
If you believe as I do that this is not only unconstitutional but immoral, please help me get elected so I can be on the front lines to fight against it.

Donate at https://joekentforcongress.com/donate.

It’s not surprising that the Democrats voted for it. What is outrageous is that 80 Republicans in the House also voted to create the vaccine database, including my opponent Jaime Herrera Beutler.

Herrera Beutler wears an “R” next to her name, but this is just another betrayal of our values on a very long list: she voted to impeach Trump, voted to stop building the wall, voted against withdrawing our troops from Syria, and voted to prevent President Trump from deploying the national guard to defend us against ANTIFA when they were rioting in her own congressional district.
What’s the point of having a Republican Party if it’s filled with people like her?

That’s why I’m primarying her, and I need your help.

Please contribute today so I can send Jaime packing and replace her with an America First conservative who will stand up for your medical freedom and against the Biden Administration’s tyrannical overreach. Give what you can at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

This legislation will track who and who has not been vaccinated and how many “boosters” they’ve received. Those who choose not to be vaccinated or would prefer to keep that medical information private can be targeted for harassment by government agents, lose their jobs, or face fines or even jail. You don’t have to look any further than Australia where this is happening now. If you believe as I do that this is not only unconstitutional but immoral, please help me get elected so I can be on the front lines to fight against it. Donate at . body:

---
|
# **Newsletter-December Vol. 1, #2**
---
| | | 3December21

Dear Friends,

Thank You for interest in the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign! This campaign can't happen without you and we covet your prayers and support. Please know that we're praying for you as well.

**MORE BREAKING NEWS!**
The maps for re-drawing the Congressional Districts will be voted on next week (the week of December 6). To make a long story short, the top two Congressional maps split the county where both Jeff and his Primary opponent live. If either map is approved, Jeff can run unopposed in the June primary and secure a place in the November 2022 general election. Please keep Jeff in your prayers.

**$25,000 In 25 days!**
Campaigns work on quarters-every three months. The campaign’s first reporting period will end December 31st. We’re praying to send a strong message to our opponents that we’re running a serious campaign. To do so, we need to raise $25,000 by December 31.

We're asking everyone who shares our concern for our country to give something, ideally monthly.
There is no such thing as a small gift.
If we had $5, $10, $20 per month from everyone who is troubled by the direction of our country and wants to restore it, the campaign would be in GREAT financial shape.

By law, the maximum a person can give is $5800 ($11,600 per couple).
We're praying for people who can help jumpstart the campaign with this level of support.
## **[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=ab5bf11d0c&e=12a37459a2)**

**Meet & Greets**
**The campaign has been hosting virtual and in-person Meet & Greets with Jeff. Who do you know that shares our concern for the Country? Consider inviting them to meet Jeff and learn how they can make difference to help District 4. [Email Us For More Info](mailto:Info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com?subject=Meet%20%26%20Greets)**

**It's Time To Get Involved**
Jeff is standing with you and for you and Jeff needs you to stand with him as well. He needs your help.

**Social Media**
With whom can you share Jeff's website? Who can you invite? If freedom matters to you, now is the time to act. We need others who can share, like, post, re-post, etc.

We're looking for someone with social media savvy and experience. Who do you know who could help? Please have them contact us or let us know so we can contact them.

Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff

---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=3f32cb40ff&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")

By law, the maximum a person can give is $5800 ($11,600 per couple). We're praying for people who can help jumpstart the campaign with this level of support. Meet & Greets The campaign has been hosting virtual and in-person Meet & Greets with Jeff. Who do you know that shares our concern for the Country? Consider inviting them to meet Jeff and learn how they can make difference to help District 4. mailto:Info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com?subject=Meet%20%26%20Greets It's Time To Get Involved Jeff is standing with you and for you and Jeff needs you to stand with him as well. He needs your help. Social Media With whom can you share Jeff's website? Who can you invite? If freedom matters to you, now is the time to act. We need others who can share, like, post, re-post, etc. We're looking for someone with social media savvy and experience. Who do you know who could help? Please have them contact us or let us know so we can contact them. Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope. Please share this newsletter with others. Standing with you, Jeff | "Jeff Warner For Congress Website" | | | | © 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved. Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768 mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

clean_body: This is NOT a fundraising email Dear Peter, The evidence is clear: Patrick’s campaign to take back America is gaining momentum. From national TV interviews, to big endorsements, to meeting with voters all across Georgia’s 10th District, people are rallying to Patrick’s campaign. And we wanted to keep you up to date on all the action. New Endorsements 👍 Patrick was recently endorsed by conservative champion Rep. Madison Cawthorn (NC-11). He endorsed Patrick because he knows how important it is to elect America First Republicans who won’t back down in Washington. Rep. Cawthorn has been fighting the good fight, but he NEEDS reinforcements in Congress like Patrick. Patrick on TV 📺 Patrick joined Steve Bannon on WarRoom to discuss Dr. Fauci’s complete failure, and the arrogance and corruption of the far Left. Watch the whole interviews by clicking below! Patrick’s Revolver Interview:Patrick Witt Saw GA’s 2020 Fraud Up Close, Now He’s Running For Congress to Make Sure It Never Happens Again📰 Patrick recently sat down with Revolver for an interview to talk about his race for Congress, election integrity, and the future of the Republican Party. How Can You Support Patrick?🤝 We are just 28 days away from the end-of-year fundraising deadline, which ends at 11:59 p.m. on December 31. As always, you can stay up to date and show your support by following Patrick on social media: And if you want to show off your MAGA pride and support Patrick at the same time, Thank you for your support, Team Witt | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m fighting to keep the American dream alive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=286fb785594f496f88bcf9bd50096c22&_e=n84ukB2T1FFQp9zcbxrb3HRGMKADEyXkAh0gLHynzeybYKV45g5nF6LF5HxoFdrEpPblk41e90mH1YfDLFzTvXul1EiufcVria8YEwBzQzINopidkSN4YkdqKCWzdgHYf6fiWtNbOpvyx60i20zgUbbv9jvOvC2fde14xVOIZFkHW_HYfPuoauh5EYgfrVBYnJgxcrQcZSXdW8qAPNq4BKXQ-Ubqo1ghKYBsSlxK0ZxMFvjgyUdcOpPz8lyEalKhzsOyA1Rcob8G1ywVwE1CZ74FyO6AkXRJayzfeL_DtwOj66iLGZh2p7RRQ70sYwUjUUgL_zDT5BngUPQPJrslyzrxulnVbsbu8p793Rh3sfRgAEYTc-oaSuyCQLMGbLwFMT29hr2wWbIlSnEO-OsWi-1atgyMiGadiEcRHvo0CkCp8MoUktgxVaIeqW30o-LC249cH44mBseU5mjAOhstti1K1piefM1eVjuQB3QLBaA%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=286fb785594f496f88bcf9bd50096c22&_e=n84ukB2T1FFQp9zcbxrb3HRGMKADEyXkAh0gLHynzeybYKV45g5nF6LF5HxoFdrEpPblk41e90mH1YfDLFzTvXul1EiufcVria8YEwBzQzINopidkSN4YkdqKCWzdgHYf6fiWtNbOpvyx60i20zgUbbv9jvOvC2fde14xVOIZFkHW_HYfPuoauh5EYgfrVBYnJgxcrQcZSXdW8qAPNq4BKXQ-Ubqo1ghKYBsSlxK0ZxMFvjgyUdcOpPz8lyEalKhP7egby21QCEPeU8u0lNDXAL3m7X49EHoaIRGNYBTwQbqdeC6GC6iQRpo7CDTMNyBF71lW0MnAqMAcBpcVageZpb0TcPR937to90bKzbRGbKtPRVOPYB_Xa6FFZ3jdjCy7_PFsSBX1xFg5J2zSUcZQICnLdNXjjoHbZAzkbbjZReOKVzAX0O_lkBs758duQleesmGNsahBnG2CuzyFiDodnvL4CRqSHjCijF90YZC3Ko%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=286fb785594f496f88bcf9bd50096c22&_e=n84ukB2T1FFQp9zcbxrb3HRGMKADEyXkAh0gLHynzeybYKV45g5nF6LF5HxoFdrEpPblk41e90mH1YfDLFzTvXul1EiufcVria8YEwBzQzINopidkSN4YkdqKCWzdgHYf6fiWtNbOpvyx60i20zgUbbv9jvOvC2fde14xVOIZFkHW_HYfPuoauh5EYgfrVBYnJgxcrQcZSXdW8qAPNq4BKXQ-Ubqo1ghKYBsSlxK0ZxMFvjgyUdcOpPz8lyEalKhg-3sd2tIrjAhjwCM8HLHqbjukwp910RA28-Tw3qXTG_0EeWwsSnLwSJUtuLNSnQObJMuhhPTibB9-6G_WZH5Zo2sA5orZx9UwssRkiyW2P0c_rXMHyqhzZxBzhpIb4JvaCKrFTeP8xY40Y6ErymMaHjGAwGcwQC5auAJltNM3M4MX6cNXfSDwwmBsQYlKGIdDxQu4rj89myzV9YxkDMK4HuVfYHhWoB7uzAU408hpnY%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=286fb785594f496f88bcf9bd50096c22&_e=n84ukB2T1FFQp9zcbxrb3HRGMKADEyXkAh0gLHynzeybYKV45g5nF6LF5HxoFdrEpPblk41e90mH1YfDLFzTvXul1EiufcVria8YEwBzQzINopidkSN4YkdqKCWzdgHYf6fiWtNbOpvyx60i20zgUbbv9jvOvC2fde14xVOIZFkHW_HYfPuoauh5EYgfrVBYnJgxcrQcZSXdW8qAPNq4BKXQ-Ubqo1ghKYBsSlxK0ZxMFvjgyUdcOpPz8lyEalKhP26ZgO_yrqkYShC3X1rJK14FY-wDcDVdpZFJD4qKHZqaN4B_YqHNtz5a5h_UpWP7D_l_tE4miqUrPnAdI304C2ZhliUjACJ8pIPZcRMkJ6ah_0wiqXcLWuvKYU4lMHc431Vup7LozQpxlx-grt-kJq-y-4Tsl1RnJtnJok-zyf4_6t4mZccUVcdBcN17ohAi6Ju8ojakt-u8e3jxL3CUHYWOzqIeFfzrDqm-2RFD4gs%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=286fb785594f496f88bcf9bd50096c22&_e=n84ukB2T1FFQp9zcbxrb3HRGMKADEyXkAh0gLHynzeybYKV45g5nF6LF5HxoFdrEpPblk41e90mH1YfDLFzTvXul1EiufcVria8YEwBzQzINopidkSN4YkdqKCWzdgHYf6fiWtNbOpvyx60i20zgUbbv9jvOvC2fde14xVOIZFkHW_HYfPuoauh5EYgfrVBYnJgxcrQcZSXdW8qAPNq4BKXQ-Ubqo1ghKYBsSlxK0ZxMFvjgyUdcOpPz8lyEalKhKeVz__YfzWUuyR5ZIg4C4zoN8TDtuHkdUEnH0SYJZkKHXWjEIlKaCvRqOKClKLK5i8LXedFMJ9L18lJO9-w8QH8cbkRAUKfCl5fvsVjSIRb6xeSDSQ0AKQQlc8Dgva9EcEZEqsOob4Oa1gujMYFKAQTZI9CMVuUhnaZ5kDwT1NYdhZ9Mf2xUI2_idhm9iHnmIy0HfUGxlhqe6QzqdZLwKxiYRTKNiTfBpS-KyiJIdl4%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Fellow Conservative, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The Democrats in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
